name: John Fetterman
subject: My last note to you today, and it’s important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This is your last chance to donate before midnight.
#
I know it’s late, Peter.
But as I sit here picking through the kids’ leftover Halloween candy, I’m thinking about what’s next for our campaign.
So please **[let me explain why supporting our campaign with a $5 donation before MIDNIGHT is the *most* important thing you can do to help our campaign right now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35612?refcode=em20211031-3263&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3263%2E434096%2EWtlRNx)**
I’ll just start out by saying this: **Starting tomorrow, we’ll be just over one (1) year out from Election Day 2022. All eyes will be on Pennsylvania + our campaign.**
If one year seems like a _loooooot_ of time to you, trust me, it’s not. Starting next week, we have only 365 days to build the strongest, most far-reaching campaign that PA has *ever* seen, and every single dollar you donate NOW makes an incredible difference.
Here’s the other thing, Peter: Our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority could all come down to Pennsylvania. This Senate seat is gonna be a real toss-up.
Don’t just take my word for it. **CNN has consistently rated Pennsylvania as the #1 Most Likely to Flip Democratic state in the country.** We all remember what happened when Pennsylvania flipped the _other way_ in 2016. That’s why building support for the long road ahead is so critical right now.
Then there’s the latest polling out there. According to the data we’ve seen so far, voters overwhelmingly see our campaign as the ONLY campaign that can win statewide in Pennsylvania. That’s the kind of momentum we’ve gotta keep up now.
After all, the pool of Democratic primary competitors we’re up against is bigger than it’s ever been. **Now, I’m the *only* candidate who has run statewide before + won,** but your support today helps ensure that our campaign stays ahead of our competition.
With all of this in mind, I am respectfully + humbly asking one last time for your support before our October end-of-month fundraising deadline:
**[Can you kick in your very first $5 donation to our campaign for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania? This is your last chance to make an impact on reaching our $10 million fundraising goal before our deadline at 11:59 PM.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35612?refcode=em20211031-3263&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3263%2E434096%2EWtlRNx)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35612?refcode=em20211031-3263&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3263%2E434096%2EWtlRNx)**
When the clock strikes midnight tonight, I won’t be thinking about the witching hour — I’ll be saying a thank you to all of you.
Now, I hope you’ll join me in enjoying leftover Halloween candy. We all deserve it for the year ahead. 😂
Thanks,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211031-3263-footer&t=22&refcode2=3263_434096_WtlRNx&akid=3263%2E434096%2EWtlRNx)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: This is your last chance to donate before midnight. I know it’s late, Peter. But as I sit here picking through the kids’ leftover Halloween candy, I’m thinking about what’s next for our campaign. So please I’ll just start out by saying this: Starting tomorrow, we’ll be just over one (1) year out from Election Day 2022. All eyes will be on Pennsylvania + our campaign. If one year seems like a loooooot of time to you, trust me, it’s not. Starting next week, we have only 365 days to build the strongest, most far-reaching campaign that PA has ever seen, and every single dollar you donate NOW makes an incredible difference. Here’s the other thing, Peter: Our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority could all come down to Pennsylvania. This Senate seat is gonna be a real toss-up. Don’t just take my word for it. CNN has consistently rated Pennsylvania as the #1 Most Likely to Flip Democratic state in the country. We all remember what happened when Pennsylvania flipped the other way in 2016. That’s why building support for the long road ahead is so critical right now. Then there’s the latest polling out there. According to the data we’ve seen so far, voters overwhelmingly see our campaign as the ONLY campaign that can win statewide in Pennsylvania. That’s the kind of momentum we’ve gotta keep up now. After all, the pool of Democratic primary competitors we’re up against is bigger than it’s ever been. Now, I’m the only candidate who has run statewide before + won, but your support today helps ensure that our campaign stays ahead of our competition. With all of this in mind, I am respectfully + humbly asking one last time for your support before our October end-of-month fundraising deadline: When the clock strikes midnight tonight, I won’t be thinking about the witching hour — I’ll be saying a thank you to all of you. Now, I hope you’ll join me in enjoying leftover Halloween candy. We all deserve it for the year ahead. 😂 Thanks, John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

body:
Folks --

I wanted to make sure you saw my email from earlier today. My team let me
know a bunch of my top supporters haven’t chipped in today -- so I’m
reaching out one last time before our deadline.

This is the most important Senate race in the country and together we can
flip this seat blue. But this is an uphill battle. My opponents are
writing their campaigns big checks and have the backing of billionaires. I
literally can’t do this without you.

Even a few bucks will give our campaign an edge. I’m counting on you,
folks, we’ve only got one shot at this.

Can you rush a donation to flip this seat blue and expand the Senate
majority?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5752?t=1006&akid=1294%2E3611125%2E8DrWMg ]https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rya_monthly_oct21

Let’s do this together,

Tim

name: Cynthia Cano, Powered By People
subject: Personally reaching out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Hi, it's
Cynthia at Powered by People.

I wanted to personally reach out because our October fundraising deadline
is only hours away, and right now we're running short of our $20,000 goal.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48167?refcode=ema20211031-160667&t=1001&akid=160667%2E444211%2E9UlDj4 ]If you can, would you please consider chipping in to help us hit this
critical goal by midnight?

Powered by People has big plans for 2022 and beyond. We launched our new
college program with Student Fellows working across six Texas campuses,
and we're planning to expand our voter registration efforts to reach
Texans in every corner of the state. But these plans depend on hitting our
$20,000 fundraising goal before midnight tonight.

I know I don't have to tell you how much is at stake. In the past year, the far-right state
legislature — led by Governor Greg Abbott — has passed an extreme voter
suppression bill, a restrictive abortion ban, and made it legal to carry a
gun without a permit or training. Not to mention, the GOP's failure to
protect Texans from COVID-19 or fix our power grid.

As a grassroots organization, Powered by People's work isn't funded by
super PACs or corporate mega-donors. We're fueled by tens of thousands of
individuals who care about the future of Texas and our country.

Together, we can register hundreds of
thousands of new voters and work towards a safer, healthier, and more just
Texas. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48167?refcode=ema20211031-160667&t=1002&akid=160667%2E444211%2E9UlDj4 ]Please, with just a few hours to go, will you chip in
$3 or more to help hit our $20,000 goal?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48167?refcode=ema20211031-160667&amount=3&t=1021&akid=160667%2E444211%2E9UlDj4 ]Contribute $3

Thank you for being a part of this,

Cynthia Cano
Powered by People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48167?refcode=ema20211031-160667&t=1022&akid=160667%2E444211%2E9UlDj4 ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=160667%2E444211%2E9UlDj4

name: me, Mike (2)
subject: What has the Biden Administration Done For America?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
| [](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=5ede1be9b22f4901a087f9f7945a2630&_e=NJ4cq2t6qcjIginImLxZ6fRsx-PKv8EwyQFVXSDKV2vpSBicDnNINHYXd-93L887dDFLSa5GqfQhNxP5Yl1cf0x-2Q1b2ayTMG3G6T6sVfATfc-wEzzws4bf80O5NnPoMJVRQlt3d6SD4k4P_TZywIFvn9-OKnJiHk1of4P3FSwp75ZxasY7KG38w1TVVud5-iZaFMr6oSD78Yfr0fyAkneUGv51nXu_uOzWf3ydPSevYhzImfT65kYNdwWCQx4HM2zJCz48UsYkVzEggkDlyA3-B1TJxBeOPw9po0Lp9EiX0VHfLSWWwrmJ0AXTsNbwkK5eUT4xxflulAoagmBpEJUMiOcpF6nLRR8mGfoAccAllwb_UpVXeeZH_aWFTidbLCPLflADOzf3pXVvEUPLg4dRxM23xJZ8zkb5ciIivbr7Nv3_7GoOzctiE3nr5aaFd07k8kxHe6I2ldlDU0VmQg%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

It breaks my heart to say this: **_American national pride has fallen to an all-time low.

This is due to an extreme Anti-American push from the Left._** The Radical Left agenda is based on **_Anti-American sentiments and values._ This is just so wrong.**

I don’t know about you, but I am and always will be **PROUD** to be an American. It has been the honor of my life to serve as Indiana’s Senator.

To show my pride, my team and I have decided to **double every donation made in the next 24 hours.** We owe it to you -- and this country -- to show that American pride still exists.

**_[I know every single one of you donating to my campaign is a loyal patriot, and I want to show you just how proud I am to represent you and this amazing country.](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=5ede1be9b22f4901a087f9f7945a2630&_e=NJ4cq2t6qcjIginImLxZ6fRsx-PKv8EwyQFVXSDKV2vpSBicDnNINHYXd-93L887dDFLSa5GqfQhNxP5Yl1cf0x-2Q1b2ayTMG3G6T6sVfATfc-wEzzws4bf80O5NnPoMJVRQlt3d6SD4k4P_TZywIFvn9-OKnJiHk1of4P3FSwp75ZxasY7KG38w1TVVud5-iZaFMr6oSD78Yfr0fyAkneUGv51nXu_uOzWf3ydPSevYhzImfT65kYNdwWCQx4HnwrKq9YdJfYF9v3BTNPT3zqvZXbJ4rTxvTzR9mvGtCKxTpxd9vxvP1qdyQdf03Q2ZKmSWMEfN56tJGpc3jyVlLmTm6scb_i0LmPdaov2GPpUxU5n_CSPxJkOCOQpdTnETH1RgK4hdwrIEUYNzrF4_9_lD_EFkf8LCLoYbrBS59XnRul9n7cxgGF-oz8kkDOXl0U7rbU1pgVpoZbwmMirRw%3D%3D)_**
| [**DOUBLE THE IMPACT**](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=5ede1be9b22f4901a087f9f7945a2630&_e=NJ4cq2t6qcjIginImLxZ6fRsx-PKv8EwyQFVXSDKV2vpSBicDnNINHYXd-93L887dDFLSa5GqfQhNxP5Yl1cf0x-2Q1b2ayTMG3G6T6sVfATfc-wEzzws4bf80O5NnPoMJVRQlt3d6SD4k4P_TZywIFvn9-OKnJiHk1of4P3FSwp75ZxasY7KG38w1TVVud5-iZaFMr6oSD78Yfr0fyAkneUGv51nXu_uOzWf3ydPSevYhzImfT65kYNdwWCQx4H8ZJmxEDtoLwuTec_64faShi4OWoI2-z8d1uvoeSuSQ8QAauhdyVL3ZFYroaXIOtD7mtbOOrmXe8rAzOx5jeCSV27tm95wyCjTTswAPEgquVOoAXY5PVQT0NYq1jIdJ9CR4v8F_E8Nw7oJXoSBVD9qd3CD8In-d487oKBOqT9-zyvx2bae4LWjlc75zbUQpv3iW22zgZ355iiy_C14grEEQ%3D%3D)
---

**_[We need to show Liberals that there are still PROUD PATRIOTS in this nation.](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=5ede1be9b22f4901a087f9f7945a2630&_e=NJ4cq2t6qcjIginImLxZ6fRsx-PKv8EwyQFVXSDKV2vpSBicDnNINHYXd-93L887dDFLSa5GqfQhNxP5Yl1cf0x-2Q1b2ayTMG3G6T6sVfATfc-wEzzws4bf80O5NnPoMJVRQlt3d6SD4k4P_TZywIFvn9-OKnJiHk1of4P3FSwp75ZxasY7KG38w1TVVud5-iZaFMr6oSD78Yfr0fyAkneUGv51nXu_uOzWf3ydPSevYhzImfT65kYNdwWCQx4HpBUD_QTJDOHgCCRuU2PMpr2y70OGvbCysxIl2B9Tve1imPj9js1pYtt7tAK04QHVaB7CZuUNXRmrHnhkmXYiEwmDGsUoHzjG3gLcrMVaZu6OxqRX-vx9ZUvQyWh3I_22BNTE6xDJMC5QrgkKmFYU_8uNVEJz3lecmVKlTt_ao5f6GZL6gZmwtmdzCTulFCdXGuP8gObfnQO3hlfYODAFJw%3D%3D)_**

Thank you for being such a loyal patriot,

Mike Braun Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Personal link
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria can’t do this work alone. She needs a movement alongside her. And when we receive enough support from small-dollar donors to hit each and every fundraising goal, we can carry out our full strategy to expand our movement and enact progressive change.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211031-2623-header&t=1&akid=2623%2E2526796%2EiLJPxW)
With just hours left before our October fundraising deadline, we’re still short of our important goal to match the $174,249 raised so far by Republicans against Alexandria.
We rely on small-dollar contributions from grassroots supporters like you who believe in the better world Alexandria is fighting for — one that includes a livable climate and wage, and health care for all.
**A $3 contribution from you — especially before tonight’s deadline — would show Republicans and corporate interests that our people-powered movement is stronger than ever. If you’re able, please make your first contribution below using your personal link:**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211031-deadline?refcode=em20211031-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211031-deadline?refcode=em20211031-2623-P_FND_EOM_LNK&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2623_2526796_iLJPxW&akid=2623%2E2526796%2EiLJPxW)
Your contribution will help us prepare for a tough re-election in 2022. Our race was one of the most expensive races in the country last year — Republicans spent more than $10 million trying to unseat Alexandria.
In order to keep Alexandria in Congress fighting to pass the progressive policies needed to lift up working families — policies like a Green New Deal, student loan debt cancellation, a $15 minimum wage and more — we need to raise the early resources now to set a strong foundation for next year’s midterm election.
Alexandria can’t do this work alone. She needs a movement alongside her. And when we receive enough support from small-dollar donors to hit each and every fundraising goal, we can carry out our full strategy to expand our movement and enact progressive change.
**We still have a significant gap in fundraising to fill before tonight’s midnight deadline, but if everyone who is reading this email chips in now we’ll be able to catch up in no time. If you’re able, will you use your personal link below to make a $3 contribution today?**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211031-deadline?refcode=em20211031-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211031-deadline?refcode=em20211031-2623-P_FND_EOM_LNK&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2623_2526796_iLJPxW&akid=2623%2E2526796%2EiLJPxW)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211031-deadline?refcode=em20211031-2623-P_FND_EOM_LNK&t=4&refcode2=2623_2526796_iLJPxW&akid=2623%2E2526796%2EiLJPxW)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211031-2623-P_FND_EOM_LNK&t=5&akid=2623%2E2526796%2EiLJPxW)**

To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

In order to keep Alexandria in Congress fighting to pass the progressive policies needed to lift up working families — policies like a Green New Deal, student loan debt cancellation, a $15 minimum wage and more — we need to raise the early resources now to set a strong foundation for next year’s midterm election. Alexandria can’t do this work alone. She needs a movement alongside her. And when we receive enough support from small-dollar donors to hit each and every fundraising goal, we can carry out our full strategy to expand our movement and enact progressive change. We still have a significant gap in fundraising to fill before tonight’s midnight deadline, but if everyone who is reading this email chips in now we’ll be able to catch up in no time. If you’re able, will you use your personal link below to make a $3 contribution today? Thank you, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Charles Booker
subject: Tonight is practice for 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, Happy Halloween!

I just got back to the house from taking my girls trick-or-treating and
I’ve got to tell you, it’s getting me fired up. Knocking on doors, talking
to folks across Kentucky. That’s how we’re going to win.

I couldn’t be more excited to say hello and get to know as much of my
Kentucky family as possible — and to continue working with y’all in the
coming months to push for a brighter future.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12587?refcode=em20211031-1132&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1132%2E346206%2EBRPops ]Please donate $5 or whatever you can right now to our
campaign and help us reach our goal before the deadline in a few hours.
Every dollar you donate will fund our organizing and voter outreach
efforts — whether that’s knocking on doors or spreading our message all
across the Commonwealth.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12595?refcode=em20211031-1132&t=1021&akid=1132%2E346206%2EBRPops ]Contribute $5

Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is in a matter of hours, and we are
so close to reaching our goal — in fact, my campaign manager Bianca just
texted me and said we were just 2% away from our goal!

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12587?refcode=em20211031-1132&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1132%2E346206%2EBRPops ]So I have a request. Can you chip in $5 before our
midnight deadline?

Thank you for your support,
Peter, and I hope you can treat yourself to a
piece of candy tonight.

Signing off,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211031-1132-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1132_346206_BRPops&akid=1132%2E346206%2EBRPops

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1132%2E346206%2EBRPops

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: over the moon!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | I don't have much time, so I'll be quick:

**I 've been over the moon watching House Democrats slowly but surely catch up to the GOP's massive war chest over the past few months.**

I watched us narrow the gap between us and the Republicans to $7 million in July.

I watched us narrow it to $5 million in August.

And I watched us narrow it to $2 million in September.

**And now, after this month 's final fundraising reports are in, I'm hoping to watch us OVERTAKE them once and for all.**

But please understand: That can't happen without steadfast support from each and every one of my grassroots supporters.

So with just 150 minutes left before my End of Month Deadline at midnight, I'm asking one last time:

Can you chip in $3 to close the gap between my House Democrats and the GOP and defend our House Majority?

| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Chip in $1 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)**

**[Chip in $35 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)**

**[Chip in $50 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/vWPEQ9XD_qf_)**

**[Chip in $100 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)**

**[Chip in $250 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)**

**[Or chip in another amount>>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

Thank you,

Nancy
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45866616&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMDAyMjc4MAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45866616&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMDAyMjc4MAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Team WISGOP
subject: They’re here...
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=halloween_esolicit_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- There’s something spooky going on in Wisconsin. No, there haven’t been any reports of paranormal activity -- but this Halloween, **nothing is scarier than the prospect of Democrats winning in 2022.** **** We already know that this election is going to be close, and ghoulish liberals are going to do everything they can to sway the odds in their favor. Meanwhile, Wisconsinites are being haunted by the impact of Democrats’ insidious policies: historic inflation, disastrous foreign policy consequences, record crime, and a teachers union-first educational agenda. [**Will you help us put a stop to Democrats’ spooky agenda in our Halloween Challenge?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVw5Th_ZxfwZIjGArGzzdi1w2uVvpZxMvQB30gB8qO_C0&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=halloween_esolicit_3&n=2) **Friend, We are looking for 100 patriots to contribute $10.31 by tonight’s monthly deadline to help us put a stop to Democrats’ horror house of far-left policies.** With your help, we can defeat Tony Evers and elect a governor who will work with Republicans in the Legislature to pass policies that help -- not haunt -- Wisconsin families, and we can ensure that we retain our Republican U.S. Senate seat to fight back against a grim future under Joe Biden. | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVw5Th_ZxfwZIjGArGzzdi1w2uVvpZxMvQB30gB8qO_C0&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=halloween_esolicit_3&n=3 "CONTRIBUTE $10.31") [CONTRIBUTE $10.31](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVw5Th_ZxfwZIjGArGzzdi1w2uVvpZxMvQB30gB8qO_C0&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=halloween_esolicit_3&n=3)
---
[**This election is sure to be close, and we need to make sure we have the resources to compete with the Democrats’ coastal elite donors.**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVw5Th_ZxfwZIjGArGzzdi1w2uVvpZxMvQB30gB8qO_C0&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=halloween_esolicit_3&n=4)
****$10.31 may not seem like a lot, but every dollar makes a difference as we start ramping up our field and messaging program ahead of 2022. No, there haven’t been any reports of paranormal activity -- but this Halloween, nothing is scarier than the prospect of Democrats winning in 2022. ** We already know that this election is going to be close, and ghoulish liberals are going to do everything they can to sway the odds in their favor. Meanwhile, Wisconsinites are being haunted by the impact of Democrats’ insidious policies: historic inflation, disastrous foreign policy consequences, record crime, and a teachers union-first educational agenda. Friend, We are looking for 100 patriots to contribute $10.31 by tonight’s monthly deadline to help us put a stop to Democrats’ horror house of far-left policies. With your help, we can defeat Tony Evers and elect a governor who will work with Republicans in the Legislature to pass policies that help -- not haunt -- Wisconsin families, and we can ensure that we retain our Republican U.S. Senate seat to fight back against a grim future under Joe Biden. | "CONTRIBUTE $10.31" $10.31 may not seem like a lot, but every dollar makes a difference as we start ramping up our field and messaging program ahead of 2022. A few days ago, I announced our goal to reach 5,000 individual contributions for the month of October and thanks to this amazing network of grassroots supporters **we only have 47 to go**. I’m grateful knowing that I can always count on this team for support. We’re facing a tough battle ahead with six radical Republican opponents watching our every move. It’s important that we keep generating as much grassroots support as possible, because I know that the strength of this team is unmatched. clean_body: | | | | | Hi Folks, it’s Steve. It’s getting late but I had to reach out to you one last time before tonight’s fundraising deadline at midnight. A few days ago, I announced our goal to reach 5,000 individual contributions for the month of October and thanks to this amazing network of grassroots supporters we only have 47 to go. I’m grateful knowing that I can always count on this team for support. We’re facing a tough battle ahead with six radical Republican opponents watching our every move. It’s important that we keep generating as much grassroots support as possible, because I know that the strength of this team is unmatched. So I have to ask, will you be one of the 47 donors we need to strengthen this campaign and make a contribution of any amount right now? Glad I can count on you, Steve | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: How does dinner with President Trump sound, Peter?

body:
Peter, You don't want to miss your chance... You have the opportunity to eat dinner with President Trump. All you have to do is add your name and you'll automatically be entered to win a chance to dine with President Trump to help us kick off our fight to take back the House in 2022. **[Enter our exclusive contest NOW and have an opportunity to eat dinner with President Trump. >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58659782:JyzRDf2NM:m:1:3253819041:14A1EF4F688C949569FEB3B1740502B9:r)** [**ENTER NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58659782:JyzRDf2NM:m:1:3253819041:14A1EF4F688C949569FEB3B1740502B9:r) [**Pitch in $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58659783:JyzRDf2NM:m:1:3253819041:14A1EF4F688C949569FEB3B1740502B9:r) [**Pitch in $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58659784:JyzRDf2NM:m:1:3253819041:14A1EF4F688C949569FEB3B1740502B9:r) [**Pitch in $150**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58659785:JyzRDf2NM:m:1:3253819041:14A1EF4F688C949569FEB3B1740502B9:r) [**Pitch in $250**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58659786:JyzRDf2NM:m:1:3253819041:14A1EF4F688C949569FEB3B1740502B9:r) We have seen the damage 9 months of Democrats in control can do. We can't afford to let that continue. That's why President Trump and House Conservatives are committed to fighting the radical left NOW. **[Pitch in $25 for your chance to have dinner with President Trump on November 8th in Tampa, Florida. >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58659783:JyzRDf2NM:m:1:3253819041:14A1EF4F688C949569FEB3B1740502B9:r)** Thank you, Kevin McCarthy [You can read the full contest rules here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58659787:JyzRDf2NM:m:1:3253819041:14A1EF4F688C949569FEB3B1740502B9:r) NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution use this form. Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Monday, September 20, 2021, at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Sunday, October 31st, at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, October 31st. One winner will receive the following Prize: transportation for two (2), made at the discretion of the NRCC, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $750; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the Tampa, FL hotels, with an approximate retail value of $275; two (2) tickets to the Countdown to the Majority Dinner, with an approximate retail value of $150 per ticket ($300 total); and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $1,375. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the [Official Rules.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58659788:JyzRDf2NM:m:1:3253819041:14A1EF4F688C949569FEB3B1740502B9:r) The Sponsor is NRCC, 320 First Street, S.E., Washington, D.C. 20003. Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [NRCC.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58659789:JyzRDf2NM:m:1:3253819041:14A1EF4F688C949569FEB3B1740502B9:r) NRCC
320 First St SE
Washington, DC 20003

By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (21818).

NRCC is happy to help at 888-606-1023. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. MessFreqMayVary. Msg&DataRatesMayApply. Message frequency may vary. Terms and Conditions [here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58659790:JyzRDf2NM:m:1:3253819041:14A1EF4F688C949569FEB3B1740502B9:r).[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58659791:JyzRDf2NM:m:1:3253819041:14A1EF4F688C949569FEB3B1740502B9:r)Don't want to receive any more of our emails? body:

| | Derek,

Earlier in this race, National Republicans announced they were pouring millions into Virginia to fund a massive field operation for Glenn Youngkin.

Well, Election Day is tomorrow, and we’re seeing just how big of an impact that investment is having.

**_Derek, Youngkin climbed in the polls. Then the experts at The Cook Political Report moved the race to a toss-up. And right now? Republican enthusiasm is at an all time HIGH._**

This race is as close as it gets. But we have a plan to win — and it involves you.

[**We’re running an historic grassroots field operation, and there’s still plenty of time to connect with voters today to make sure enough folks turn out to cast their ballots tomorrow. But we can’t do that if we don’t have the funds, so I’m asking: will you chip in any amount to my campaign right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38173672/314271636/-2023814932?refcode=20211101.01_TM_10KI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjQ3OTE0ZC1mNjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=73OgswiZ1KV3MdsXY5qPb5NyvM7J0DXl6VLcIAUWVtw=) | | | **[DONATE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38173673/314271637/-2023814932?refcode=20211101.01_TM_10KI&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjQ3OTE0ZC1mNjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=73OgswiZ1KV3MdsXY5qPb5NyvM7J0DXl6VLcIAUWVtw=)**

****
The truth is, in a race this close, money makes a big difference when it comes to turnout.

With more resources, we can send teams of organizers to every single corner of Virginia **TODAY,** send texts to voters with their polling information **TOMORROW,** and build a massive turnout operation so **every voter knows how, when, and where to vote.**

**Glenn Youngkin has already committed to spending $75 million of his own money, now he has the financial backing of the national Republican Party too. If we’re going to match their turnout operation, I’m going to need your help right now.**

[**So, will you help me out today? Your contribution will go directly toward funding the biggest grassroots mobilization effort Virginia has ever seen — and with Election Day coming up tomorrow, this can’t wait.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38173679/314271643/-2023814932?refcode=20211101.01_TM_10KI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjQ3OTE0ZC1mNjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=73OgswiZ1KV3MdsXY5qPb5NyvM7J0DXl6VLcIAUWVtw=)

Terry McAuliffe

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, NOVEMBER 1, 2021 THIRTY-FIVE REPUBLICAN STATE LEGISLATORS ENDORSE MEAGAN HANSON IN GA06 ATLANTA - Today, Meagan Hanson, conservative candidate in Georgia's 6th Congressional District, announced her second round of political endorsements from thirty-five former and current conservative state legislators. Hanson, who has also been [endorsed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZVUlt82_trIKu-eMwfpsdHLfAxLUT9-pPoHUVRht4PHOXC7BE3N5lvxrpEcg-OsExmUN2Jqem9M8RmzIM8vxUVlDc6h4KDoTuKlVpzkRLdzq-oIjMljLMqS9BDkrSwyd3XHM86tDPzPTjSMxHj5n8GiE7dtiUmmkePnTThbbUj0ImMw6E67S8Jr1htBnC_LAj6i6IXc1xu6lNoS-fKiSqFSVtCB7ovf6oKewS7pALW6HQHwVrxD6eQ==&c=drlD1LRjjnwYA7rn9vt6fVvyTSUyHJ7T24RmcgMWFg58J4SyCtm-Pg==&ch=eYJneP2cBLy2_jz57sBBU2m3D-9gp2OFvh_UhhSCEGjxFaW6_ZgMqw==) by Public Service Commission Chairwoman Tricia Pridemore and Commissioner Jason Shaw, has earned more legislative endorsements than any other candidate in her race. "Georgia's conservative leaders are coalescing firmly behind our campaign to take back Georgia's 6th Congressional District," said Meagan. "These Republican officials are men and women I served with in the state legislature and who have seen firsthand that I have the work ethic, vision, and grit necessary to defeat Lucy McBath and restore conservative leadership to Washington. I am tremendously grateful for the confidence they have placed in me - and honored to have such a massive, broad-based coalition of proven conservative leaders working toward a huge victory for Team Meagan and our state in November." The following state legislators have endorsed Meagan Hanson for Congress: Caucus Secretary Bruce Williamson Representative Josh Bonner Representative Wes Cantrell Representative Heath Clark Representative John Corbett Representative Matt Dubnik Representative Terry England Representative Dewayne Hill Representative Don Hogan Representative Penny Houston Representative Todd Jones Representative Tom Kirby Representative Dominic LaRiccia Representative Eddie Lumsden Representative Randy Nix Representative Don Parsons Representative Jesse Petrea Representative Alan Powell Representative Trey Rhodes Representative Jason Ridley Representative Richard Smith Representative Jan Tankersley Representative Sam Watson Representative Bill Werkheiser Representative Rick Williams The following former state legislators have endorsed Meagan Hanson for Congress: Representative Amy Carter Representative Geoff Cauble Representative Buddy Harden Representative Brett Harrell Representative Scott Hilton Representative Chad Nimmer Representative Allen Peake Representative Ed Rynders Representative Tom Taylor Representative Wendell Willard ### Press Contact: media@meaganhanson.com

| | Have we done enough to convince you that this is 2021’s most important race, Derek?

Barack Obama was here. Stacey Abrams was here. Kamala Harris was here. Joe Biden was here. They’re all fired up about this race because they know we need a historic voter turnout to elect Terry McAuliffe.

Look, if Youngkin wins, Trumpism will gain ground and we can expect Youngkins to sprout up in every race across the country next year. If Youngkin wins, extremism wins and Trump’s path back to the White House is crystal clear.

**Election Day is tomorrow, Derek — and we need all hands on deck right now.**

_**[We’re doing everything we can to turn out enough Democrats tomorrow, but we’re going to need your support to finish this race strong. clean_body: What do you think? | | | = | | Have we done enough to convince you that this is 2021’s most important race, Derek? Barack Obama was here. Stacey Abrams was here. Kamala Harris was here. Joe Biden was here. They’re all fired up about this race because they know we need a historic voter turnout to elect Terry McAuliffe. Look, if Youngkin wins, Trumpism will gain ground and we can expect Youngkins to sprout up in every race across the country next year. If Youngkin wins, extremism wins and Trump’s path back to the White House is crystal clear. Election Day is tomorrow, Derek — and we need all hands on deck right now. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Together, we can stop extremism. But it’s going to take all of us. This is where the rubber meets the road. It’s now or never, folks. = Talk soon, Terry =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: THAT’S A LIE

body:
Setting the record straight. I need you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58661871:6HSwPf2jN:m:1:3253819041:FF111C44B221CA3578F6BE9110681C0E:r)
---
Peter,
---
I needed you to hear this _directly_ from me.
---
The media claims that I'm in so much "excruciating" trouble that I'm about to "FLIP" on President Trump.
---
**_That 's a damn LIE._**
---
Here's the truth: President Trump is an innocent man. I didn't turn on him when 7 FBI agents raided my home -- and I'm not betraying him now -- or _EVER._
---
_With the threats against me now on the rise, I have to ask for your help building up my Legal Defense Trust._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as I continue to battle for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58661871:6HSwPf2jN:m:1:3253819041:FF111C44B221CA3578F6BE9110681C0E:r)

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Best Selling Author and Trump Appointee endorses Jake
body:
Nick Adams, “Trump’s favorite” book writer, calls Jake Evans the ‘titan of conservatism’ we need.
---
| | | | | |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Nov. 1, 2021 Contact: (470) 588-2028, news@jakeevans.org
Best Selling Author and Trump Appointee endorses Jake
Nick Adams, "Trump's favorite" book writer, calls Jake Evans the 'titan of conservatism' we need. Best selling author and Trump appointee Nick Adams - popularly coined "President Trump's favorite author" by the New York Times - described Jake as the conservative the 6th District needs to elect in 2022.
"Jake Evans is a titan for conservatism and the exact type of person who we should be electing to office," Adams said. "He's a fighter who won't back down to the socialist left and will always put America First. 2022 will be a battle for the soul of our country and I couldn't think of a better leader to blaze a trail to take back Georgia's 6th District. I am proud to stand with Jake and endorse his campaign."
Adams has penned four best-selling books, including "Trump & Churchill" and "Green Card Warrior," in addition Adams was a presidential appointee in the Trump administration. Adams is the CEO and Founder of the [Foundation for Liberty and American Greatness (FLAG)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gkG-1lBUWv3j9G044CySMf9W7BrGF9ZTzD62pAXApAMQqiLOa46GQkDGcOUAWCmVRZPh3Z2DGUuWJCYEsYJ2P2w6H51sUMTS2u6EjsK--Y2XcIfLMVoK-ZqaDdwR-geNBL0s6Qu_pbE=&c=id9Pgz1hafbAhf18iuzp823WxX_8LBUcdCNfg0y3kfFwygrq6HPOGw==&ch=8u1LDWLbr0596iW87ScxkgYObzQIdSQIi2MTB_x1MRMgjCzh9yWEVg==), a non-profit organization that teaches civics and informs parents and students on the power of the American Dream (Adams' endorsement comes in a personal capacity). The frequent guest on Fox News, Fox Business, and Newsmax also boasts more than 1 million combined followers on social media.
"A legal immigrant himself, Nick embodies the American Dream," Jake said. "Like Nick, I believe we need to fight to protect the American dream and equal opportunity, not expand government overreach that kills innovation and hard work by allegedly promising equal outcomes. I'm honored by his support and thrilled to have Nick's help reaching voters in Georgia's 6th District about my vision for the Great American Comeback."
---

clean_body: Nick Adams, “Trump’s favorite” book writer, calls Jake Evans the ‘titan of conservatism’ we need. | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Nov. 1, 2021 Contact: (470) 588-2028, news@jakeevans.org Best Selling Author and Trump Appointee endorses Jake Nick Adams, "Trump's favorite" book writer, calls Jake Evans the 'titan of conservatism' we need. Best selling author and Trump appointee Nick Adams - popularly coined "President Trump's favorite author" by the New York Times - described Jake as the conservative the 6th District needs to elect in 2022. "Jake Evans is a titan for conservatism and the exact type of person who we should be electing to office," Adams said. "He's a fighter who won't back down to the socialist left and will always put America First. 2022 will be a battle for the soul of our country and I couldn't think of a better leader to blaze a trail to take back Georgia's 6th District. I am proud to stand with Jake and endorse his campaign." Adams has penned four best-selling books, including "Trump & Churchill" and "Green Card Warrior," in addition Adams was a presidential appointee in the Trump administration. Adams is the CEO and Founder of the ==, a non-profit organization that teaches civics and informs parents and students on the power of the American Dream (Adams' endorsement comes in a personal capacity). The frequent guest on Fox News, Fox Business, and Newsmax also boasts more than 1 million combined followers on social media. "A legal immigrant himself, Nick embodies the American Dream," Jake said. "Like Nick, I believe we need to fight to protect the American dream and equal opportunity, not expand government overreach that kills innovation and hard work by allegedly promising equal outcomes. I'm honored by his support and thrilled to have Nick's help reaching voters in Georgia's 6th District about my vision for the Great American Comeback." == == == | | | | Jake Evans for Congress | P.O. body:
Latest poll shows a toss-up!
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38176537/314283459/-2023814932?refcode=20211101.03_TM_10KK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjYwNTVhMy0xMzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GavCeUTs6PkgswZs7YFxWWbOHSNpCAoXhLJdwSopglM=)

| | Derek, I know it’s early, but your support is more urgent than ever right now. Look at this headline from the weekend: **“Virginia governor's race a toss-up as Election Day nears, Post-Schar School poll finds”**
_– The Washington Post, 10/30/2021_ This is all going to come down to voter turnout, Derek — and that’s why your support right now can actually make a huge difference.

_**[We urgently need to get out the vote before polls close tomorrow. Can you donate now to ensure we have the resources we need to compete with Glenn Youngkin on the ground and on the airwaves?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38176547/314283473/-2023814932?refcode=20211101.03_TM_10KK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjYwNTVhMy0xMzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GavCeUTs6PkgswZs7YFxWWbOHSNpCAoXhLJdwSopglM=)**_

Glenn Youngkin’s resources are endless because he’s willing to cut his campaign gigantic checks at a moment’s notice _**(he just wrote himself another one for $3.5 million).**_ It’s clear he’ll spend anything to buy the Governor’s office for himself and Donald Trump.

Look, money isn’t always everything in politics. But in a race that’s as close as this one, it truly does matter. Right now, our grassroots supporters are directly fueling our critical voter mobilization efforts.

**We’re knocking on doors. We’re calling voters. We’re running TV ads. And none of that would be even remotely possible if folks like you weren’t chipping in $25 whenever you can.**

_**[So please, rush a donation to my campaign today to help me protect our democracy and keep Virginia blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38176553/314283478/-2023814932?refcode=20211101.03_TM_10KK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjYwNTVhMy0xMzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GavCeUTs6PkgswZs7YFxWWbOHSNpCAoXhLJdwSopglM=)**_

Thank you for being on my team,

Terry McAuliffe | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38176557/314283485/-2023814932?refcode=20211101.03_TM_10KK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjYwNTVhMy0xMzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GavCeUTs6PkgswZs7YFxWWbOHSNpCAoXhLJdwSopglM=)**

Friend, Tomorrow, with all 100 seats in the House of Delegates on the ballot once again, we _must _protect our Majority so we can secure our Democratic future in Virginia. All of the progress we've made on gun safety, justice reform, and women's reproductive healthcare access could be turned back with the drop of a hat if Democratic voters don't turn out tomorrow. [**Join our fight by making a contribution to our Get Out The Vote fund today so we can turn out every last Democratic voter and win tomorrow!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4qYcfThrLrdwxquysVcgUMS6tZFDjWk7hopnXWIrUtc=/67WvBr_BUbMFlrjQmXUW6mM5YJJEXIVBOjsfsRxjyPY=) Let's secure our progress. This election will decide the future of our Commonwealth, and the eyes of the nation are upon us. **It is in YOUR power to win this election. You can do it, I believe in YOU!** You can win this election, but we have to get out and work. There’s no time to sit on the sidelines. Don’t catch yourself relaxing. We’ve got to get every vote we can, we’ve got to make sure our supporters get out to the polls tomorrow. And if we do this, if YOU do this, by working as hard as you can, get your minivan app downloaded, get your turf assignment and knock it out! Get another turf assignment and knock that out. And another, and another all the way until the polls close, and if you do that, we will win this election, sweep all three statewide offices, expand our majority in the House of Delegates and we will make history again here in Virginia! [**Are you ready to win this? name: NextGen Pennsylvania
subject: Election Day is tomorrow!
body:
Are you ready to vote?

| | Friend, **You’ve got an election 🚨tomorrow!🚨 Are you ready to get out the vote?** **Tomorrow, November 2,**(if you haven’t already voted) your vote will decide Pennsylvania’s next Supreme Court justice. Together we get to create a future for Pennsylvania that represents us — all we need to do is get out the vote. Before the big day, **we want to run through three key points that will help you get ready to vote.** First — do you know where you’ll go to vote tomorrow? [If you’re unsure about where to vote tomorrow or want to double-check, find all the information you need with our polling locator!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38181486/314304858/930249308?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODJmMWJmYy0xYjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0omXTSZr6F7Ioh4sr-aRjEqy7XIeadu5WDJgqVjVIeI=&emci=77cbe762-cd38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=582f1bfc-1b3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6787172) Second — we want to remind you of some times and deadlines to keep in mind for tomorrow. **Voting will take place tomorrow from 7:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m ET. Remember, if you’re in line by 8:00 p.m., you can still vote, even if you don’t get to the voting booth until later.** Third —** ** if you haven't returned your absentee ballot yet, **you can still drop off your completed absentee ballot at your county board of elections office as long as you make it no later than 8:00 p.m. on November 2! ** With this information, you’re ready to go for Election Day! Tomorrow, we get the chance to help build a Pennsylvania that reflects us. **[Act now: Find your polling place so you’ll be ready to vote tomorrow, November 2, for the Pennsylvania Supreme Court justice election.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38181490/314304862/-635834633?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODJmMWJmYy0xYjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0omXTSZr6F7Ioh4sr-aRjEqy7XIeadu5WDJgqVjVIeI=&emci=77cbe762-cd38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=582f1bfc-1b3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6787172)** Thank you, NextGen Pennsylvania

subject: One more day
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Jay Jones
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5HhphlsqP67KvXKlvg5oIG6ONBWnjphf5Re_693Cn8c=/LU2uVrmOCnG0o_1-cQaUwlkjidEdfpdbeLvm72kacjE=)
---
Friend -- Tomorrow's the day we've been working toward, and I would be honored to have your support for re-election. I've been working hard every day to help elect Democrats up and down the ticket, but extreme Republicans will stop at nothing to turn back the clocks on the progress we've made with their divisive rhetoric and lies. We know that if Democrats turn out tomorrow, we will win. It's that simple. But I need your help to make sure we can get out the vote. [**This is going to come down to the wire, which is why I 'm asking directly for your help to make sure we have the resources we need to keep Virginia blue tomorrow.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5HhphlsqP67KvXKlvg5oIG6ONBWnjphf5Re_693Cn8c=/hHtetpmC1IaLaOimgL9p1yr1CyPHnCRVLEhpKm9UBWA=) My commitment to giving a voice to those left behind is unflinching, and we will work tirelessly over the years ahead to make Virginia stronger and more just for every citizen. That starts with keeping our Democratic Majority in the House and securing another statewide sweep tomorrow. **[I hope you will join me in this fight by contributing to our get out the vote efforts today so we can keep our progress going!](https://act.myngp.com/el/5HhphlsqP67KvXKlvg5oIG6ONBWnjphf5Re_693Cn8c=/rjBNuNQiMdhYgw31xuujqnTccuvhGt3CnmJs3HZG6Vs=)** \- Jay Jones **P.S. name: Keystone Progress
subject: We’re proud to endorse Tyler Titus for Erie County Executive.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://www.keystoneprogress.org [https://www.keystoneprogress.org]

Dear Friend,

Keystone Progress Erie Chapter is proud to endorse Dr. Tyler Titus for Erie County Executive.

Keystone Progress is committed to furthering progressive causes and candidates here in Pennsylvania. That’s why we’re supporting candidate Tyler Titus for Erie County Executive ahead of Election Day — Tuesday, November 2 — because Dr. Titus shares our values.

Dr. Titus is an esteemed mental health professional and serves as president of the Erie School Board. Dr. Titus' experience and vision make them more than qualified to become Erie's next County Executive. They are unwavering in their commitment to social equity, justice, and dedicated to ensuring education for all. Unlike their opponent, Dr. Titus has led a life of service as a social worker, foster parent, and in their work on the school board.

Dr. Titus is committed to working from the ground up: to build up local businesses and our county's infrastructure, to prioritize the needs of health care workers, and create more high-quality, well-paying jobs.

We CANNOT let our Elections Department fall into the wrong hands. We need to elect Tyler Titus to ensure that the person who oversees this key department for the next four years isn't someone who believes in the Big Lie and wants to waste time and our money on false audits and conspiracy theories.

We know that Dr. Titus will work tirelessly to transform Erie County and to make it a more progressive, equitable place to live. Please vote for Dr. Tyler Titus for Erie County Executive on Tuesday, November 2.

If you have questions about where and how to vote, click here. [https://eriecountypa.gov/departments/elections-voting/registration-and-voting/]

See you at the polls!

Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress Education Fund

Harrisburg, PA 17108

clean_body: [] Dear Friend, Keystone Progress Erie Chapter is proud to endorse Dr. Tyler Titus for Erie County Executive. Keystone Progress is committed to furthering progressive causes and candidates here in Pennsylvania. That’s why we’re supporting candidate Tyler Titus for Erie County Executive ahead of Election Day — Tuesday, November 2 — because Dr. Titus shares our values. Dr. Titus is an esteemed mental health professional and serves as president of the Erie School Board. Dr. Titus' experience and vision make them more than qualified to become Erie's next County Executive. They are unwavering in their commitment to social equity, justice, and dedicated to ensuring education for all. Unlike their opponent, Dr. Titus has led a life of service as a social worker, foster parent, and in their work on the school board. Dr. Titus is committed to working from the ground up: to build up local businesses and our county's infrastructure, to prioritize the needs of health care workers, and create more high-quality, well-paying jobs. We CANNOT let our Elections Department fall into the wrong hands. We need to elect Tyler Titus to ensure that the person who oversees this key department for the next four years isn't someone who believes in the Big Lie and wants to waste time and our money on false audits and conspiracy theories. We know that Dr. Titus will work tirelessly to transform Erie County and to make it a more progressive, equitable place to live. Please vote for Dr. Tyler Titus for Erie County Executive on Tuesday, November 2. If you have questions about where and how to vote, click here. [] See you at the polls! name: Citizens for Turner
subject: Will you let them buy your vote?
body:
| | | | | |
---
| | | | Friends, I need your help to continue to represent the Miami Valley and keep fighting for you. Help me send a strong message to Nancy Pelosi and the Left: **_They cannot buy our votes and steal our voice in Washington._** Last election cycle, Ohio’s 10th district was a top target. The Left poured **over 2 million dollars in out-of-state money** into the Miami Valley.
---
| | | | | [MY VOTE WON'T BE BOUGHT]()
---
| | | | Thanks to your support, we were able to defeat their attempt to buy a seat in Congress, and now we must do it again. In 2022, the Left will try the same tactic: support a candidate with **millions of out-of-state** **money** in an attempt to buy this seat in Congress. We must be ready to once again protect our community from outsiders looking to buy a Congressional seat.
---
| | | | | [KEEP UP THE FIGHT MIKE]()
---
| | | | Join me and send that same message in 2022. I hope I can count on your continued support. Thank you, Congressman Michael R. Turner
---

name: Jake Evans
subject: We MUST Retire Nancy Pelosi As Speaker
body:
We only need to flip five seats in 2022 to retire...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,
The Republicans only need to flip FIVE seats in 2022 to RETIRE Nancy Pelosi as the Speaker of the House.
CNN, the Soros-funded Indivisible Project, and the DNC have all identified my race in GA-6 as one of the seats that are most likely to flip from blue to red in 2022.

name: Tom Perez
subject: Join me for a Reception in Chevy Chase on November 14!
body:
RSVP to join me on November 14!
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38186169/314326918/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWI0ZjJhYS0yYTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inznazc_z47i6BKbrcDMejuYRBUk3uKg5-6lAVkPFjA=)

Dear Peter,
I wanted to reach out and personally invite you to join me for a**[reception in support of my campaign for Governor of Maryland on Sunday, November 14 at 5:00 PM in Chevy Chase](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38186170/314326919/1743892466?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWI0ZjJhYS0yYTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inznazc_z47i6BKbrcDMejuYRBUk3uKg5-6lAVkPFjA=&emci=50304c93-203b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=89b4f2aa-2a3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837). **With the Ravens on a bye week and a 1 PM kick off for the Washington Football Team, there’s no better way to finish off your Sunday!
I’m running to build a Maryland where everyone has access to a good-paying job, every child can receive a world-class education, small businesses can thrive, and justice is equal for all.
But we still have a long road ahead of us, and I need your help to make my vision for our state a reality. We have an incredible opportunity to flip a Governor’s seat from red to blue in the midterms, so I hope you’ll**[join me on November 14](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38186171/314326920/1743892466?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWI0ZjJhYS0yYTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inznazc_z47i6BKbrcDMejuYRBUk3uKg5-6lAVkPFjA=&emci=50304c93-203b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=89b4f2aa-2a3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837) **to learn more about our campaign.
[**Reception in support of Tom Perez for Maryland**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38186172/314326921/1743892466?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWI0ZjJhYS0yYTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inznazc_z47i6BKbrcDMejuYRBUk3uKg5-6lAVkPFjA=&emci=50304c93-203b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=89b4f2aa-2a3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)
Sunday, November 14, 2021 | 5:00 PM
The Home of Steve Sleigh | Chevy Chase, MD
**[RSVP Here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38186173/314326922/1743892466?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWI0ZjJhYS0yYTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inznazc_z47i6BKbrcDMejuYRBUk3uKg5-6lAVkPFjA=&emci=50304c93-203b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=89b4f2aa-2a3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)**

I have included the invitation with more details below. Please contact Paige Colston if you have any questions or would like to join the Host Committee at**[paige@tomperez.com](mailto:paige@tomperez.com). **
I hope to see you on Sunday, November 14!

All the best,
Tom
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38186174/314326923/-267222762?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWI0ZjJhYS0yYTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inznazc_z47i6BKbrcDMejuYRBUk3uKg5-6lAVkPFjA=&emci=50304c93-203b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=89b4f2aa-2a3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)**
Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer.
Tom Perez for Maryland
PO BOX 5389
TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389
United States

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: From the bottom of my heart, thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hey there,
I wanted to reach out this morning to personally say thank you.
We sent quite a few emails over the past week in order to hit our important October goal, and I’m thrilled to share with you that we crushed it!
Whether you donate, sign a petition, or simply read our emails and stay up to date with what’s going on — every action you take supports our movement in a big way. And I'm extremely grateful for everything you do.
We launched this campaign with one goal in mind, friend: To build a movement that strives for equity and justice for all, powered by working people.
And make no mistake. The thousands of individuals who have chipped in $25, $10, $5, or even just $1 are the reason we’re going to win this race.
I’m running for Senate because I’m fed up with politicians selling out poor and working-class families across this country.
I’ve been there, and I know what it means to be ignored by a government that was supposed to work for us.
So, friend, I can promise you this: As long as I have your support, I won’t stop fighting for us.
The months ahead are going to be critical for building a movement strong enough to win this race next fall, so we've got a lot of work to do.
But with you by my side, I know we have what it takes to go the distance.
Thank you, again, for everything.
Onwards,
Malcolm

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgvgvshq0ac3sbc479a26bq749oqn71p6sie49b0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u4q7ed31emr6ctj36poj4dj1mdir7c35cqr7fc74ssq7ddlgmqr34sln6pjj2o77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0sllcooned9hc1p74phge2p64dji46h22sh2s8i66pj5ctge4pr2cph2bs)
| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zon21vvfhge3ietjh3te306oft4n313681b3pjuo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctge4pr2cph2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1116h68e99nae9q7t9va5sldabbikfjkpr33ak8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctge4pr2cph2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlgjlpler8pblto4sbmudn04sq5c6kcqk6b1e8pg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctge4pr2cph2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Dr. Mary L. Trump
subject: we can choose a better way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
We can choose to fight for Terry McAuliffe, a proven leader who can make tough decisions and get things done for the people he’s elected to serve. We can choose progress, inclusivity, and honesty.
#
Last year, we worked tirelessly to reject Donald Trump’s politics of hate and division.
We stood up for our future and voted for progress.
Now, we’re at a crossroads.
Donald Trump’s candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is appealing to Donald Trump’s base. He’s been endorsed by my uncle eight times. And he’s trafficking in right-wing extremism.
If Glenn Youngkin wins in Virginia, Donald Trump will have all the momentum he needs to launch his 2024 comeback plan.
**But we can choose a better way.**
We can choose to fight for Terry McAuliffe, a proven leader who can make tough decisions and get things done for the people he’s elected to serve. We can choose progress, inclusivity, and honesty.
**[But only if we all do our part. So right now, please split a donation between Terry’s campaign and Jacky Rosen. With the election coming up on Tuesday, Terry needs all hands on deck.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38188712/314338578/1231687126?refcode=jr_em_nd_211101_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmYwOTk5OS0zMzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2cBDMS5PI7R89hUH5k-n_gcWRS0-CEwv1ntZ9NAu_n8=)**
Thank you for being part of this campaign -- now let’s finish strong!
Dr. Mary L. Trump

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38188713/314338580/1231687126?refcode=jr_em_nd_211101_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmYwOTk5OS0zMzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2cBDMS5PI7R89hUH5k-n_gcWRS0-CEwv1ntZ9NAu_n8=)**

body:

| | | Today is the _LAST_ day to vote early. You can vote in person at your Board of Elections from 8am-12pm on Monday, or _**postmark your absentee ballot before your local post office closes**_!!

We’re going to be knocking on doors and making calls all weekend long to **remind Democratic voters and Russo supporters to VOTE by Election Day on Nov. 2!**

name: Karen (personal)
subject: Extended deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Friend --

I just got word that we barely fell short of our end-of-month donor goal last night. My team is extending the deadline through today to help us make up the deficit, so I'm reaching out one final time to ask: will you pitch in $3, or whatever you can, to help us reach our 1,500 donor goal? body:
Republicans have the momentum, Peter.

| Peter, It’s me: Chairman Michael Whatley. I’ve got good news and I’ve got bad news. The good news is that I just got back from a campaign trip to the Battleground State of Virginia, where Republican Nominee for Governor Glenn Youngkin has HUGE momentum heading into tomorrow’s elections. Glenn has proved, undeniably, that voters are fed up with the Left’s efforts to transform our schools and our communities with their “woke” socialism. [ ](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9rDFIRCTiNIn7kFG5En6vZBg04MCJ3hgDIat8ZsIm0Ep2wzCjr5PaPWL23eWw2zz1XS80ooeY9r7jMD7KETIF4McghXvtqnbA3pzVRMn_qFJdnPaNPAeU7jqCWWyRXUVo6kudKLIffS-hajdoeD2DwLT4rm2ksQSQlfl4rwDsvSfROXpMReZPOHp8d49gjN3ANl6N3s-cH7XmyATdDDs5-8UNbozAcKo5NB64TeZssyXUxvQ1DjGAYCtdJwCi-zJe8NKPcxCni7MVlxi0S0KmSXtU50Oy_xDciNjSnsAbbJkj3JMP8H70Pposrj3GZLqDZPCcGMDGTk_IjbFvYkjMLY_7L9ksfiVJBnnztEkkPHA&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=657650219731963314_1&n=1) I believe that the same energy that’s fueling Glenn’s Republican movement in Virginia is also alive in other Battleground States, like North Carolina. But that brings me to the bad news... I’ve been reviewing our October Fundraising numbers, and the fact is that we fell short (way short) of our goals. If we don’t raise another $85,787, there’s no way we’re going to be able to pull together the campaign infrastructure (people, materials, and ads) that we need to win. _That’s why I’m emailing you today, Peter._ **[I’m pleading with you to make a donation of $10 (or more) to help us close the gap. I’ve extended our Fundraising Deadline until 11:59 PM TONIGHT to give us one final shot at hitting our numbers, but I can’t do it without your help. Can I count on you?](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9rDFIRCTiNIn7kFG5En6vZBg04MCJ3hgDIat8ZsIm0EpogKZYITdW7CDw0pI8cbgoZq_6SKzKX-eaKndio9fjVESumCxBoXLh2lDHtEK4bKLxcIFmiUhPQhsbhCzLO2BQFTa8M2vQXFRPU-lJIx_u_EPOAQH-n6fhT1QPlhoVdEYboXl5Z1-gZkBSBNJTEdWkEoexm6301vFfjEzFoYza1T53upYAvj4XcBmFu7OBGfLLnlQPCnHPQ4aKgaDOleLpvRsyKJCGpwkvbtFPiQ7UMGIBrhPCPIYPMXrpz_vYwf9atgYigCHpyvhNXOXsFMh2vG6EpppAEUARwxyGBNUYlCXnBFufYZqn9u1YNcABiAY&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=657650219731963314_1&n=2)** | | [Contribute Now](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9rDFIRCTiNIn7kFG5En6vZBg04MCJ3hgDIat8ZsIm0ErXnfg-LivaCCF03ELtqFXPiBGO9hVh9SydcPlwEt5znXhDKjCruWhpe2TGhoQiu1wcRwMrnqr6xwfH81RmuCwkr9oMPFj9w7xZtxbvpbGzfGMaJbJqwr0o75eIKgQfkkiP6lmmEnXTlnzAkxiWH4F1EJFiFFmPbT8ZWAGzh0-nbzW79YIXntgKmFZGyP2e515AglQSiXVufAHBO3SSSnCX7EKSkjeSau6U8erTuU62N3_EUs_XQwq9n0cHIHlC3xXKRpylAxq6N1As8FXHLhRZZVFTWNDF7AqEzAwpuNROtAaATiIRUDcQ5AzLjVURja31JC1okCQBkPadzI6r44v4&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=657650219731963314_1&n=3)

Momentum is on our side, Peter. I can feel it.
_Now, it’s up to us to seize the moment._
[Please rush a contribution of $10 or more before 11:59 PM TONIGHT, Peter. As a Top Republican in Englewood, FL, I’m counting on you to step up and do your part.](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9rDFIRCTiNIn7kFG5En6vZBg04MCJ3hgDIat8ZsIm0Eqd58usFLoZ2JL5Qr01NcAdsGMYNfDyP0DQ96tZyMETEa2mS1XM3_UjGYUlTRr2oHR5bhj_sWQV5qsp2tz5ZlTmr-H8T3FNVWHzV034NZpEOIXDXd6h5nr0cNEK3Cn8bGOaNuC6dmxODgpx1xMAGukgEJrw7bLtnyVES2r1F4MQV4P2dnG2ORm0p5oebtshDSlJKLOQpth_SMr8qq36QWg6CNVy8Qxyu767gQcttYXhEbKagjpQi1-evFuyCJrhKRd_ZzpsvCusrxnJWMkUEVQthsLzMpuvAe3V9vPLTEjbQkSBXw_57pI1JSyUSpeCEpQ&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=657650219731963314_1&n=4)

| | Last year, we worked tirelessly to reject Donald Trump’s politics of hate and division. We stood up for our future and voted for progress. Now, we’re at a crossroads. Donald Trump’s candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is appealing to Donald Trump’s base. He’s been endorsed by my uncle eight times. And he’s trafficking in right-wing extremism. If Glenn Youngkin wins in Virginia, Donald Trump will have all the momentum he needs to launch his 2024 comeback plan. **But folks, we can choose a better way.** We can choose to fight for Terry McAuliffe, a proven leader who can make tough decisions and get things done for the people he’s elected to serve. Now, we’re at a crossroads. Donald Trump’s candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is appealing to Donald Trump’s base. He’s been endorsed by my uncle eight times. And he’s trafficking in right-wing extremism. If Glenn Youngkin wins in Virginia, Donald Trump will have all the momentum he needs to launch his 2024 comeback plan. But folks, we can choose a better way. We can choose to fight for Terry McAuliffe, a proven leader who can make tough decisions and get things done for the people he’s elected to serve.
