name: Eden at Barrier to Entry PAC
subject: My personal note before Election Day
body:
this is long, but I wanted to share...

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38189086/314340838/1300596418?refcode=2211101_FR_edenelectionbenediction_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxZmExYjI5LTM1M2ItZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r5UoQbNayoquswIfzG7lQLmIDOtnYS3j5WQlIGRU9Pw=)
---
Dear Supporters,

I’ve been knocking on doors for the Democratic Party since I was eight years old, and campaigning is now my profession. Much of my life is measured and marked by political campaigns. Over time, I’ve developed Election Day rituals and habits. You won’t hear from me often, I prefer to work behind the scenes, but I wanted to share a bit of it with you.

On Election Night eve, after putting up yard signs at polling locations, I get home to go to bed early. I lay out my clothes and shower the night before (which I never do) so I can wake up and be ready to go at 4 am.

I make sure I have extra hair ties and a brush, a toothbrush and toothpaste, extra socks/underwear/tee-shirt, phone and laptop chargers, and an extra battery pack— just in case there’s a recount (this has only happened once but it forever changed me and now I’m paranoid).

I text my mom and dad and grandma and thank them for always supporting me and my candidates. I text my friends who are also on races, “love you,” “break a leg,” and “see you on the other side.”

I call my candidate and my team to see how they are feeling and tell them no matter what, we left it all on the table, that I’m so proud of them, of us. “We’ve got this, we’re almost there.”

The morning of, I drink a cup of watery black coffee and I eat a glazed donut, which also I never do. (I think it’s just what is typically available in the wee hours of Election Day morning.)

Before any of that though, I have a still moment with myself. I don’t go looking for it, and it’s never planned.

Yesterday, Sunday on the brightest, sunniest fall day, in what were once white running shoes, now covered in layers of dirt, I tapped my way up the cement steps of a yellow ranch-style home in Dayton, Ohio. Shonetta answered the door. I wished her a happy Sunday, as one does, and asked her if she had a plan to vote on Tuesday. She did. She told me she plans to go in person before work on Tuesday.

I asked her if she had a few minutes to talk to me about Shenise. She did.

In the span of two and a half minutes at the most, between a porch door screen and two masks, we shared a lot.

I asked her what she thought about policing in Dayton. She told me she was worried about a lack of accountability, transparency, progress. “What has changed?”

We shook our heads. I reminded her that Dayton was the last major city in the state of Ohio to mandate the usage of body cameras in the police force. I told her that the Democrats in charge in Dayton are too afraid to be bold— that much is clear.**And I told her that Shenise is a candidate willing to take courageous action.**

Not a single elected official or politician in Dayton, a city that is 40% Black, has stuck their neck out on policing issues.

Except for Shenise.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38189087/314340840/1300596418?refcode=2211101_FR_edenelectionbenediction_IMG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxZmExYjI5LTM1M2ItZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r5UoQbNayoquswIfzG7lQLmIDOtnYS3j5WQlIGRU9Pw=) When Clifford Owensby, a Black paraplegic man, __was dragged out of his car by his hair__ , not a single elected official in Ohio could be bothered to comment on it.

For weeks, no one said a word. Local news would not cover it. Except for Shenise, who beat the drum **so hard** that the [Washington Post](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38189088/314340841/440798255?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxZmExYjI5LTM1M2ItZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r5UoQbNayoquswIfzG7lQLmIDOtnYS3j5WQlIGRU9Pw=&emci=959e24ce-1f3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f1fa1b29-353b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=17300922), [Newsweek](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38189089/314340842/-356711783?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxZmExYjI5LTM1M2ItZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r5UoQbNayoquswIfzG7lQLmIDOtnYS3j5WQlIGRU9Pw=&emci=959e24ce-1f3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f1fa1b29-353b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=17300922), and other national outlets picked up the story, forcing local outlets to eventually write about it, too.

Today, standing in the sunshine with Shonetta, I felt it— the quiet understanding of why I am here, once again, asking a stranger for a vote the Sunday before Election Day.

It’s because of Shenise, and people like her who never quit fighting, who stand up after being knocked down, who make us believe we can do better.

And in that quiet space on Shonetta’s front porch, I felt **this community** with me, too, this army of people, people who exist behind an email address, whose faces I’ll likely never see.

Michael who gives $1 on every email; Ellen who gave $100 early on; Mohammed who chipped in $5; Nadia and Keegan who give $3 and $5 recurring; Sam who gives $15 at a time; I thought of all of you.

Thank you, truly, for all you have done to support Barrier To Entry PAC. Thank you for lifting up Shenise.

The last thing I do before I hit the polls on Election Day is I say a mantra to myself to shake off the nerves, and center myself for the exhausting day to come.

Here’s tomorrow’s mantra:

**_I hope it’s a week where the average voter believes she can make a difference. And hope it’s a week where our candidate knows, fervently, that she belongs._** **[Now for the ask — because your support is so critical to continue propelling our movement and elevating our working-class candidates. Will you make a donation today as we gear up and build momentum for tomorrow’s big Election Day?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38189091/314340844/-2038882143?refcode=2211101_FR_edenelectionbenediction_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxZmExYjI5LTM1M2ItZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r5UoQbNayoquswIfzG7lQLmIDOtnYS3j5WQlIGRU9Pw=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **______[DONATE TODAY >> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38189094/314340846/1300596418?refcode=2211101_FR_edenelectionbenediction_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxZmExYjI5LTM1M2ItZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r5UoQbNayoquswIfzG7lQLmIDOtnYS3j5WQlIGRU9Pw=)** See you on the other side, **_Eden_**

"https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bte-mnc-email?refcode=2211101_FR_edenelectionbenedictionBEL&refcode2=EL100&express_lane=true&amount=100")********************_**
---|---|---|---

**BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space.** _****Pitch in today to help provide necessary support and resources for working class candidates today! >>****_ **______[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38189114/314340866/1300596418?refcode=2211101_FR_edenelectionbenediction_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxZmExYjI5LTM1M2ItZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r5UoQbNayoquswIfzG7lQLmIDOtnYS3j5WQlIGRU9Pw=)**

Not a single elected official or politician in Dayton, a city that is 40% Black, has stuck their neck out on policing issues. Except for Shenise. = When Clifford Owensby, a Black paraplegic man, was dragged out of his car by his hair , not a single elected official in Ohio could be bothered to comment on it. For weeks, no one said a word. Local news would not cover it. Except for Shenise, who beat the drum so hard that the , , and other national outlets picked up the story, forcing local outlets to eventually write about it, too. Today, standing in the sunshine with Shonetta, I felt it— the quiet understanding of why I am here, once again, asking a stranger for a vote the Sunday before Election Day. It’s because of Shenise, and people like her who never quit fighting, who stand up after being knocked down, who make us believe we can do better. And in that quiet space on Shonetta’s front porch, I felt this community with me, too, this army of people, people who exist behind an email address, whose faces I’ll likely never see. Michael who gives $1 on every email; Ellen who gave $100 early on; Mohammed who chipped in $5; Nadia and Keegan who give $3 and $5 recurring; Sam who gives $15 at a time; I thought of all of you. Thank you, truly, for all you have done to support Barrier To Entry PAC. Thank you for lifting up Shenise. The last thing I do before I hit the polls on Election Day is I say a mantra to myself to shake off the nerves, and center myself for the exhausting day to come. Here’s tomorrow’s mantra: I hope it’s a week where the average voter believes she can make a difference. And hope it’s a week where our candidate knows, fervently, that she belongs. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __= See you on the other side, Eden ************ ********** ****************EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier to Entry PAC**************** ****************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:**************** | ****************= ""**************** | ****************= ""**************** | ****************= ""**************** | ****************= ""**************** ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space. **Pitch in today to help provide necessary support and resources for working class candidates today! >> ____= | || || Barrier To Entry PAC PO Box 6623 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States | |

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38189152/314340961/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2ZhMWIyOS0zNTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVoArabWk0E_uOOeVFtj-JjZnkkmLvh_iuXQVovFfr0=&emci=96f4a579-f138-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=dcfa1b29-353b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=23594672) | |

Peter, I messaged you last week about why we need to pass the Build Back Better Agenda. Now, I want to talk about why this is personal for me and so many Americans.

As a working mother, I know how hard it can be to balance raising children and pursuing a career. When my daughter was born, I had to return to work two weeks after I gave birth. This was devastating for me, both physically and emotionally. Our struggles as a family didn’t stop there. As our children grew older, we realized how expensive and inaccessible childcare was. My husband and I worked opposite shifts for years so we could take care of the kids.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38189154/314340962/-804235033?refcode=em1101&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2ZhMWIyOS0zNTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVoArabWk0E_uOOeVFtj-JjZnkkmLvh_iuXQVovFfr0=)
Nearly three-quarters of GA-14 is considered a childcare desert. We don’t have enough facilities and workers to provide accessible and affordable childcare. Childcare deserts often result in women being kept out of the workforce, as well as denying our children opportunities to get ahead. This is something that affects most families in Northwest Georgia, and I will fight in Washington to ensure no family or child gets left behind.

Let’s get to work and pass legislation that helps give our children the opportunity they deserve.**[I promise I will fight for working class families when I am in Congress, can you donate $15 to help me get there?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38189157/314340964/-804235033?refcode=em1101&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2ZhMWIyOS0zNTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVoArabWk0E_uOOeVFtj-JjZnkkmLvh_iuXQVovFfr0=)**

Keep fighting,
Holly McCormack
|

name: American Update
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8939%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=P%2bFvhMHVXo6K6F11c4sOBw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17574%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fjrVwKhdbZQRINyE6z7cRw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17585%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ItQLhQC5WiCRcl6%2fPXCEQw&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17586%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LOUFMGyo8MHNkRSy3YKCAA&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8939%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=P%2bFvhMHVXo6K6F11c4sOBw&sysid=1)_

subject: I appreciate you, friends

body:
Thank you for everything.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38191396/314345890/1761773496?refcode=211101_CLTV_eomthx_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjYxOGM4NS0zNzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aoSs1r7l2ZVazjSNjDUR0QzJ63MNftmWt1YCGL9zw1Q=)

Hello Somebody!

November is here, and that means the 2022 midterm elections are swiftly approaching. So I wanted to take a moment to reach out and let you know that _**I appreciate you.**_

In just the past couple of weeks since launching this movement, you have shown me that you are more eager than ever to continue our righteous fight for justice together.

**The American people are tired of the status quo, friends.** We deserve better than what we are getting right now. We deserve universal healthcare, paid leave, clean water, clean air, clean food.

We must have the courage to go _beyond,_ not get “back to normal.” And that’s why we’re mobilizing, organizing, and building a coalition that will shake the ground and put pressure on our elected leaders to deliver on their promises for the poor, working, and barely middle-class people of this country.

_**YOU**_ **are the most vital component to our success.** Thank you for all that you do. With your help, we successfully hit our end-of-month fundraising goal yesterday. And I am so looking forward to growing this movement with you. Because only together can we achieve the change that we must demand.******** ******** Now, let's get to work. ******Nina Turner******

clean_body: Thank you for everything. | | | = Hello Somebody! November is here, and that means the 2022 midterm elections are swiftly approaching. So I wanted to take a moment to reach out and let you know that I appreciate you. In just the past couple of weeks since launching this movement, you have shown me that you are more eager than ever to continue our righteous fight for justice together. The American people are tired of the status quo, friends. We deserve better than what we are getting right now. We deserve universal healthcare, paid leave, clean water, clean air, clean food. We must have the courage to go beyond, not get “back to normal.” And that’s why we’re mobilizing, organizing, and building a coalition that will shake the ground and put pressure on our elected leaders to deliver on their promises for the poor, working, and barely middle-class people of this country. YOU are the most vital component to our success. Thank you for all that you do. With your help, we successfully hit our end-of-month fundraising goal yesterday. And I am so looking forward to growing this movement with you. body:

#
Derek, Just hours remain until the Election Day polls open in Virginia’s dead heat gubernatorial race between Donald Trump-endorsed Republican candidate Glenn Youngkin and former Virginia Gov. Terry McAuliffe. With time short and so much on the line, I’ll keep this brief. But know that in a moment I’m going to ask you to make a critical donation in these final hours. Republicans are dead set on flipping Virginia after Democrats spent the past four years winning back the governor’s mansion and both chambers of the state legislature. Not to mention, Donald Trump is desperate for a win to set the stage for a political comeback with his 2024 presidential campaign. Our Democratic victories in Virginia’s 2017 race — the first after Trump’s election — were part of building the momentum to flip 41 seats in the House and hand the Speaker’s gavel back to Nancy Pelosi after the 2018 midterms. Not only that, they also created the momentum to retake the White House and Senate. Trump knows all of this. The success of Terry McAuliffe’s campaign for Virginia governor could determine what’s to come in the 2022 midterm elections, which is why it’s absolutely imperative Terry not fall short and hand the momentum to Republicans — who would love nothing more than to pave the way for retaking the House and Senate in 2022. **Derek, there’s still time to invest in turning out Democratic voters and your contribution could give Terry his winning margin. This headline is super alarming.

The National Republican Congressional Committee announced their first round of “On the Radar” candidates as part of the Youngs Guns program -- and guess who made the list? One of our opponents -- far-right, Trump-endorsed candidate Anna Paulina Luna.

The last thing Fl-13 needs is a representative that's beholden to the gun industry, rather than the people. This is much bigger than just a surface-level issue. Our opponent cozying up to special interests in the gun industry means that we can kiss any sort of sensible gun safety reform legislation goodbye.

Far too often, an act of senseless gun violence takes the lives of innocent people across the nation. This cannot continue.

**That's why we're stepping up our game for this end-of-month fundraiser -- with an ambitious goal of $13,000. Michele's the candidate beholden to the people and running a grassroots campaign -- unlike Anna Paulina Luna, who's clearly beholden to the gun industry first and foremost.**

Unfortunately, gun violence is a _uniquely_ American problem.

Here in the U.S., we have the highest number of guns per person of any country in the world, and one of the world's highest rates of gun violence internationally.

**The last thing we need is a representative like Anna Paulina Luna, who has no interest in ending it. The last thing we need is a representative like Anna Paulina Luna, who's getting cozy with gun groups like the NRA. The last thing we need is a representative like Anna Paulina Luna -- full stop.**

What we do need is a representative like Michele -- a representative that is beyond dedicated to ending the gun violence epidemic. She's ready to invest directly in our communities, reform our approaches to public safety, and is fighting tirelessly to keep guns out of our schools, movie theatres, and the countless other spaces that guns have no place in.

With reasonable, responsible, and compassionate representatives, we can end the epidemic of violence. We can keep our people safe. We do this by getting Michele to Congress.

clean_body: | = Peter, We wanted to make sure you saw our email on Friday...because the fact of the matter is this far-right opponent of ours is beyond dangerous. Dangerous to our district and a part of the bigger Republican threat against our democracy as we know it. We can't afford to not ask for your help here, Peter. We need Michele in office -- because her entire career has been dedicated to public service, and she'll ensure that our democracy works for every person. Electing Michele to Fl-13 means electing a representative that's here to defend our democracy, not destroy it. = = = Thank you, MicheleForFlorida.com = \----------Forwarded Message---------- Date: October 29, 2021 @ 11:32 a.m. ET From: Team Rayner Subject: Kiss gun safety goodbye | = This headline is super alarming. The National Republican Congressional Committee announced their first round of “On the Radar” candidates as part of the Youngs Guns program -- and guess who made the list? One of our opponents -- far-right, Trump-endorsed candidate Anna Paulina Luna. The last thing Fl-13 needs is a representative that's beholden to the gun industry, rather than the people. This is much bigger than just a surface-level issue. Our opponent cozying up to special interests in the gun industry means that we can kiss any sort of sensible gun safety reform legislation goodbye. Far too often, an act of senseless gun violence takes the lives of innocent people across the nation. This cannot continue. That's why we're stepping up our game for this end-of-month fundraiser -- with an ambitious goal of $13,000. Michele's the candidate beholden to the people and running a grassroots campaign -- unlike Anna Paulina Luna, who's clearly beholden to the gun industry first and foremost. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Unfortunately, gun violence is a uniquely American problem. With reasonable, responsible, and compassionate representatives, we can end the epidemic of violence. We can keep our people safe. We do this by getting Michele to Congress. = \-- Team Rayner = = *

name: NH Republican State Committee
subject: Test Scores at Manchester Schools are even worse than we thought
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Test scores have dropped sharply under Mayor Joyce Craig
Derek,
Under the failed leadership of Mayor Joyce Craig, Manchester schools have been on a track towards catastrophic failure.
Since taking office, test scores for students at Manchester's schools have plunged. Now, less than one in five of our third grade students is reading at an appropriate level.
That's simply unacceptable.
[We need new leadership, to fix the disaster Joyce Craig has created. ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-republican-state-committee-manchester-victory-fund%2Fdonate-today/1/0100017cdbc669da-ef3d8b62-ec5e-481e-bafc-e81b3df2bc8f-000000/GShwFOswqKpMwap5RkkLKf3AqM4=242)
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-republican-state-committee-manchester-victory-fund%2Fdonate-today/2/0100017cdbc669da-ef3d8b62-ec5e-481e-bafc-e81b3df2bc8f-000000/xQup7QfW7OEjAGnwhTHQrZ4f1rI=242)
Manchester's Public Charter schools are thriving, while those under the oversight of Mayor Joyce Craig are failing to meet even the most basic needs of student.
The problem isn’t Manchester students or families but the absolute failure of the Manchester School District, led by Mayor Joyce Craig.
Help us hold her accountable for her destructive track-record.
[Please make a donation to help support Republican candidate Victoria Sullivan.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-republican-state-committee-manchester-victory-fund%2Fdonate-today/3/0100017cdbc669da-ef3d8b62-ec5e-481e-bafc-e81b3df2bc8f-000000/7zuP3_k2Jt-_1yhRTdAAgHGzA8I=242)
Tomorrow is election day. If you are a Manchester resident, make sure you have a plan to VOTE.

name: American Defense News
subject: Help us fight socialism
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc08h3k1o57iljpih8jafth7s70do0agvu6dhee0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp66djie1gbac5jclo68pdl6qqm4t1ichqb0t3ieeonaddgsdgrfdjj64rj3c5gcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imlj32tpl6hjreo3664ob4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6cljm1o70s1hm49fg)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbcppr7414m4g18tcmrqidqif0kldsvhgc5gkcdo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctge1o70cdh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqjc372t2olmpj8rte7sk55o5f76h8oj3eh8bqlg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctge1o70cdh2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjio9jti3j1mulibmqr33gu5n6ajrfhfpcmajid8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctge1o70cdh2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

| Peter,

Thank you. I know we sent you a lot of emails in this final push before our end-of-month deadline, but thanks to supporters like you— **we met our October goal.**

By meeting this fundraising goal, you’ve reconfirmed to my team and me that Marylanders and people across the country are enthusiastic about our historic campaign. And now that we’ve made it to November, I know this next month is going to be full of opportunities to build upon our ever-increasing campaign momentum and grow our progressive movement.

**But, right now, all eyes are on Virginia as the fate of their governor’s race is at stake tomorrow on Election Day.** The results of this election will have a major impact on the Mid-Atlantic region, and we have to step up to help our Virginia neighbors.

[_**Terry McAuliffe needs our support right now. The latest polls show this race is neck and neck, and we must do everything we can to stop Trumpism from spreading so close to home. clean_body: You’ve reconfirmed to my team and me that people across the country are enthusiastic about our historic campaign. | = | Peter, Thank you. I know we sent you a lot of emails in this final push before our end-of-month deadline, but thanks to supporters like you— we met our October goal. By meeting this fundraising goal, you’ve reconfirmed to my team and me that Marylanders and people across the country are enthusiastic about our historic campaign. And now that we’ve made it to November, I know this next month is going to be full of opportunities to build upon our ever-increasing campaign momentum and grow our progressive movement. But, right now, all eyes are on Virginia as the fate of their governor’s race is at stake tomorrow on Election Day. The results of this election will have a major impact on the Mid-Atlantic region, and we have to step up to help our Virginia neighbors. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for being a valued member of this movement, John King Democrat for Governor of Maryland * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, visit his . name: National Republican Polling
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmd5unr4p8onq2jq4nnkcptpaoj3icp0i0s7gumo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctge9or6cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmoudp71nipiuqcaaolocvsoakad7abludo862jo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctge9or6cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0vmuqk97c6sl9ckodst920a98eu4usqab6tkpag_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctge9or6cjh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Friend,

I just came out of a meeting with my fundraising team, and they told me some bad news - we aren’t on pace to hit our final fundraising goal. _If we don’t meet this deadline, we will have to say Terry McAuliffe won, and Election Day Victory is not looking promising._

Once the clock hits midnight tonight, we’ll have to start making some tough decisions.

_**I need you to dig deep in these last couple of hours. We are SO CLOSE, and I believe we can still pull this off, but I need your help.**_

**We’re so close to the finish line. I just need one final push to come out victorious. We are so close to turning Virginia Red, creating jobs, and standing up for families, students, and parents.**

I’m making this one final request, and I hope you won’t let me down.

**[RUSH DONATION HERE: https://secure.winred.com/youngkin-for-governor-individual](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z48korbu15bo40jqi7rj9ib7nrqqqmh60m5dehb0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctge9or1clh2bs)**

Thank you for all of your support.

Let’s win this!

name: Team Collier
subject: A robust energy grid that Texans can actually depend on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Here’s the deal, friend. With record temperatures, flooding, snow storms, and heatwaves getting worse each year, it’s simply unacceptable that Governor Abbott and Lt. Governor Patrick have done nothing to fix the damn grid. Abbott and Patrick are working day-and-night to make sure Texans cannot hold them accountable for their repeated failures. **Let’s face it: Without a reliable grid, we will lose jobs, and more importantly, we will lose lives. And in a state regularly subject to extreme weather plus years of Republican negligence, our grid is extremely vulnerable.** We have the opportunity to invest in a robust energy grid that Texans can actually depend on, but our leaders are caving to corporate interests that profit off our unreliable rickety grid. So it’s on us to hold them accountable. **[We need to turn up the heat on Greg Abbott and Dan Patrick to address the power grid crisis immediately. Sign on to our petition demanding Texas leadership prioritize the climate crisis and fix the damn grid.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38197703/314357643/1816098008?refcode=AU_MC_EG_REA_PET_AC_202111_PM1_V1_SR7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODAyZDQ2Ni00MDNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9XH5oSTl0J7tFiNFChMvKKm0anJpehrBI3lQgBS-xuU=&emci=c0dd3115-783a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=6802d466-403b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=7689298)** | [SIGN OUR PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38197704/314357644/1816098008?refcode=AU_MC_EG_REA_PET_AC_202111_PM1_V1_SR7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODAyZDQ2Ni00MDNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9XH5oSTl0J7tFiNFChMvKKm0anJpehrBI3lQgBS-xuU=&emci=c0dd3115-783a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=6802d466-403b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=7689298)

subject: Thank you...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
...Now let’s go vote!! | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38197871/314358672/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjJlNDlkYy00MTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLNV32HLW5kOf9_2F-5bPt4gkcjIO55zXJaLbxTByxs=&emci=3c7b3914-3a3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4b2e49dc-413b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=561582) | Friend, From all of us here at The Fairness Project, we wanted to say thank you for helping us reach our end-of-month fundraising goals. **You really came through, and we appreciate every last contribution made in support of this movement.** Whether you donated $1 or $50, just know that your donation helps us run powerful ballot measure campaigns that change lives. Now that October is over, we wanted to make sure you have what you need to get out the vote on Election Day. **We have 3 ballot measure campaigns on the ballot tomorrow, and friend, we could really use your help. **
* In Tucson, AZ, our friends are [_fighting to raise the minimum wage to $15 by passing Proposition 206._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38197872/314358673/-1518325090?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjJlNDlkYy00MTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLNV32HLW5kOf9_2F-5bPt4gkcjIO55zXJaLbxTByxs=&emci=3c7b3914-3a3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4b2e49dc-413b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=561582)
* In Cleveland, OH, our friends at [_Citizen for a Safer Cleveland are demanding policing accountability through Issue 24._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38197873/314358674/-2093947905?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjJlNDlkYy00MTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLNV32HLW5kOf9_2F-5bPt4gkcjIO55zXJaLbxTByxs=&emci=3c7b3914-3a3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4b2e49dc-413b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=561582)
* And our friends in Austin, TX are [_campaigning to defeat Proposition A_ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38197874/314358675/-600556474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjJlNDlkYy00MTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLNV32HLW5kOf9_2F-5bPt4gkcjIO55zXJaLbxTByxs=&emci=3c7b3914-3a3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4b2e49dc-413b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=561582)— a disastrous anti-police reform ballot measure that would re-allocate taxpayer dollars from essential services like EMS and firefighters in order to hire 800 more officers to the Austin Police Department.

**If you live in Tucson, Austin, or Cleveland, please make sure to vote tomorrow for these powerfully important ballot measures!**_If you don’t live in one of these three cities, we still need your help! Please spread the word to your social channels about these campaigns and help us get out the vote ahead of Election Day tomorrow! _ Thank you for your help, The Fairness Project

clean_body: ...Now let’s go vote!! | | Friend, From all of us here at The Fairness Project, we wanted to say thank you for helping us reach our end-of-month fundraising goals. You really came through, and we appreciate every last contribution made in support of this movement. Whether you donated $1 or $50, just know that your donation helps us run powerful ballot measure campaigns that change lives. Now that October is over, we wanted to make sure you have what you need to get out the vote on Election Day. We have 3 ballot measure campaigns on the ballot tomorrow, and friend, we could really use your help. In Tucson, AZ, our friends are In Cleveland, OH, our friends at And our friends in Austin, TX are — a disastrous anti-police reform ballot measure that would re-allocate taxpayer dollars from essential services like EMS and firefighters in order to hire 800 more officers to the Austin Police Department. If you live in Tucson, Austin, or Cleveland, please make sure to vote tomorrow for these powerfully important ballot measures!If you don’t live in one of these three cities, we still need your help! Please spread the word to your social channels about these campaigns and help us get out the vote ahead of Election Day tomorrow! Thank you for your help, The Fairness Project = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at The Fairness Project has won 20 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 17 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. # It's time to get your ballots in!
---
Recent reports show that the number of ballots returned by Republicans in this week's election is low - only 16% as of this moment. It's time to get your ballots in.
No matter what your views are on the election system, it is critical that you vote. This year, school board elections are a critical fight to restore sanity to the school system and protect our children from the insane ideologies of the radical Left; simply put, our children's futures are at stake. We must ensure that we elect good people at every level of government who will stand against an extreme Leftist agenda.
Additionally, there are extremely meaningful ballot initiatives this year which would cut property taxes, ensuring greater transparency to Colorado's government spending. Your voice must be heard this election cycle. Do not cede this election to the radical Left--please vote!
A year from now you will be preparing to return your ballot electing me to the U.S. Senate.
Yet we have a long road ahead of us and I need your support now. While the radical Left is driving us into Socialism, I will stand against the rising tide of tyranny and fight for your freedom.
Please donate and join our cause.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Bernie said hold the line in September
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, our email
below is from a month ago. And the same message is relevant today because
corporate Democrats, Wall Street, and fossil fuel CEOs are still trying to
defeat progress.

The establishment has torn out important parts of the Build Back Better
Act, but we cannot allow big corporations, Big Oil, and Wall Street to
win. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81512?refcode=em20211101-20275&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=20275%2E1203867%2E6i9Efx ]If you’re down to keep holding the line with us for climate
action, investments in childcare, pre-K, and housing AND want to elect
more Justice Democrats to win more progressive policies, donate right now
to fuel our fight.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81512?refcode=em20211101-20275&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=20275%2E1203867%2E6i9Efx ]Contribute

Thank you,

Team JD

-----Forwarded Message-----
Date September 29, 2021
From: JusticeDemocrats.com
Subject: Bernie says hold the line

Peter,

Conservative Democrats and corporate lobbyists are trying to BLOCK all
progressive policies. Joe Manchin, Kyrsten Sinema, Henry Cuellar, Wall
Street, Big Pharma, Big Tech, Big Oil...the list goes on — they all have
one thing in common: They don’t want Democrats to expand Medicare, address
climate change, increase corporate tax rates, and provide universal pre-K
and community college.

Justice Democrats and Bernie Sanders are holding the line. They won’t let
conservatives pass their Republican-backed infrastructure bill UNLESS the
$3.5 trillion spending bill is passed along with it. Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, Rashida Tlaib, Bernie Sanders, and others are
using their power to win progressive priorities. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81512?refcode=em20211101-20275&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=20275%2E1203867%2E6i9Efx ]If you’re down to hold
the line with us and want to elect more Justice Democrats to win
progressive policies, donate right now to fuel our fight.

Here’s Bernie not mincing words:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81512?refcode=em20211101-20275&t=1005&akid=20275%2E1203867%2E6i9Efx ]Tweet from Senator Bernie Sanders yesterday at 3 p.m. that reads I
strongly urge my House colleagues to vote against the bipartisan
infrastructure bill until Congress passes a strong reconciliation bill.

What did Ilhan Omar have to say about progressive power? “We aren’t
bluffing.”

AOC? "Nothing would give me more pleasure than to tank a billionaire, dark
money, fossil fuel, Exxon lobbyist-drafted 'energy' infrastructure bill if
they come after our child care and climate priorities."

Justice Democrats are holding the line. But we can only support the Squad
and elect more Justice Democrats to Congress with your
help, Peter.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81512?refcode=em20211101-20275&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=20275%2E1203867%2E6i9Efx ]Rush your
first $3 donation to Justice Democrats
right now to back the Squad, hold the line, and expand progressive power
in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81512?refcode=em20211101-20275&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=20275%2E1203867%2E6i9Efx ]Contribute

We can make real progress in this country, but only together.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1026&akid=20275%2E1203867%2E6i9Efx ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1027&akid=20275%2E1203867%2E6i9Efx ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211101-20275-footer&t=1028&refcode2=20275_1203867_6i9Efx&akid=20275%2E1203867%2E6i9Efx

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1029&akid=20275%2E1203867%2E6i9Efx

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

[ ]Rush your first $3 donation to Justice Democrats right now to back the Squad, hold the line, and expand progressive power in Congress. [ ]Contribute We can make real progress in this country, but only together. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Mckayla
subject: Build Back Better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, Last week, Joe Biden announced the scaled back Build Back Better plan. I want to be honest with you: there are some good provisions in it, but I’m disappointed. **It is _outrageous_ that two centrist Senators gutted the original plan because they would rather serve corporate interests and billionaire donors than represent the people.** I’m running for Congress to be a voice for the people. It’s more clear than ever: we need leaders who aren’t beholden to corporations and billionaire donors – and never will be. **[_That’s where you come in. I need your help to sustain our campaign. Will you donate $5, $10, or more right now?_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z7BEnzEB3IORvT7VbHa0t2Pz6Z2ZHBUv56CJyPZAePIvSZGCaI28D25HVVxRu0gfRK3zqi3OaS6c_wGp52dGu1TfQnXP3Wm2Xg7aPg7y86UtjH-Zb7w--nOG8P_y7zelUElPWN8Ev3Q84HJdjXxxTHGfMi_XAiyHBGAcuIb055wSq42K6FspcvwRQg99LOse60TVIVrDwFmFkxoGs7QCzPtDgbKZryW8c4KvPQs4VfIZHo1Wd5asEy416Q9hi7BHe5IZ5BipqDNdnKlgGdisROdSqul0iToZEmrzzkm1xrKP0_IFQbrd0YZn7hx13ZHzQ/3gn/DBQ2mzjHRr-XwEUUk9LE3w/h0/sV87LyJEFnjxSgN0zgOIstpOnhIdLKWaYneK2jN_xbM)** **Expanded Medicare for All benefits to include vision and dental.** **Allowing Medicare to negotiate drug prices.** **Paid family leave.** **Free community college.** **Increasing the top corporate tax rate.** **All of this got cut, simply to satisfy Senators Manchin and Sinema.** There’s still some progress found in the bill, but it’s not the system-changing reforms we needed coming out of this pandemic. If you’re with us — if you understand that justice can’t wait — please consider making a contribution now. I know we keep asking, but we’re truly a people-powered movement, not funded by corporate interests. That’s the way politics _should_ be. **[_Click here to make a donation to our campaign for Congress._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z7BEnzEB3IORvT7VbHa0t2Pz6Z2ZHBUv56CJyPZAePIm1sQJsNtWYD-dAFJlUcxIhHRbQap5m71bkPX4k4Frdturjk76g11hXCMuIdE2cmKFYIjHWJyGePaIXguw8AqbSMfLai23oMLXHmJ0Q2-yGpIshauGJuEcfE5jkdkestBfjGdA9foUcg3uW7t3MskeLoMcczrZN9NnPV33FOOlhMo9yxNQjWulXZA5DW41BoKdmfAStYeTeP_kJ5qTraAkfYm9Z0oyo56fW3-mj9Aey-Db8YQENMv_3V-lLT1-flpIIT8nqn9gJFMWirgyv_X8o/3gn/DBQ2mzjHRr-XwEUUk9LE3w/h1/YpVZyzer53v4P69bd6_KB8mg6jIQEPWQWJqqKIKEyYw)** The pushback to the progressive priorities we wanted to see in Biden’s Build Back Better plan shows how far our movement has come. The establishment mobilized every tool at their disposal to fight us on it and whittle it down to a quarter of what we initially wanted. They’re scared. They’re seeing the momentum campaigns like ours have right now — and how tired Democratic voters are of wasting opportunities like this for meaningful change. We need to take this opportunity in front of us. In solidarity, Mckayla
---

The establishment mobilized every tool at their disposal to fight us on it and whittle it down to a quarter of what we initially wanted. They’re scared. They’re seeing the momentum campaigns like ours have right now — and how tired Democratic voters are of wasting opportunities like this for meaningful change. We need to take this opportunity in front of us. In solidarity, Mckayla PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE mckaylawilkes.com | "Privacy Policy" Mckayla 2022 P.O. Friend,
I hope you enjoyed Halloween yesterday!
While I wasn't able to get a picture of Helene, I did manage to get this picture of Zeus and Gracie in their Halloween best as they waited to greet trick-or-treaters!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38198314/314360647/41694283?refcode=X_110121_Thankyou&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGFiOGM4My00NDNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9lxjhj1h1ebtsw5zgtPAPsRL7y-55gNwPoSGBvcH-FA=)

But seriously, I wanted to send a quick note this morning thanking you for your support. **Because of your help, we hit our end of month goal late last night.**
As you know, this is one of the most competitive seats in the country, and the only open "front line" seat. That means that of all 435 Congressional seats on the ballot next year, ours is _one of_ , if not _the most competitive_.
Which is why deadlines like last night's, which may seem arbitrary, are so very important. So again, thank you so much for your continued support. It really means a lot.
Appreciatively,
Kirsten

Peter,

We were able to reach our October online fundraising goal, and that shows the strength of our grassroots team.

Because of this team, we’ve been able to get up on the air with our TV ad and continue to build our team to beat Ron Johnson.

We’re putting in the work to prepare for one of the most consequential U.S. Senate elections in Wisconsin’s history. This is how we beat Ron Johnson, keep our majority in the U.S. Senate, and continue to work for the people of Wisconsin.

I'm so proud of this team, and I can’t thank you enough for the support you’ve shown my campaign.

Thank you again,

Alex

Thank you again, Alex ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. Will you pitch in any amount to help us keep the Senate Majority and defeat Ron Johnson? = Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. Box 511549 Milwaukee, WI 53203 United States It's going to take everyone on this team to win this election, but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . If you'd like to stay on our list but receive fewer emails, fill out **.

name: Laurie Bishop
subject: A thank-you and reminder
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laurie Bishop for Montana
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38199220/314364933/483879871?refcode=fl_email_na_20211101election_lb_90do_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGFhY2ZlYS00NjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZEOg5AhzZj3UMKJ23r6K-0PNCfqhN9oBYJj3zFdYIO0=)
---
Hi friend, First, thank you so very much for the outpouring of support over the past few days. With support from grassroots donors, we were able to reach our October fundraising goal just before the clock struck midnight! That’s how we’re going to win this race: with folks like you chipping in $5 and $10 along the way, helping us build the resources we need to pay for yard signs, fill up the gas tank, and build a team of volunteers to spread the word about our campaign across Montana. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38199222/314364936/483879871?refcode=fl_email_na_20211101election_lb_90do_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGFhY2ZlYS00NjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZEOg5AhzZj3UMKJ23r6K-0PNCfqhN9oBYJj3zFdYIO0=)
---
**Second, I wanted to send a friendly reminder that tomorrow is Election Day here in Montana and many parts of the country!** I had the chance to visit with my son’s Government class today and talk to them about elections and our democracy. This may be an “off-year,” but it’s just as important to vote for local and state leaders who make a direct impact in our communities.
**[Find your polling place and make your voice heard at the ballot box tomorrow.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38199223/314364938/-1227099876?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGFhY2ZlYS00NjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZEOg5AhzZj3UMKJ23r6K-0PNCfqhN9oBYJj3zFdYIO0=&emci=f3aacfea-463b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f4aacfea-463b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13640636)**
In just over a year, we’ll be voting for two candidates to fill this House seat, one that could make or break our Democratic majority and determine the future of our state. Let’s keep up the good work and come together over these next twelve months to create a brighter Montana for everyone in 2022.
Many thanks,
Laurie
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38199224/314364939/-152279872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGFhY2ZlYS00NjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZEOg5AhzZj3UMKJ23r6K-0PNCfqhN9oBYJj3zFdYIO0=&emci=f3aacfea-463b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f4aacfea-463b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13640636) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38199225/314364940/-2084618464?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGFhY2ZlYS00NjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZEOg5AhzZj3UMKJ23r6K-0PNCfqhN9oBYJj3zFdYIO0=&emci=f3aacfea-463b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f4aacfea-463b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13640636) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38199226/314364941/1683232672?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGFhY2ZlYS00NjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZEOg5AhzZj3UMKJ23r6K-0PNCfqhN9oBYJj3zFdYIO0=&emci=f3aacfea-463b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f4aacfea-463b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13640636) [www.BishopForMontana.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38199227/314364942/-489017696?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGFhY2ZlYS00NjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZEOg5AhzZj3UMKJ23r6K-0PNCfqhN9oBYJj3zFdYIO0=&emci=f3aacfea-463b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f4aacfea-463b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13640636)

clean_body: | = Hi friend, First, thank you so very much for the outpouring of support over the past few days. With support from grassroots donors, we were able to reach our October fundraising goal just before the clock struck midnight! That’s how we’re going to win this race: with folks like you chipping in $5 and $10 along the way, helping us build the resources we need to pay for yard signs, fill up the gas tank, and build a team of volunteers to spread the word about our campaign across Montana. | = Second, I wanted to send a friendly reminder that tomorrow is Election Day here in Montana and many parts of the country! I had the chance to visit with my son’s Government class today and talk to them about elections and our democracy. This may be an “off-year,” but it’s just as important to vote for local and state leaders who make a direct impact in our communities. In just over a year, we’ll be voting for two candidates to fill this House seat, one that could make or break our Democratic majority and determine the future of our state. Let’s keep up the good work and come together over these next twelve months to create a brighter Montana for everyone in 2022. Many thanks, Laurie | Paid for by Laurie Bishop for Montana Laurie Bishop for Montana PO Box 2188 Livingston, MT 59047 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Drew Thompson
subject: We have their back - Do you?
body:
[](https://) Peter, I'll be blunt...Joe Biden and the Democrats are actively working against our police officers as they attempt to restore law and order in our cities. It is up to us to fix this problem. The left revels in the crisis. Rarely do we get the opportunity to say thank you to the men and women who actually put it all on the line to protect and serve. If you don't want Columbus to become Portland or Cleveland to burn like Minneapolis, we have to show both Ohio and our police officers that we always have their back. Dont miss that opportunity this weekend! Join our future U.S. Senator, Jane Timken, and former New York City Police Commissioner Bernie Kerik on Friday and Saturday. **Win the Streets_Columbus**

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of Nov. 1st: STOP RECONCILIATION!
body:
| |
---
**Action items for this week include:**
* National: Stop Reconciliation – the “Build Back Socialist” bill!
* Local: Questions you must ask your local school board
* Local: Ask local law enforcement to protect parents
* Reminders and Recommended Reading

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
**National: Stop Reconciliation – the “Build Back Socialist” bill!**
The Democrats titled their enormous spending, insanely radical bill, “Build Back Better.” A better name for it is “Build Back Socialist.” This bill is one of the most, if not the most, extremist pieces of legislation our nation has ever faced. This is not merely a spending bill, though it is definitely that.

**It cannot be overstated how dangerous this bill is for our country. This bill includes nearly every hardcore, left-wing policy that’s been on their wish list for decades.**

Please make every effort to call your Representative this week. There needs to be such a groundswell that Democrats get scared about 2022, and their caucus fractures.

**Message:** _Hello, my name is ______, and I am calling from [City, State] to tell my representative to vote NO on the so-called “Build Back Better” bill. This bill barely mentions roads or bridges, and instead is the most radical, extremist bill America has ever seen. This isn’t about building back better. This is about jamming through crazy policies that Americans don’t support. My representative must vote no! Thank you._

**Local: Questions you must ask your local school board**
After what we have learned about the cover of up of assaults in Loudon County, VA schools, all parents need to investigate their own schools. Below are questions to begin asking your school board right away, either at the next public meeting, or over email immediately.
* **How many sexual assaults, rapes, sexual crimes, and other violent crimes were committed on school campuses each of the last 4 school years?**
* **What were the crimes?**
* **What were the ages of those involved?**
* **On which campuses did the incidents take place?**

|

For months, [Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer have been pushing for elections bills](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzA1LTI4YzdjNjdiNGE0ZTQ1ZDFiNjM3ZTk0ZTkzYmUyZDc3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVhbGNsZWFycG9saXRpY3MuY29tL2FydGljbGVzLzIwMjEvMTAvMjIvZGVtc19wdXNoX2Zvcl9mZWRfY29udHJvbF9vZl9hbGxfZWxlY3Rpb25zX2lzX2dvaW5nX25vd2hlcmVfMTQ2NjA5Lmh0bWw_bWlkPTQ0NTIxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=OeOdC8rGFN-WY2ygrIEq2w) that would undermine America's elections by eliminating popular provisions like voter ID while preventing states from cleaning their voter rolls. The Left calls their most recent bill the "Freedom to Vote Act," but a more accurate name would be the "Freedom to Cheat Act."

Democrats are making dishonest claims in defense of this bill. Sen. Amy Klobuchar recently argued that requiring voters to write their birthday on the outside of their envelope amounted to "voter suppression."

The Left seemed to think the American people would buy into their lies, but this hasn't happened. Even some Democrats have pushed back against the partisan nature of these election bills.
|

**Local: Ask local law enforcement to protect parents**
Even though the National School Boards Association sent another letter “apologizing” for calling parents domestic terrorists and retracting that sentiment, [Attorney General Merrick Garland has pledged to continue to target parents](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzA1LTI4YzdjNjdiNGE0ZTQ1ZDFiNjM3ZTk0ZTkzYmUyZDc3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%&K=SoL0hamsxjTip18sR9Jfpw) who dare to fight for their children, using the federal government to bully us into silence.

AG Garland said that the federal government will enlist local law enforcement to do this. It is time for us to call our local law enforcement and ask them to protect the parents in their community, not target, harass, and intimidate them.

Look up and call the non-emergency numbers for your Sheriff’s office and city police. Be polite and respectful, and use the following message as an example of what to say when you call.

**Message:** _Hello, I am calling to ask my local law enforcement to reject Attorney General Merrick Garland’s call to treat concerned parents in our community as domestic terrorists. Parents have the right to attend school board meetings and passionately express their opinions. Parents have a First Amendment right to petition their elected officials for redress of grievances, and it is not illegal to express statements with passion, or even to yell. If there are any actual threats or violence, I trust my local law enforcement to handle it properly and efficiently. Our community should not allow the federal government to target political opponents with a weaponized Department of Justice. I’m asking your department to protect parents and children in our community by protecting our Constitutional rights, and to refuse to be a part of the DOJ’s political suppression and bureaucratic bullying. Thank you._

Under Garland, the DOJ has, in effect, been transformed into a hyper-politicized extension of the Biden White House.

The Left calls their most recent bill the "Freedom to Vote Act," but a more accurate name would be the "Freedom to Cheat Act." Democrats are making dishonest claims in defense of this bill. Sen. Amy Klobuchar recently argued that requiring voters to write their birthday on the outside of their envelope amounted to "voter suppression." The Left seemed to think the American people would buy into their lies, but this hasn't happened. Even some Democrats have pushed back against the partisan nature of these election bills. | Local: Ask local law enforcement to protect parents Even though the National School Boards Association sent another letter “apologizing” for calling parents domestic terrorists and retracting that sentiment, who dare to fight for their children, using the federal government to bully us into silence. AG Garland said that the federal government will enlist local law enforcement to do this. It is time for us to call our local law enforcement and ask them to protect the parents in their community, not target, harass, and intimidate them. Look up and call the non-emergency numbers for your Sheriff’s office and city police. Be polite and respectful, and use the following message as an example of what to say when you call. Message: Hello, I am calling to ask my local law enforcement to reject Attorney General Merrick Garland’s call to treat concerned parents in our community as domestic terrorists. Parents have the right to attend school board meetings and passionately express their opinions. Parents have a First Amendment right to petition their elected officials for redress of grievances, and it is not illegal to express statements with passion, or even to yell. If there are any actual threats or violence, I trust my local law enforcement to handle it properly and efficiently. Our community should not allow the federal government to target political opponents with a weaponized Department of Justice. I’m asking your department to protect parents and children in our community by protecting our Constitutional rights, and to refuse to be a part of the DOJ’s political suppression and bureaucratic bullying. Thank you. and then be sure to and go to page 22 to read through the section on the NSBA if you want to learn more about the National School Board Association. | about politicization at the Department of Justice. Under Garland, the DOJ is targeting parents who have criticized school boards because of a letter from the National School Boards Association (NSBA). Officials at the NSBA apologized for the letter, but Garland won't back away from his intimidation tactics. It seems NSBA concerns were only a pretext for Garland to target parents who won't support Democrat policies on lockdown restrictions and critical race theory. Under Garland, the DOJ has, in effect, been transformed into a hyper-politicized extension of the Biden White House. | Reminders and Recommended Reading You can watch all of our school board webinars at your convenience. The first one , and the second one . The third one about the NSBA is . | If you haven’t yet contacted the medical boards and associations to reprimand them for threatening doctors who prescribe medicines like Ivermectin, please do so this week! to help you know who to contact and what to say when you email or call. These doctors are risking their careers for us, the least we can do is send an email or make a call on their behalf! A doctor in Washington has had his license suspended for treating Covid patients; a doctor in Idaho has had a complaint filed against him with the state medical board – trying to take his license – specifically for prescribing Ivermectin for Covid patients. It is happening, and these doctors will not be able to help us if we do not help them. | Recommended Reading by Victor Davis Hanson | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2021 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 | **

name: Michael Bennet
subject: The Supreme Court heard arguments on Texas’s extreme abortion ban today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38199530/314366491/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTMyNTA5MS00ODNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yE9zXBlfO0vPhmlIfG9dIcvezfEJU6rHX_l5W3cBhAI=)
Folks, Two months ago the Supreme Court declined to halt Texas’s dangerous abortion ban. I called on this grassroots team to stand up against this draconian attack on reproductive rights, and many of you signed my petition for the Supreme Court to block the law. Finally, the Supreme Court agreed to hear the case, and this morning the justices heard arguments from both sides. The fight to defend _Roe v. Wade_ and uphold the right to safe and legal abortion care for people across the country is critical, especially in this moment, when reproductive freedom is very much at risk. We can’t afford to lose momentum or get complacent. That’s why I co-sponsored the Women’s Health Protection Act, because I believe the right to access safe abortion care should not depend on what state you live in. The Women’s Health Protection Act would codify Roe into federal law and protect against attacks on abortion access. I’m counting on folks like you to show your support for the Women’s Health Protection Act today. Time is working against us here, so the more grassroots support I can show for this legislation the better. **[Will you add your name to my petition calling on the Senate to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act? While the Supreme Court Justices deliberate this case, we must enshrine access to reproductive care into law once and for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38199531/314366492/-2109611595?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_RES_AC_20211101_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTMyNTA5MS00ODNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yE9zXBlfO0vPhmlIfG9dIcvezfEJU6rHX_l5W3cBhAI=&emci=72325091-483b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=75325091-483b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1295540)** | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38199532/314366493/-2109611595?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_RES_AC_20211101_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTMyNTA5MS00ODNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yE9zXBlfO0vPhmlIfG9dIcvezfEJU6rHX_l5W3cBhAI=&emci=72325091-483b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=75325091-483b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1295540)**
---
This is part of an ongoing, aggressive, and coordinated attack on reproductive freedom — and that’s why it’s so important we hold onto our Senate majority and expand it in 2022.
A Republican Senate led by Mitch McConnell would continue trying to gut abortion rights and rush to fill our courts with anti-choice judges.
Thanks for making your voice heard on this important issue. Glad to have you on the team and to fight alongside you.
— Michael

Denver, CO 80201
United States

My campaign has been clear about our goal from the start:******we want to bring integrity, accountability, and transparency back to the Attorney General's office.**

There are _a lot_ of powerful opposing forces in Arizona that don't want to see this happen. They would rather keep controlling the AG using their pocketbooks. That's what makes hitting my monthly fundraising goals SO important.

_**Thanks to the grassroots support of folks like you, we hit our goal on Halloween!**_

We've still got a ways to go in this fight, but I'm lucky to have you on my team.

Thank you again!

_\-- Diego_

**Rep. Diego Rodriguez is running for Attorney General to be the People's Attorney, focused on our needs instead of partisan stunts. name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: The vision for an America united
body:
Americans don’t agree on every issue, and there are many perspectives - but if we begin by focusing on the common ground we share, we can do more.

| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email_2&n=1)
---
Friend, America is a diverse place made up of people with different perspectives and stories - and while we don’t always agree on everything, the story we share is more powerful than what divides us. And that's exactly what we must remember in order to fix what’s broken and put our Country First.

We know that together, we can. Let’s not give into fear and conspiracy. Let’s share the vision that can lift each other up and make America live up to her ideals. We can really use your help in our fight to uphold our values and keep Country First. What we are building is something that takes all of us, working together to succeed. This is an extraordinary and powerful vision for the future of America, and it means a lot to have you with me. | [](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=OPXMP9Gjm96HPN5OSJWJsIRUPZ4XpNHIFdYvIZ6w_hABaEcPsYY0DIz4siHb-jL5&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email_2&n=2 "Get Involved") [Get Involved](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=OPXMP9Gjm96HPN5OSJWJsIRUPZ4XpNHIFdYvIZ6w_hABaEcPsYY0DIz4siHb-jL5&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email_2&n=2)
---
Thank you again for your time and thank you for putting Country First.
Yours in service,
Adam
Country First · PO Box 2385, Ottawa, IL 61350, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.country1st.com/unsubscribe?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email_2&n=3).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email_2&n=4), software for leaders.

| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
BIG NEWS!! Draft maps are in!! The Arizona Redistricting Commission has voted on draft maps and is currently in the comment period before final maps pass. AZ-09 is now AZ-04, a newly drawn competitive district in Maricopa County’s East Valley. Republican Governor Doug Ducey won this district by 8 points in 2018.

Congressional candidate Tanya Wheeless entered this race to fight for Arizonans in the East Valley and she will continue to carry the torch no matter who her opponent is and what number district she is in. Check out a note from Tanya with her thoughts on the news.
