| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zrk891nu756dk9qtssiorbbh51nhhjqf5kkp47b0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctieapj1cth2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot, **Here 's the sad truth**: we can't trust the FBI. They are going after parents who care about what happens in their children's schools. That's just one of many examples. And now agents in the FBI are trying to destroy the family life, political career, and stellar reputation of my husband--Congressman Jeff Fortenberry of Nebraska. FBI agents used deception to gain entry into our home;
* **Frightened** me and our five young daughters; and

* **Interrogated** Jeff in our own living room as we waited in worry and fear.

All so they could ruin him. Jeff trusted them; but they deceived him. Repeatedly. And now they're falsely accusing him of lying. **[That's why I'm reaching out on Jeff's behalf, to ask you to support his Legal Defense Fund.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zl6icgo8k4r7kph2ju8ovgd385rvbpek74jnfjpg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctieapj1cth2bs)** [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ze850a3ktfcm5rqf52osd4nlbcohq3si30i7gho0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctieapj1cth2bs) | | | | [Chip in $25!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpuddonddkglt7las68qf8mmgb0t1u88c8stckbg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctieapj1cth2bs)
---
| | | [Chip in $50!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqd7tu04buvhla5hnbl4k9g1to30vkgkir3rfo5g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctieapj1cth2bs)
---
| | | [Chip in $100!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zprl07rr22lqg1dlgdnp4k28fl4ccd5jjhv84hkg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctieapj1cth2bs)
---
I know Jeff better than anyone. I hope you'll trust me when I tell you Jeff is a man of deep faith, extraordinary honesty, and unshakeable integrity. He works UNBELIEVABLY hard for his family and for his country. I can't tell you how proud I am of him, and how blessed I am to be married to him.

So why are they going after Jeff?

He's a conservative Republican, from a farm state. They want to stop his work and flip his seat. They can't call him crazy, so they're accusing him of a fake crime.

Jeff is articulate, diplomatic, and compassionate. But that doesn't mean weak!

When it comes to defending the rights of the most vulnerable, rescuing Americans and allies abandoned in Afghanistan, and standing against injustice, you won't find a more dedicated fighter than Jeff.

And now he is facing serious threats from Biden's FBI. They could destroy his political career, and even cause him to lose his freedom.

**Every time FBI agents take down a good man like Jeff, it emboldens them to go after more Americans. Jeff wants to put a stop to that.**

But he can't fight alone against the piles of taxpayer money they have at their disposal.

Will you please help him?

**[We can't get through this without generous patriots like you helping with my husband's Legal Defense Fund. Anything you can give will be received most gratefully, and used prudently.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2ji0s23gpps6r7p065lrkmoal8d98kjt9ajmi3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctieapj1cth2bs)**

[Your support today](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0m2g67kqq89vb21tuba3601nanuv1no0b7rovag_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctieapj1cth2bs) will help Jeff defeat this attack by Biden's FBI.
| | | [Chip in $25!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zf2lnkkapa6cc7rs3odsn22kkfh7s2f23n1diq4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctieapj1cth2bs)
---
| | | [Chip in $50!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6on88blgvcvit9livcgd7ud2o0ht747rmerqipo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctieapj1cth2bs)
---
| | | [Chip in $100!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlrr6i5euij0h485ld08njokcbbrdibvltgrlvd8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctieapj1cth2bs)
---
You can count on Jeff to fight hard for survival and for justice . . . for our family's sake--and for every American patriot's sake.

Thank you for taking the time to consider our appeal. Thank you for anything you can give. Thank you for your kind thoughts and words; and thank you, if you're so inclined, for your prayer support.

Blessings,

Celeste Fortenberry
Wife of Rep. Jeff Fortenberry

| | | | [Support Jeff's Legal Defense Now!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zl91jj5f4r7enjdbtvidmu29eqm1jogo0c8lhfuo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctieapj1cth2bs)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jahmal=20Cole?=
subject: November Newsletter!
body:
Join me! Fundraisers, meet & greets, and education policy | | |
#### NOVEMBER NEWSLETTER
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4c2bc07bf819/november-newsletter?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
### A Note from Jahmal:
I always knew I'd run for office, and take a stand with integrity for what I believe in.

A couple years ago, I sat next to Congressman Rush at Pearl's and told him about my political aspirations. I asked him when I would know I was ready. He said matter of factly, **you never know when you're ready, you just do it.**

I hope I can preserve the legacy of Congressman Rush because he's paved the way for people like me. The people's food program inspired my after school explorers program. I appreciate that the Panthers were teachers of people.

But I know that my time is now. **We can't wait anymore** for resources to come to 79th. We just can't.

We need a partner in federal government that can #GetTheBag for all the activists and nonprofit orgs that are putting in the work on the front lines. Y'all have seen what I can do with my #HitTheHood fund and my #SmallBusinessRelief fund. **We** **helped prevent violence and promoted economic growth in the neighborhood**. I'm gonna do the same thing in DC, just add more 0's and rip away all that red tape I had to cut through.

Shouts to Congressman Rush man. Like I told you at Bud Billiken, you're a living legend. Salute.

Thank you, and be About That Action! Check out our social media to learn about our next policy topic: **education.** We'll be hosting another conversation, so stay tuned for details. And be sure to get tickets to my **Sunday Dinner Fundraiser at Oooh Wee It Is on November 7th.** You can find the ticket link below!

Yours in service,

Jahmal Cole
---
| |
## JOIN ME
---
|
---
| [ ](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=f1dd5518e2&e=339f142c50)
---
On **Sunday, November 7th** , we will be hosting a **Sunday Dinner Fundraiser** , right in the heart of the first district. The event starts at **6pm** , and the food will be amazing! Get your tickets **[here](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=ccd18dcb5c&e=339f142c50)**.
---
On **Sunday, November 21st** , we will be hosting our first **Candidate Office Hours**! This is your chance to stop by Chatham House (campaign HQ), pick up some merch and take your photo in front of the mural! Plus, we'll have warm cider & donuts! You can order merch for **pickup only** [here](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=9e2a4300f2&e=339f142c50).
|
---
| |
## LAST MONTH
---
|
---
| [ ](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=d35ed315a1&e=339f142c50 "Jahmal Cole “Burning the Consent Decree” Speech")
---
In October, we took time to talk about police reform. I gave a speech at Promontory Point about how reforms, especially the consent decree, fail to get rid of racism in policing. Between not admitting guilt and optional trainings, these policies don't do nearly enough to keep us safe. Here is the full speech!
|
---
We also had a great discussion with Professor and author Alex Vitale about what actually works to solve problems like poverty, gun violence and domestic violence. Thank you to everyone who could join! We will post a link to our YouTube channel later this month.
[ ](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=55964510c6&e=339f142c50)
---
I was invited to speak at Laquan Day, a rally organized by fellow activists in the city to bring attention to the injustices Black & Brown people face at the hands of police. We honored the young Laquan McDonald, who was killed by Officer Jason Van Dyke in 2016.
|
---
| |
## GET INVOLVED
---
|
### Calling all volunteers!

We have are looking for volunteers to staff our two upcoming November events! Please share with us your availability **[here](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=1cac6d5b70&e=339f142c50)** and someone from the campaign staff will get in touch with you.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=67a1735e02&e=339f142c50)
---
|
---
| | We're always looking for volunteers!
Sign up [here](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=98af1a6892&e=339f142c50).

Want to host a fundraiser for the campaign? Let's make it happen!
Contact us [here](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=2e5eb8ef09&e=339f142c50).
---

Friends of Jahmal Cole8035 S Wabash AveChicago, IL 60619-3516

body:
Local Candidate Bootcamp

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_training_1101_13&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Hi Friend -- We wanted to remind you about our **virtual candidate training** TONIGHT! We will cover how to set up your campaign, work with local stakeholders, how to effectively message and so much more! Whether you're considering or committed to running for local office, or perhaps you're helping someone else run, we hope you'll join us from the comfort of your own home, and learn what it takes to run for local office! **Zoom-In:** Monday, November 1st, 7pm - 9:00pm
##### _*When you RSVP, you'll receive the zoom link and course materials._
______ | [](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_11_01?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_training_1101_13&n=2 "RSVP HERE") [RSVP HERE](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_11_01?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_training_1101_13&n=2)

Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_training_1101_13&n=6), software for leaders.

subject: This is how we win back the Senate majority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1e7bce570e3744de9ce077cabf342219&_e=AxGEqRdnXbPDgHgloLfigTt5mWiE5KmU4E1Wlrk6W4GtQ5fntg7ml_VUwNVHIKMcjni5pvxBF7Z1RV-SCK7w3I-nXYi7ec0psw5kAlu-7agimzEDGAefbdSXagFlLPZS0p5XW2n6ioHHSMYCLI9jtbT_mJAsP-5xtqeRZGjsA4drOiyvknFZ6Mf5EqbKdp7Yg-TF9svV5E1y0GkbenrO-nOTO500_MpfndFtghohkPlS-jeVclJ6-8np07RgwA0HLlCSkhIHImHmoVmJklKYHmF7UqjU2xYWVAmfQzrYHvofACfCRpSnkT0yVjqk_ER0plDBF8WDf1nEvKZlwucEjBsxN6ieesktTMRqDYzoiKaDS25b-iqFn6aBiQ07fVQ_nJCoIzrLYzTtDyas0LrR4jFQM1SUOlIRzDSYHvojAtOMpNhnuFwpgPB2RS6FAqP5cocpfLZMV5eMOZSbk39KLOyvGF2ZI_u6RaUtaK5qrEk%3D)

Peter,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1e7bce570e3744de9ce077cabf342219&_e=AxGEqRdnXbPDgHgloLfigTt5mWiE5KmU4E1Wlrk6W4GtQ5fntg7ml_VUwNVHIKMcjni5pvxBF7Z1RV-SCK7w3I-nXYi7ec0psw5kAlu-7agimzEDGAefbdSXagFlLPZS0p5XW2n6ioHHSMYCLI9jtbT_mJAsP-5xtqeRZGjsA4drOiyvknFZ6Mf5EqbKdp7Yg-TF9svV5E1y0GkbenrO-nOTO500_MpfndFtghohkPlS-jeVclJ6-8np07RgwA0HB83Nl21r0lH1EQfKdOhuPL_Pr1WquKP7uOnGueE97mvAm1kf_DMFn4yds0GC1J75W5mudGw_2f99LBVjioqPfwrVLqUVfp8Ta2arLLY9B-kIgLOzNBCwffEf-ZkKMd_xOSLR8ueP7Wdl1m-nMFWsH_c7kmPwfoB8AbqWk-WyJ5aSApRlTNWjnM_QfJTUxhEOZOQPM4xvy1qCWYP4NTwnRfP73Wgs6HzjqqTgAkwsZTY%3D) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1e7bce570e3744de9ce077cabf342219&_e=AxGEqRdnXbPDgHgloLfigTt5mWiE5KmU4E1Wlrk6W4GtQ5fntg7ml_VUwNVHIKMcjni5pvxBF7Z1RV-SCK7w3I-nXYi7ec0psw5kAlu-7agimzEDGAefbdSXagFlLPZS0p5XW2n6ioHHSMYCLI9jtbT_mJAsP-5xtqeRZGjsA4drOiyvknFZ6Mf5EqbKdp7Yg-TF9svV5E1y0GkbenrO-nOTO500_MpfndFtghohkPlS-jeVclJ6-8np07RgwA0HWvktHj6ecP00S8yG6mfh2H_4GvkodrqdJF2Rj3G6cE5SFraw7Pavz1rYiADMAUspbEUQEjWi_XuDDEDj5y6GBUgnEx7rQUkouMdRkNqLpANS-wFYgY5WJsI0sUoVYlXWjE36IQtt1N86E5ttELYAseupwQn8VW8qWZMH-wgCBRj6XMWmTTDylsXguYep2Vily3akG-PYLL_TwCvDxJwpOZRJJtRloxDDXDMJ6yLsHVE%3D)
I am running against Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud Democrat who has voted for every idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Peter. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1e7bce570e3744de9ce077cabf342219&_e=AxGEqRdnXbPDgHgloLfigTt5mWiE5KmU4E1Wlrk6W4GtQ5fntg7ml_VUwNVHIKMcjni5pvxBF7Z1RV-SCK7w3I-nXYi7ec0psw5kAlu-7agimzEDGAefbdSXagFlLPZS0p5XW2n6ioHHSMYCLI9jtbT_mJAsP-5xtqeRZGjsA4drOiyvknFZ6Mf5EqbKdp7Yg-TF9svV5E1y0GkbenrO-nOTO500_MpfndFtghohkPlS-jeVclJ6-8np07RgwA0H_HBisSOFWIsQh_3PJsnihobxLrWYSgLQsl4jTTFYRUXsOdKnQP0wyS-1KB7U3iyVnKRaKRjXGMNkcE6EzAsqQP4WQADINlrbQSzNIKVK61cu8jWmuwy-4q0X4vzaoCRbuuBd1gIX4rvazmg0M7YozQ3aVWyEQ_E_hY9MJ981ZuxwP8H8WHh-A3d7Yi3ghd7IGu4YwprXle9s5FVjmxMoftDCoJsJW6grcxhWiwZyfvo%3D) **

I’ve been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I’ve ever been a part of. Peter, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you’ll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1e7bce570e3744de9ce077cabf342219&_e=AxGEqRdnXbPDgHgloLfigTt5mWiE5KmU4E1Wlrk6W4GtQ5fntg7ml_VUwNVHIKMcjni5pvxBF7Z1RV-SCK7w3I-nXYi7ec0psw5kAlu-7agimzEDGAefbdSXagFlLPZS0p5XW2n6ioHHSMYCLI9jtbT_mJAsP-5xtqeRZGjsA4drOiyvknFZ6Mf5EqbKdp7Yg-TF9svV5E1y0GkbenrO-nOTO500_MpfndFtghohkPlS-jeVclJ6-8np07RgwA0H6e2lCjBOrHI1LVNaozAfdG8MCr5FsCOnz8woClwnDhc14IozfBQpwgmUT0EbUS7Gtn_fnqxUKvbklPwF7pgNAcoqdq8n5idH1_7R1aA5yuTifqYiSHttZ7mz0H4nv8A8RJm5KrWssTnzlr9olJDObJ3kPvpwZhlKhOyy1KeHE-BhjxiPQn4nsVOt5rtgcuuAQoSoDnYHeNl3H8piRhpC_nJ1hloc-zdjtMSDR5zDPek%3D)
Herschel Walker

[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=7d8bc9b24be24ec68d25d7d4b34ac783&_e=zrB5grkVfpxWZ_m6mlqsl4yV7DBkTwoG6dzyhhdcNF4PA-yl1TAN8hkqDj-Il5PQozRjHtuiNgo-yaarERbueq5NNGF_vT8nvOtNI4ROWHVaTc7asDw0DBGrnS0QXYjUMaEtRnkb55L7lBZRJ7bh1kyPBT2JoH-n3al7UEAu86Ug4SWkmZtRuZqeF6N-Gtwd25aqnMzWkQ2CwVV1GBZni80PWbmv7fcOlGtG9JfjVQ7Kur7lNcVb_TGjVlElqhsU1jrSnowbpU-EMPpFFIyRvkOy22rDZRvhAzCEuwCH30DGsP5-ksmIqflukTDDIecc4WUOMI0Dn6OQmanAsEWirDS9mDfGvERTv_gqHXRY0LhpppSwbxDtoycAr-mtjIi9kRbACzDzcJfPrUIwIScjt3gl-EWI14c_-Ue1GHlPfCYIBvZpu2Z2AIzXYgbxUuXqxNGxSnWMkg8FksKFgFT2T24iWqH4wFV0ChMjD-XMYjQ%3D)

Friend,

This is it. Tomorrow, we have the opportunity to take back Virginia and reinstall LAW AND ORDER in the Commonwealth.

**_And I’m so excited to celebrate this race with you tomorrow night._**

_But right now, we need to stay focused on our goal: WINNING this election for Virginia’s kids and families._

While we feel like our campaign is in a very good spot, it’s going to be very close. And we have to plan ahead for a recount.
[**> > Rush a donation to the Recount Fund today <<**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=7d8bc9b24be24ec68d25d7d4b34ac783&_e=zrB5grkVfpxWZ_m6mlqsl4yV7DBkTwoG6dzyhhdcNF4PA-yl1TAN8hkqDj-Il5PQozRjHtuiNgo-yaarERbueq5NNGF_vT8nvOtNI4ROWHVaTc7asDw0DBGrnS0QXYjUMaEtRnkb55L7lBZRJ7bh1kyPBT2JoH-n3al7UEAu86Ug4SWkmZtRuZqeF6N-Gtwd25aqnMzWkQ2CwVV1GBZni80PWbmv7fcOlGtG9JfjVQ7Kur7lNcVb_TGjVlElqhsU1jrSnowbpU-EMPpFFIyRvmO8QKTywDLCH0yszcXGzQd3M7QhuxCJlByoLUOZdAMZHxqTxOYC-VvWuwFyJLeAInK94nMCoO3A24nFWGfRket6ZK5916-97AnYWbeM8sMaSuU8xr9RUhwpWORkMLKBZ6H292NRq_4G4QMrkdXP23huyX7R8KATFZwSEaZDMmfxl2eIolII_p6yMPALKi-XqEW8du_oVPm5QW0f0fkqoCU%3D)
_In case of a recount, the campaign with more resources usually wins. That’s why we need to make sure that we stay ahead of the Herring campaign ALL THE WAY till the end_.
[**CHIP IN TO THE RECOUNT FUND**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=7d8bc9b24be24ec68d25d7d4b34ac783&_e=zrB5grkVfpxWZ_m6mlqsl4yV7DBkTwoG6dzyhhdcNF4PA-yl1TAN8hkqDj-Il5PQozRjHtuiNgo-yaarERbueq5NNGF_vT8nvOtNI4ROWHVaTc7asDw0DBGrnS0QXYjUMaEtRnkb55L7lBZRJ7bh1kyPBT2JoH-n3al7UEAu86Ug4SWkmZtRuZqeF6N-Gtwd25aqnMzWkQ2CwVV1GBZni80PWbmv7fcOlGtG9JfjVQ7Kur7lNcVb_TGjVlElqhsU1jrSnowbpU-EMPpFFIyRvinlVFklYJG9kaFwGODglKBkSz1KirmeHH4kZ0VJGBvUz13tSdHAraPoviA_Nkw7qkLItXGtDxfOQww6tFEdynSr0WjJqI1CqODwiJ4_OH1TW0ySgwetSYIytjb2ypT5zaU2t9UxbPCmyTd1sCbO-jWMSrggHSOEdXM84B5o29_xNjD1Ol-T8WN6Goya1YOJldKWJacTtBnCWsTAgWmGDS4%3D)
Friend, I really appreciate your crucial support throughout the entire campaign. Thanks to Virginia patriots like you, we’re going to win this.

[**The polls close tomorrow at 7:00 PM. Make sure to get in line before 7!**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=7d8bc9b24be24ec68d25d7d4b34ac783&_e=zrB5grkVfpxWZ_m6mlqsl4yV7DBkTwoG6dzyhhdcNF4PA-yl1TAN8hkqDj-Il5PQozRjHtuiNgo-yaarERbueq5NNGF_vT8nvOtNI4ROWHVaTc7asDw0DBGrnS0QXYjUMaEtRnkb55L7lBZRJ7bh1kyPBT2JoH-n3al7UEAu86Ug4SWkmZtRuZqeF6N-Gtwd25aqnMzWkQ2CwVV1GBZni80PWbmv7fcOlGtG9JfjVQ7Kur7lNcVb_TGjVlElqhsU1jrSnowbpU-EMPpFFIyRvmynxcOCIUrhLCjwNISFqrgVyuv3eLEWY5KW8JQ_q44SfdPRfL0c9CkHPwblisWh8INPuG48M4I2oF9JFdC6BROV3xvAXETtCdCBnDtBfFTiwedSitGJeIQf3QCBJijyr_Z0tvjsiTPWuapMnZAU50oSJq4kE6jWlGF2p4VmsDwfqS4x1X-XXMFg3JBDphf99ya5AIuwoLXbN9KhSPMySBc%3D)

name: John Fetterman
subject: So damn close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Obviously, that’s a bummer.
#
Hi, Peter, I have a couple of updates for you.
Some BAD news: we fell just $40,326 short of hitting our $10 million fundraising goal before the end-of-month deadline yesterday. Obviously that’s a bummer, and I would have loved to be celebrating BIG with all of yinz today.
But also some GOOD news: we kinda knew that our $10 million goal was a bit of a stretch, but now we’re so close to reaching it, **we might even get there today if we make one big online fundraising push together.**
In fact, we are so damn close that if something like _< checks notes>_ one out of every three people I reach out to today decides to donate, we could finally reach a historic $10 million in just a few hours.
That’s *really* all it would take! So, what do you think, Peter? 🙏
[**Can you please chip in $5 right now? Your donation could be *the one* that pushes us over to $10 million total raised on this campaign — a huuuuuuuuge milestone for which I would be eternally grateful.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36266?refcode=em20211101-3300&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3300%2E434096%2Ei-K7f3)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36266?refcode=em20211101-3300&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=3300%2E434096%2Ei-K7f3)**
Before I go, I have to say thank you. It really means a lot to me that we’re building our campaign the right way: No corporate PACs. No money from the shady special interests. Just people coming together to say we need to flip PA blue in 2022.
I’m deeply honored to be in this with all of you.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. **[The last time this Senate seat was up, it was *the most* expensive race in the entire country. Super PACs, special interests, and Republicans spent heavily to keep PA red. It’s not lost on me that this race could be decided by razor-thin margins, and that special interest groups are going to spend heavily to defeat our working-class movement. That’s why we set these big goals + why I’m asking for your help to get over the line today and officially raise our 10,000,000th dollar.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36266?refcode=em20211101-3300&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3300%2E434096%2Ei-K7f3)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211101-3300-footer&t=22&refcode2=3300_434096_i-K7f3&akid=3300%2E434096%2Ei-K7f3)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: Obviously, that’s a bummer. Hi, Peter, I have a couple of updates for you. Some BAD news: we fell just $40,326 short of hitting our $10 million fundraising goal before the end-of-month deadline yesterday. Obviously that’s a bummer, and I would have loved to be celebrating BIG with all of yinz today. But also some GOOD news: we kinda knew that our $10 million goal was a bit of a stretch, but now we’re so close to reaching it, we might even get there today if we make one big online fundraising push together. In fact, we are so damn close that if something like < checks notes> one out of every three people I reach out to today decides to donate, we could finally reach a historic $10 million in just a few hours. That’s really all it would take! So, what do you think, Peter? 🙏 Before I go, I have to say thank you. It really means a lot to me that we’re building our campaign the right way: No corporate PACs. No money from the shady special interests. Just people coming together to say we need to flip PA blue in 2022. I’m deeply honored to be in this with all of you. John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania P.S. | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

Day 9 of the #WinWithGlenn Bus Tour started off in the best way possible - surrounded by prayer and warm wishes at Highlands Fellowship
| [ ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VWG9jH5r6lnSW6gDv023_bbm9W8kTzPf4zmSPGN197WW_3lSbtV1-WJV7CgCNvW679_JS2vqN8lW1sfgTH6LpS-0W40jm_94YkZcpN38CSq1hsyVNW4H6lbk1TLKclN4CbgDwj52jfW4NYYzb9lS86xW5yJ12p8Wg6nWW7H4JBX1Dzv01N471WX8JbrKBW65_DCv9b_3tvW6r3V4R6QwSGkW2J22xc93s14JW8PXyMC1zc9NyW3_FJ_y5s3cb7W5XL7x02cdZBnW6hLw0D5pbMYhW5dRvKq4lFrmwW3whhVK6Wv5q8W291Sb24w0dmP32cv1)

---|---|---
Dear Friend, Day 9 of the #WinWithGlenn Bus Tour started off in the best way possible - surrounded by prayer and warm wishes at Highlands Fellowship Church. We are just _one day away_ from November 2 and I am always encouraged and refreshed after spending time worshiping with fellow my Virginians.
---
| [ **BUS TOUR** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VWG9jH5r6lnSW6gDv023_bbm9W8kTzPf4zmSPGN197WXh3lSbNV1-WJV7CgX89W2jh6FF4ZZ92kW5WT8hz2F23_JW3Sk--s3W8v8BW4N3JJY3BSPVfV6X0xV20njGTW3XKsgP93SPrVW3bP2-86RK0HZW6vClPx6WBwS3W3bf6vH7hpscJW1wHS-M7QZ6jTW6RPHx72KC-3fW2zbYjb3FgyGFVXfKk24HwdRGW456sPR88xhNGW6QQfjt979YWrW27F8fV643fMNW42qfLK5PW58nW53z4ly44bm5JW5x0lzw36Z_FzW3Vny4w2mSSrYW8NlPTw3Dn4l0V_PnGY7nhSB93gL01)
---
---
| | |
---|---|---
---
---
>From Lee County to Loudoun County, it is clear that there are Virginians who love the Commonwealth as much as I do. It was a delight to see people in Norton, Jonesville, Abingdon, and Gate City who are ready to join our movement and elect a new kind of leader - one who will stand up for law enforcement and for families.
---
---
Day 9 ended the same way that it started - surrounded by people who are fired-up and ready for a new day in Virginia. _Tomorrow,_ we have the opportunity to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. I am not stopping now and I cannot wait to get to work for you as your next Governor!
---
Is it a bird? Is it a plane? No, it's just me! Folks, Day 10 of the #WinWithGlenn Bus Tour is hitting the skies. Today, I will be flying all over the Commonwealth and we will be landing in Roanoke, Richmond, Virginia Beach, and Loudoun County. I cannot wait to see you at one of our last rallies of this campaign. Let's go, Virginia! For Virginia,
---
---
Glenn Youngkin
---
[ ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VWG9jH5r6lnSW6gDv023_bbm9W8kTzPf4zmSPGN197WXh3lSbNV1-WJV7CgY34W5LJpCJ5qsJJDW7jt18m4BZkJxVVWCp243HbjYW1MMZvr7BGHdtV671WF8NfNBMW7srzbq4s_c-GW87l5cp1H192xW7xTrGN2xh-BwW8DT7mp3Sz12bW4FC-zy9lKT1CW2c3CjW2tPCV1W7xw1My4WkQ-1W7gF0Js6Vh5_PVB7CTG4dfQm0W3xwYC53YtpkdW4g02Bv8fjFN5N7WHGgvMy8JKW1GSS7t4ljZL-W8t_pPp1LRkK2W6d44RQ9hjRNwW76B6pg18XQyGV5zSNQ21BRM635Hz1)

body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=666c7f5832d54062938669f510315cb2&_e=hNFYz63WWJMKkL8GFhB-mz8Y2-Zhw3-AyV9fE1qMn_em4sVyXBVzwRw17DXrX8-ZdZDu1niZ9QfHNqGwsyb7whOCIigB4tuGHHLfwuiTlrezG8BfLbuh8bJR7RKYK1VXwxc70PMLD3sgwj5qfJe1DH7BamBm_JQOnsrmMSMme1BOazeoLNyyOhjtba9YVPgxRXxE7Rmj5umMjRn4yD1YfgwRLtMJLc783qYUxjvyQcH_YwFbAfxx13XjKPli7ZEPoSH67pfe2jIWYnmQc5wBQ9oRqrjA7-cQQ6Dt1-R_FDGQSdTahcQbU2bDkGRGNqGsfx2kccd7miL5p2fHDD1xlvF0Dn3xlNhlOpSbJNIO_QVglhJ7DplG1iwKqUZye2cDEdt6nHJYiwNnM0CUzjGdftMHBfW6QW2BPdLd72j2QdSfFPZZngzDcLZ0FKV3liTmuODMI-2jLAkVZBls0cXj1w%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Fellow Conservative, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=666c7f5832d54062938669f510315cb2&_e=hNFYz63WWJMKkL8GFhB-mz8Y2-Zhw3-AyV9fE1qMn_em4sVyXBVzwRw17DXrX8-ZdZDu1niZ9QfHNqGwsyb7whOCIigB4tuGHHLfwuiTlrezG8BfLbuh8bJR7RKYK1VXwxc70PMLD3sgwj5qfJe1DH7BamBm_JQOnsrmMSMme1BOazeoLNyyOhjtba9YVPgxRXxE7Rmj5umMjRn4yD1YfgwRLtMJLc783qYUxjvyQcH_YwFbAfxx13XjKPli7ZEPdQNl3ac41g5xVOOpEtWr2tPX71MFePhPexCiNJ0oBQFXgj-_aBm96w2hntDzJy06bATgvnVBdExb8fbUpqR2zC7jxtjNDwfn21K9ry9M-QkbREG98mM5diykuX6pUcrY9RjQaYMCZWUQewvwNpzBx4afogxqC5bZ-6OnskZC-lGaxuXA6NMcvzmbAMLo2xEY6Yo3s2MkZY7pgQ7XTYULrA%3D%3D) **

name: THANK YOU STACEY ABRAMS (via DCCC)
subject: you WON’T thank Stacey Abrams?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
SIGN OUR CARD TO THANK STACEY FOR HER LEADERSHIP! >>
| | | **CBS BREAKING: Stacey Abrams group donates $1.34 million to help wipe out medical debts in five states**
| [SIGN OUR CARD TO THANK STACEY FOR HER LEADERSHIP! >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

We didn't think we could be any prouder of our Democratic hero, Stacey Abrams.

**We 've watched** her help turn out HISTORIC numbers of voters in her home state of Georgia.

**We 've watched** her DEFEND our democracy in the face of Republican attacks.

**And we 've watched** her help FLIP the Senate, DEFEND our House Majority, and ELECT Joe Biden as president.

But Stacey's work isn't done yet \--_**because we just learned her organization donated $1.34 MILLION to help wipe out medical debt for THOUSANDS of Americans!**_

[**We 're emotional just thinking about all that Stacey has done for our country -- so we want to show our gratitude with a card signed by her best grassroots supporters. Will you add your name straight away?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

While the Republicans have been working to **UNDERMINE our right to vote and GUT affordable health care ...**

_...Stacey is working to**DEFEND our democracy and provide RELIEF for those with medical debt.**_

We know it can't be easy to keep up the fight in the face of relentless Republican attacks.

That's why it's crucial that we show Stacey just how grateful we are for all that she's done for us.

**So please: Can we count on you to sign Stacey 's thank you card before midnight tonight?**

[ADD YOUR NAME: THANK STACEY FOR HER INCREDIBLE LEADERSHIP! >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/0L9VcX_~)
---

Thank you,

DCCC

body:
Why is Gov. Whitmer stopping every attempt to secure our elections She has vetoed two bills designed to prevent election fraud and is
| [ ](https://em.carraforcongress.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rBZm04/MWGKPg3NFVnW4DQKw45m-FJrW3_3yVc4zmVlYN15bQWX3lLBmV1-WJV7CgJGBW2vkMbg5SYN4SW1wvc-T4HmfflW4BmWHD8N2YjHW2JWbg91cB-JxW2BDlRR7fVvR3W936vJ-1p2F4HW6RHYNl63KpXCW2vjYpM14_Hb0W3zWRxv6Xv0Y2W3Z4H5r8x5SpWW7gNL4T65ZpTqW2QrH3-5KTxtCW6FJJZN8xtjpvW3s_Ynx4p94m7VhdC551Cp5wYN6hhp1JZT-2vW4Gl1798mpSW-W3GczVF48rLz9N3cbHNCQp4mJVvMK-31t2C2HN2K4YrBYW0c9W8xT1Nj231P-v2Sb1)

Peter,

Why is Gov. Whitmer stopping every attempt to secure our elections?

She has vetoed two bills designed to prevent election fraud and is threatening to veto any other election integrity bill that crosses her desk.

A full forensic audit of the 2020 election in Michigan and these election integrity bills would help people trust the election process again.

As an elected official, she should fully support protecting our elections from fraud. If she won't support securing our elections, then she needs to resign in disgrace!

You can help us demand Gov. Whitmer resign, Peter. Just click below to sign the petition!
---
| [ **Sign the Petition: Demand Gov. Whitmer Resign** ](https://em.carraforcongress.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rBZm04/MWGKPg3NFVnW4DQKw45m-FJrW3_3yVc4zmVlYN15bQWX3lLBmV1-WJV7CgMcgW8tPzk76bY_CrW6q2h5K7q8FbLVbknvL3M9M0QVkfXBJ3_9BvBW3J6ls51nmGxxW3vHT2c80t54RW8XVm1W6tB2gCVZ8d7-6ZkvzXN1QG0B36j1D0W4WdLp02kPHHnW8mqT5q7glb64V1C43q4_XhrnW41Fhm78-KpYyW8vjp5W5s2dLQW96d4Hm45Hk44W5DHm4494_frDW1shSpH36wQ1FMSgtctFGPCbW76NPt-8pf8HTW68TTbx32Fm89V4Fr7Q5lRgpTW4WCdmx8hRs-534Yp1)
---
There is no harm in wanting to know the truth so why is Gov. Whitmer fighting this issue at every turn?

Gov. Whitmer must resign if she refuses to conduct a forensic audit.

I'm not going to let her off the hook. I am a PROVEN conservative fighter who won't back down from a challenge. I will keep fighting tooth and nail until we get a full forensic audit of the 2020 elections.

You can demand Gov. Whitmer resign by clicking the button below and adding your name to our petition.
---
| [ **Add Your Name: Demand Gov. Whitmer Resign** ](https://em.carraforcongress.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rBZm04/MWGKPg3NFVnW4DQKw45m-FJrW3_3yVc4zmVlYN15bQWX3lLBmV1-WJV7CgFBwW6j1-gn7zxw1hW8fMzYp47nJ5WW4MvF8W8FmyHmN496Hdzn16MhW3-prXG46-QLzW1RkBzL8WHbpCW37C_5218xZRbVNRRyg4DX7ZqN3LGQS-qLCQ2W6NsqnV1PgQ3jW7jfxnR1wP8FPW7XJJWS2yPN38W6RF4k-19gCNWW4YW7fG22GDwRW5vv3gp5wW9zZW7fH8Xd50h1SPW4ZlXK867BJ2GW3w7srP45z_yKW7Pdmk912GdN2W2MGNRr20T7SlW5P0ZMl2_9kjwW8F7htn74kT6H3hlQ1)

People want to know their vote matters. Right now, we can't be 100% sure. We need a full forensic audit to help us learn what works and what doesn't when it comes to our elections.

Thank you,
---

Steve Carra
Michigan Candidate for Congress

| Peter -- thank you for your support over the past month. Because of you all, our re-election campaign is in a strong position as we head into the final months of 2021. Your contributions power this campaign, and we are incredibly grateful for your support.

**I may be running in one of the most competitive districts in the nation, but I am more confident than ever that we can and will win re-election in 2022.**

But Virginians, we have another race to pay attention to as well -- tomorrow is election day for our state! If you haven't already, I hope you'll vote for Terry McAuliffe, Hala Ayala, Mark Herring, and your local Democratic House of Delegates candidate.

**To find out where to vote, you can click this link:[_https://iwillvote.com/va_](https://act.myngp.com/el/mQot8kw34lTLzjt9Nj13133Lr1SPoksCy_jWbrOL0_4=/t2PLfkXXuGNt2WCknBUGnn-6Gy4u4QJeoakhMvVJtQc=)**

Thank you for your engagement with my campaign as well as local races across the state and nation.

With appreciation,

Abigail Spanberger

I am a Virginian, born and raised.

**And I uniquely understand the struggles of so many working families in our state ‐‐ because I’ve lived them.**

Growing up, my immigrant family struggled to make ends meet.

And when I was pregnant, my job didn’t offer health insurance. When my son had health complications, Medicaid saved our lives.

From then on, I built my cybersecurity career while being a single mom.

I’m proud of where I came from, and I was so proud to bring a voice to Virginia’s 51st District as their Delegate since 2017.

**And as your Lt. Governor, I’m committed to celebrating Virginia’s growing diversity and supporting Virginians of all backgrounds.**

The hard-working people of Virginia deserve a Lt. Governor who understands their struggles, and works side by side with them to lift them up.

[**I can’t wait to do this together, Peter! But this won’t be possible if we fall short on Election Day tomorrow. So I’m humbly asking: Will you chip in $3 today to my campaign? Every dollar still counts in a race like this one.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38203538/314386669/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20211101_EMDF_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWI2MDE0MC01YTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yNQcZTAkTlApm539L5szUeKvEbBmCBQEDFs8bgyaOSA=)

_**Tomorrow**_ , voters will go to the polls and choose between a Trump-embracing, insurrection-supporting, extreme GOP candidate and a Democrat who will fight for good jobs, healthcare, and climate justice.
Don’t worry, we didn’t fall through a time-travel portal to November 8, 2022, because the election in FL-15 is still a year away. A little more extremely relevant info about Youngkin: This is a guy whose supporters threw a rally where they said the pledge of allegiance to a flag that was at the Capitol during the January 6th insurrection.
**If you ask me, “supports the white supremacist-led January 6th insurrection at our Capitol” ought to be an immediate disqualifier for any elected office — Congress, governor, President, and everything in between.**
We must ensure that people like Scott Franklin and Glenn Youngkin are prevented from taking and holding onto power. Their dangerous, extreme-right leanings have no place in our government.
[_**Will you split a donation right now between our campaign and Terry McAuliffe to ensure they can turn out all the voters they need to win tomorrow?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38203560/314386747/-2124293083?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211101virginia_eg_main_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGJmNDM1OS01YTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-blvZof_nPtWgMo7RvNOWzrR6y_VBPPqKBLYgyRwUmM=)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: The next BIG step for the America-First movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sabatini for Congress
body:
The America-First movement is poised to destroy Joe Biden’s Presidency [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6555%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=axHb9KC5OA57hnJJ92ZPrw&sysid=1)

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67633%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IaXgxnGs5m%2bxmJTL%2bbgcLw&sysid=1)

Friend,

The America-First movement is poised to destroy Joe Biden’s Presidency and end Nancy Pelosi’s reign of terror.

_But we will never win without backup_.

I am happy to report I’ve met the man who can help Donald Trump’s movement grow to new heights, IMPEACH Joe Biden, finish building the wall, and take our country back from radical leftwing nutjobs like AOC.

**I am proud to announce my official endorsement of Anthony Sabatini for Congress! **

[**Anthony Sabatini is a proven conservative FIGHTER ... the most Pro-Trump champion in Florida’s state legislature. Please join me by making a donation of $20.22, $50, $100, $250 or any amount today!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67634%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fdT%2ffRD68ERImAiPhTBVUg&sysid=1)

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67633%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IaXgxnGs5m%2bxmJTL%2bbgcLw&sysid=1)

As a conservative wife, mother, businesswoman, and Trump supporter I only endorse the most hardcore PROVEN candidates. We DO NOT need more spineless politicians infesting the Swamp who will bend their knee to Pelosi’s orders.

Anthony is a man we can count on.

* Anthony Sabatini STOPPED vaccine passports in Florida
* He is 100% pro-life, pro-Second Amendment, and believes in the America-First agenda
* Anthony supports building the wall
* He has agreed to support my efforts to IMPEACH Joe Biden
* Anthony is the leader for election integrity in Florida and demanding an AUDIT of the election results
* Anthony Sabatini is fighting with me to Make America FIRST, Drain the Swamp, and to destroy radical leftists such as Pelosi and AOC.

[**I am announcing my personal endorsement of Anthony’s campaign as well as a fundraising drive to support this America-First champion. Please help me raise $25,000 for Anthony’s campaign by donating ANY amount below: **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67645%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P39xbgyK6u51O50RzsjUKg&sysid=1)

[**Donate $20.22
Donate $35
Donate $50
Donate $100
Donate $250
Donate $500
Donate $1,000**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67633%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IaXgxnGs5m%2bxmJTL%2bbgcLw&sysid=1)

Friend, I need more allies like Anthony.

Anthony Sabatini has proven he isn't afraid to take on the Establishment.

**He’s not only become a leader for election integrity, but also agreed to join my efforts to IMPEACH Joe Biden. **

As you can see, he isn’t afraid to pick fights with the Swamp, the Deep State, or the enemies of freedom. Together, I’m confident we can WIN big fights for America.

But he needs your help.

I told Anthony I would help him raise $25,000 in 48 hours.

[**Add your name to the list by making a donation of $20.22 or more by clicking here.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67646%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fMuHVlFF3OKJ3xUbWple7A&sysid=1)

I am counting on your help, Friend.

You are one of my top online supporters and this is an URGENT request. Please answer this email ASAP by making a donation.

Thank you,

Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene

Paid for by Sabatini for Congress
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6555%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=axHb9KC5OA57hnJJ92ZPrw&sysid=1)_

name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: Election Day is tomorrow. Do you have a voting plan?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Election Day is tomorrow. Do you have a voting plan ready?

Pennsylvania’s elections have never been under attack like they are today -- and by the people we've elected through fair elections! That's why it's so important that voters all around the state get out and VOTE tomorrow.

We saw conservative’s response to Trump’s presidential loss in the 2020 election. They rabidly went right for the jugular of our democracy —undermining our elections and trying to invalidate our votes. Luckily, our elected judges preserved our voting rights.

Let’s make sure to vote tomorrow for progressive candidates — including judges — when we head to the polls.

Here’s more information about how to vote in the Nov. 2 municipal election:

- Polls are open from 7 a.m. - 8 p.m.

- Find your polling site here: https://www.vote.pa.gov/Voting-in-PA/Pages/Voting-at-a-Polling-Place.aspx

- If you want to return your mail-in ballot in-person, you have until 8 p.m. tomorrow. Here’s where you can bring it: https://www.vote.pa.gov/Voting-in-PA/Pages/Return-Ballot.aspx

See you at the polls!

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

name: Josh Hawley
subject: This Is Living Podcast: Creating a Marriage That Thrives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
If you like what you hear, be sure to leave a 5-star rating and a positive review! [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=736e510ae85e49f991d2416dcc56b9f9&_e=utXHhxsw1AaYKuma9hlBuDXNnFN5OUcShjrWFHS4Xfbz81BzUSv1nsSXKpK6py1auE8tx18A2JiZTpplfmTLkrEByFw3mKtp0HnGAo4TCFISQDxHZdQFvjnCwPSzFRqpxhHD-qw8UxmldxFsP4BggMrqbfT68mB44kINtQ2vCln8EiUw3-SMvr3oyW6C9oeG9FAcTIPL1DhOyf6BRYP2tlK3Ip_Ql069U4WFkF1BDnf2XNu8CygVtvP4WGNa1Hvu2wKQYPe9M0_v1elR3x4Dl4aC9OhizIk8WihFZam2xJACfM-ZTgGEAoMCDTRN-Wv7DR4-tyv9mB96qxgc9e0ukGaV0h0ErZUglXb-PSSrY-_LGFfOFY6ikBaDmF-8CCUL53uB0wYeOMNnLDB9osxw-NwaIvuPWMJXsRsO55Qcovc%3D) | |
---

For this week's podcast, we talk marriage. God's incredible design for marriage, our unique marriage story, and how we manage to balance the demands of careers, kids, and the many other daily pressures that pop up! Listen to how we met, what drew us together, and how two people so different could be so drawn to each other! Marriage is wonderful because it is God's idea, not ours. We talk about some of the challenges our marriage faces, what a successful marriage looks like for us and how the Bible has shaped the way we view marriage.

clean_body: If you like what you hear, be sure to leave a 5-star rating and a positive review! | | For this week's podcast, we talk marriage. God's incredible design for marriage, our unique marriage story, and how we manage to balance the demands of careers, kids, and the many other daily pressures that pop up! Listen to how we met, what drew us together, and how two people so different could be so drawn to each other! Marriage is wonderful because it is God's idea, not ours. We talk about some of the challenges our marriage faces, what a successful marriage looks like for us and how the Bible has shaped the way we view marriage. To listen to this week's episode, click the link and listen! If you like what you hear, be sure to leave a 5-star rating and a positive review! Ratings and reviews help more people see the podcast! name: Derek Marshall
subject: Success!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
First of all, I want to thank every single supporter who donated to us this month. Your investment keeps our campaign going and makes everything possible.**I know there’s many campaigns out there to donate to, and I’m honored and grateful you believe in ours. **

Secondly, I want to share some great news! **Not only did we hit our October goal, but for the second month in a row, we surpassed it.** We owe this success to our amazing donors who continue to prove the power of the grassroots movement we’re building. I especially appreciate folks from all around the country donating who are invested in the outcome of our race here in California’s 8th district.

Before I sign off, let me share with you some pictures from our incredibly successful event this weekend that we co-sponsored with High Desert Mutual Aid, the Hispanic Chamber of Commerce, and more. We celebrated in style and got to talk to tons of new folks from the district about our campaign. **We’re really doing the work to build real progressive, political power in this district and it’s already paying off!**

Thanks once again.

In Solidarity,

**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-08

They’ll decide if we continue Virginia’s progress -- or if we see the return of Trumpism in America.

If we work our hearts out in the next 24 hours, Democrats could build all the momentum we need to have a blue wave in 2022.

We need to make sure we reach every single strong Democrat with our winning message: **Terry McAuliffe and Democrats up and down the ticket have shown that they will fight for YOU. How do we know?
They’ve been doing it.** From expanding Medicaid to raising the minimum wage to protecting reproductive rights to restoring the right to vote to 173,000 Virginians, **_Democrats have delivered time and again._**

And all of that progress is on the line tomorrow.

[**Will you donate right now to help us turn out the voters we need to keep Virginia on track? name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Poll Results & President Trump's plan is working
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Big time |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8c5e45e099&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I am writing you today to show you the results of an important poll that we conducted that validates not only everything we are doing in America’s audit, but also President Trump’s push to elect America First, Election Integrity Conservatives to Secretary of State!

**Just last month, President Trump endorsed my campaign, saying:**

**_“Arizona State Representative Mark Finchem has my Complete and Total Endorsement to run for Secretary of State of the Great State of Arizona! He has been a warrior in his pursuit of the truth about the 2020 Presidential Election scam in Arizona. Mark will clean up the fraud that Democrat Katie Hobbs created, and that RINO Doug Ducey and the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors have covered up every step of the way. Let’s get those routers, Mark!”_**

_I am proud to continue the fight with you, President Trump!_

[_And recently, President Trump has made a push to endorse like-minded Secretaries of States to protect our elections and ensure the Democrats are incapable of making another steal._](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3222ee6d38&e=44b8c466b0)

**And the media has caught on. Suffice it to say, the Fake News Media does not like it!**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fa0bbb5ad3&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| This _Guardian_ article reports:

_Donald Trump and allies are seeding one of their most dangerous efforts to undermine US elections to date, seeking to elevate candidates who refuse to accept Joe Biden’s victory in 2020 to crucial offices where they could do significant damage in overturning the 2024 elections._

_The former president has endorsed several Republican candidates running to be the secretary of state, the chief election official, in their respective states. If elected, these candidates would wield enormous power over elections, and could both implement policies that would make it harder for Americans to cast a ballot and block the official certification of election results afterwards. Ten of the 15 candidates running for secretary of state in the battleground states of Arizona, Georgia, Wisconsin, Michigan and Nevada have either said the 2020 results were stolen or that they need to be further investigated, Reuters reported earlier this month._

_The endorsements from the former president underscore the enormous power that secretaries of state have over election rules and procedures, both before and after the election. One of the main reasons Trump’s efforts to overturn the 2020 election failed in many places were election officials, including Republican and Democratic secretaries of state, who refused to go along with his effort. If those officials are voted out of office next year, it would be a serious blow to the guardrails of US democracy._

_“It is really troubling that Trump’s grip on the base of the Republican party may lead to the election of people who say that they believe the 2020 election was stolen from Trump,” Richard Hasen, an election law expert at the University of California, Irvine, wrote in an email. “That’s demonstrably false, but it does undermine the integrity of any elections that these people would be involved in running should they be elected.”_
**This shows two very important things:**
1. **The media is already preparing Americans for the possibility of a Democrat steal in 2024, and that any attempt to protect America’s elections is actually Republicans of all people stealing the election.**
2. **The absolutely worst thing in the world for the Democrats is that there would be Secretaries of States who believe the Truth, that Trump’s victory was stolen by the Democrats!**

_If this doesn’t give us motivation to push for victory for Secretary of State, then I don’t know what would!_

**The absolute worse thing for the Democrats is that President Trump gets what he wants: Election Integrity first Secretaries of State!**

_Well, I got really bad news for the Democrats:_

**_[The plan is working!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=674e845b61&e=44b8c466b0)_**

Just take a look at this recent poll:
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cd4f09f251&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| This straw poll shows that it’s not even close! I am President Trump’s endorsed candidate for Secretary of State in Arizona, and I am winning by a huge margin!

**What this means is that the final push for our campaign will be defeating the Democrat nominee in a final battle for Election Integrity in Arizona!**

Now, we have President Trump’s enthusiastic support for our campaign, and the media is terrified of all we will accomplish with President Trump, especially in 2024 as we defend Democracy from another steal!

_[Will you help us today with a generous donation to make this dream come true, so that America can once again have free and fair elections?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=abfbe5a335&e=44b8c466b0)_

[_Donate whatever you can and together we will make President Trump proud and we will defend America’s elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8d533c04ca&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d41b5f72e2&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7d5293a750&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3bcf0b7818&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=3829c500a1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=3829c500a1).

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. | | Dear Peter,

**All eyes are on Virginia. ** America is watching to see if Virginia will send a statement to the current administration that we are taking back our country and Commonwealth. Let’s show America that in Virginia, we are ready to get back on the right track!. The latest polling shows it’s going to be a close one. That means every single vote is going to make a difference. Election Day is TUESDAY! So talk to your family members and neighbors, make a plan, and encourage them to get out and vote. We’re going to need every single one of you to make this happen! And Virginia isn’t just important when it comes to the election on Tuesday. It’s going to be a **BATTLEGROUND** for control of the House next year. We only need to flip **FIVE seats** to take control from the Democrats in Washington. Rather than serving Americans, Democrats care more about pushing big government, the green new deal, and an insane $3.5 TRILLION spending plan filled with liberal wishlist items. _Their priorities are completely out of whack. _ That’s why we have to take back the House in 2022. Can I count on you to support my run for Congress? **We cannot take back the House without your support!** [_**Chip in today and help my team hit our critical November fundraising goal and put us on track to make November our biggest month yet!**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=1256a0097f&e=af4b86f5c6)

**** **Chief Jarome Bell**

| | Derek, this is urgent: Over the weekend, Donald Trump went on Fox News and promised to turn out his extreme supporters for Glenn Youngkin on Election Day. Then, this morning, he released his TENTH endorsement of Glenn Youngkin -- he said “we get along very well together and strongly believe in many of the same policies.” _**And now, he’s holding a tele-rally for Glenn Youngkin later today -- he’s making good on his promise to excite the right-wing base!**_ We’ve got to make sure we have the resources to fight back and turn out even more of our supporters. **_[I’m setting an immediate Rapid Response goal of raising $500,000 before Donald Trump’s rally starts tonight. Will you split a donation right now between my campaign and Sen. Mark Warner's campaign to help me hit this goal? We can’t wait.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38205814/314396840/925144818?refcode=mw_em_211101_2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmU2ZGM3NS02NjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z2n1szvl9p_ZjzfdaWEULKdllaKdlcqFOZwjJ_1iyyI=)_** Derek, this is a tied race. And at this point, it’s all going to come down to voter turnout. So if Donald Trump is holding a rally to turn out his supporters, we’ve got to make sure we’re doing everything we can to out-organize him. If we hit our goal, we can spend the next 24 hours making phone calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and running digital ads to ensure that every single Democrat in Virginia knows when, where and how to cast their ballot in tomorrow’s must-win election. **_[I’m counting on you today, Derek. Help me raise $500,000 today by splitting a donation between my campaign and Sen. name: Susan Wild
subject: reminder: make a plan to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
Voting is one of our most fundamental rights as Americans.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38205841/314397197/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211101-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWYyODQ1MS02NzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yeTERabz2lpPFotIKOknD5LrbE1wtH8TLP9PMooz7ko=)
---
| Peter,

With Pennsylvania state and municipal Election Day coming up tomorrow, I wanted to check in and make sure you have a plan to vote, if you haven’t done so already.
---
| [MAKE A PLAN ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38205842/314397198/-2050717761?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWYyODQ1MS02NzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yeTERabz2lpPFotIKOknD5LrbE1wtH8TLP9PMooz7ko=&emci=259c8f10-2d3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=bef28451-673b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=5543981)
---
Voting is one of our most fundamental rights as Americans. While local elections are often overlooked and have low turnout, local leaders hold a great deal of power and responsibility in our immediate communities, and it is crucially important that we make our voices heard. YOUR VOTE MATTERS.

**Polls are open from 7 a.m. to 8 p.m. tomorrow, November 2, and as long as you are in line to vote by 8:00 p.m., you must be allowed to do so. If you already have a mail-in ballot, you have until tomorrow at 8:00 p.m. to drop it off in person.**

Please, Peter, make a plan to vote and remind your family and friends to do the same. Together, we can make real change in the lives of Pennsylvanians and all Americans.
| [PLAN TO VOTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38205843/314397199/-2050717761?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWYyODQ1MS02NzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yeTERabz2lpPFotIKOknD5LrbE1wtH8TLP9PMooz7ko=&emci=259c8f10-2d3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=bef28451-673b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=5543981)
---
Thank you,

YOUR VOTE MATTERS. Polls are open from 7 a.m. to 8 p.m. tomorrow, November 2, and as long as you are in line to vote by 8:00 p.m., you must be allowed to do so. If you already have a mail-in ballot, you have until tomorrow at 8:00 p.m. to drop it off in person. Please, Peter, make a plan to vote and remind your family and friends to do the same. Peter,

I have wrestled a terrorist to the ground of a Paris-bound train, I have gone to war in the Middle East, and I have battled for conservative values in my home state of Oregon.

Which is why I am not afraid of taking on one the Democrats House majority - especially with strong conservatives like you by my side.

[ JOIN THE FIGHT ➔](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=cbf2144f925142e187ef6b1657291d23&_e=h5yc21OjOH3ZwRwrP1coLsLWlDe3yUKZm27fMSto26LOVn8w6tOJyCgMb0vOhXQ3O0CaRX4z84SA54qsZI2tEbQOYjtLTDlmidOEevC_FroGEld9s27DPEuycwcdavSRmYJaHvbslsaTvMTCbmJjSUXiS4SlBPYakWQlw-w8I-P3mWYZ-7DOppBDpzbfhJ7MpQ3z6EUDUY6KS2gtC2wWb_D7Kg0HufLXZxZMWmKAMFixHzkmmQVIn0WbnvQW7lgbDXJiKxleXkVgLJ_tCyPJxRScJsGsrcm2uNws0san9iB29gmg7mrYrdvJJuQ21RIa7Dq_v4x7zLth3jfQHTaMmsElOG6xUEHG24EPQDfeW4OYmQ6A-y8w-bxFbGTpIMtNJS9r_t-_DUWWMVht2mpGaxX7tI5hocPfDFU4GYpUTBAgS5wOzaRW5Ncd4qVAhqiS)
**But this fight cannot afford a misstep, and unfortunately, we have MISSED our October month goal by more than 25%, which puts us behind heading into the final stretch of 2021.**

clean_body: I have wrestled a terrorist to the ground of a Paris-bound train, I have gone to war in the Middle East, and I have battled for conservative values in I don't have good news to share... | Peter, I have wrestled a terrorist to the ground of a Paris-bound train, I have gone to war in the Middle East, and I have battled for conservative values in my home state of Oregon. Which is why I am not afraid of taking on one the Democrats House majority - especially with strong conservatives like you by my side. But this fight cannot afford a misstep, and unfortunately, we have MISSED our October month goal by more than 25%, which puts us behind heading into the final stretch of 2021. We have to close the gap, before the Democrats catch wind and pour even more resources into defeating me. Reaching this goal is about more than winning an election; it’s about defeating the corrupt Democrats that have continuously put politics and power ahead of Americans’ needs. name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Tim and I need your help, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5768?t=1006&akid=1314%2E3611125%2EX1_UB4 ]A personal message from Tery McAuliffe

Folks --

We are a day away from Election Day in Virginia, and polls are tied in the
campaign for Governor. There’s no doubt this is 2021’s most important
race.

I’m up against an extremist who has pushed Donald Trump’s “big lie.” He’s
peddled dangerous conspiracy theories and keeps cozying up to Trump’s most
far-right supporters.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5768?t=1007&akid=1314%2E3611125%2EX1_UB4 ]If you don’t have time to read the rest of this email, you can click
here to split your donation between my campaign and Tim Ryan right away.
>>

Tim’s Senate campaign is also a must-win race -- Ohio’s open Senate seat
has been dubbed 2022’s most important race. He’s up against radical
opponents who are raking in campaign cash from Trump’s cronies and recent
polling shows a razor-thin margin.

So much is riding on these elections, folks.

If Democrats turn out like they did in 2020, we will win tomorrow. If they
don’t, we’ll lose. At that point you can say goodbye to Democrats’
progress and say hello to the resurgence of Trumpism in our country.

Folks, I need your help to stop that from happening -- or it
could also spell trouble in 2022 for Tim as well.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5768?t=1008&akid=1314%2E3611125%2EX1_UB4 ]Please, split a donation right now, and help us turn out the voters we
need to keep Virginia blue -- and turn Ohio blue.

Thanks,

Terry
Democratic Candidate for Governor of Virginia

clean_body: [ ]A personal message from Tery McAuliffe Folks -- We are a day away from Election Day in Virginia, and polls are tied in the campaign for Governor. There’s no doubt this is 2021’s most important race. I’m up against an extremist who has pushed Donald Trump’s “big lie.” He’s peddled dangerous conspiracy theories and keeps cozying up to Trump’s most far-right supporters. [ ]If you don’t have time to read the rest of this email, you can click here to split your donation between my campaign and Tim Ryan right away. > Tim’s Senate campaign is also a must-win race -- Ohio’s open Senate seat has been dubbed 2022’s most important race. He’s up against radical opponents who are raking in campaign cash from Trump’s cronies and recent polling shows a razor-thin margin. So much is riding on these elections, folks. If Democrats turn out like they did in 2020, we will win tomorrow. If they don’t, we’ll lose. At that point you can say goodbye to Democrats’ progress and say hello to the resurgence of Trumpism in our country. Folks, I need your help to stop that from happening -- or it could also spell trouble in 2022 for Tim as well. [ ]Please, split a donation right now, and help us turn out the voters we need to keep Virginia blue -- and turn Ohio blue. [ ]Donate $25 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $200 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other Amount Thanks, Terry Democratic Candidate for Governor of Virginia [ ][IMG] We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Primary Kyrsten Sinema
subject: How we're going to beat Kyrsten Sinema:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
Two-thirds of Arizona Democrats want to replace Sinema. Here's how we're going to make that happen. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPMbLm1BOSvCxQ0dxeRElD-tOX5z2IvsV2geAuOC_7PF66J1VCQ9X0P_cC513ZMcVso80hMOQ5E_Btbq7wykT2r91aGADtgdZIPYAgvd5qDq7ezCpxXYhmVpdsOuk7KhkXbtdfrC_fpJQL2ciRfg2-S5XyAj8NJOwWGbE_njiBykRgKbVRSUSUsmfVJjtR4QsOvSqviFTeyIVk9Xd7Mvd-ujHKgalA-3HZUKDNVl7MPKv/3gn/6vR_EQqrTj6gg1BajDlVnw/h0/yRePbIsgrc8QCQKCwlj73puSR4fNUvru0NcNYiLgUio) Thank you again for joining the Primary Sinema project. We've had a _huge_ response so far — and we're just getting started! We have big plans to beat Kyrsten Sinema. In fact, 100% of the money we raise will be strategically invested in Arizona grassroots organizations who are laying the groundwork to oust her. **[Will you make a contribution toward our project today? The only way we're going to beat Sinema is by building a big, diverse movement that will reach every community in Arizona; your gift today will help us build that movement.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS2j52bEJ6xC3kbzg324xHx1-erYRSUtUw3DMzMUPTNNgNY00cuyz161clJ6qhEiL7IHPVqJJR3yeEa0kn1T9gsqknk7IOXrdbTijz9KBsyFSYQ6IzI7GFYNoGwK9N6O3_hqm5uvGtGXrjRxApw2jBVX5GAkWTuhZ0x31JdQV_Uwvj3X4tAaPu3H3oQdA09EbFyZcAspR0MobsqIFsWWfzBavEZtpDDn5UQWv_30wN-5aA2jVlJ0jD40sdsN2_37OtGihAgs73F23CT41Yan_t50fQl4blNoRbALWgluRfgGELf4INixQheEGttka_E-ea/3gn/6vR_EQqrTj6gg1BajDlVnw/h1/KqBj-MZSw5EB35UBZc_LxZx8uVQfHX76uEToyeGtGw4)** Here's why we're organizing to beat Kyrsten Sinema:
* **Kyrsten Sinema is the #1 obstacle holding up Joe Biden's agenda in the Senate.** She opposes the Build Back Better plan. She wants to keep the filibuster, even if it means not passing voting rights. And she doesn't care what voters think because she's too busy listening to her corporate donors and their lobbyists.
* **So we have no choice but to primary Kyrsten Sinema.** And we can win this — according to a recent poll,_two-thirds of Democrats_ in Arizona say they'd vote for a primary challenger to Sinema. And that was _before_ she blocked the Build Back Better plan!
* **But we can't wait until a primary challenger jumps in the race.** Beating an incumbent Senator is hard, so we need to act NOW to build the infrastructure we'll need to defeat her.

**[That's why we launched Primary Sinema, and that's why we're so glad you're with us. Will you take the next step to help us beat Kyrsten Sinema by supporting our work today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS2j52bEJ6xC3kbzg324xHx1-erYRSUtUw3DMzMUPTNNhIT51mBuk13v1_KB1KP_AY-w35WcfCinj6K2BHSTohQEJiZ5yIxT2JGsdjgXSJdHPFlNNcv9rPx_7vXPHQ9zAI5zbVkPi--PH6ruajZWs5sgiw9TWsB6SRMaAUR0Jnu8Vm4UD2PrJZ91MZrLFnKxMwJ_QZb5usB2Mj7LBpgpDAGJkTfoBCeoYLONSDaJjAdYTD24qzbEl42w4GTP2iQe5lOnLXdnmFy7P0OLFjaewNgHbQMMrMsIxV_XkqxZPfO8bC9FfcYsXNcdHsV2Y_GIto/3gn/6vR_EQqrTj6gg1BajDlVnw/h2/OE2QbhCoiipr-pLvmFSwKj7bhrljSYD3hNffGJspdw4)** [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS2j52bEJ6xC3kbzg324xHx1-erYRSUtUw3DMzMUPTNNi2o_ceWNl4hgtB7T7Y48vBOwuPxtmAwQW3HIcw6gJ66QflL0rztC-IDbybgs5w4O0cvYb8MtWZsKT3PKDK4lEE6QGRaq-PAyQW1lMyJrFSxV2BkbdY5Pwbm6EGpeffEYjFbVlGcMpQd7P4DAgFLizw8LFlEmv8kBS23pKg7ZUDAJQrTOQ3RiNKW55x2AiZCkMTKSoVtng1VqKTplnKPHvi5rsT4QMVVV06mh2e9NSlwe1ZUbU-ovr-Hzf37ku4FgrJ7IdocK2_-62wLs2etrkL/3gn/6vR_EQqrTj6gg1BajDlVnw/h3/dJrw-Ec5hsmU0ClGiMgC_Vf2S5w5gWNgVdie43Uu6-M) Look, we're not helicoptering in from other states to campaign against Kyrsten Sinema in Arizona. Rather, we're strategically investing in grassroots organizations on the ground that have smart ideas for anti-Sinema organizing and communications efforts. So beating Kyrsten Sinema starts with raising revenue so we can give those groups a budget. **[We hope you'll make a gift and chip in toward those efforts today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS2j52bEJ6xC3kbzg324xHx1-erYRSUtUw3DMzMUPTNNhU1ii-cEDixZSN0vMto6On9Lm87vjrn_bY-5bCgx8NgVX8WH_yRlRP_9pCQw3AdEZQi_8aG3UiYrRBrzKxoRC9-AG6tL8Tme-BR-HcnYMd-Tu4s-5J-cGIaIdiDaIscates534te_WS2zaE7VvzIAnVA8q0hOqy6DQ9A4iY1ZjUEuMMT7tSBmu8a8VW4Lu2bAGexG9oVUpGG7NkOT8LSUEEMndSYtTeJj2YoepOgVLopVN3ZukG58vc55Y5RdP1bvBogS-69c93uFYFI43R_Fo/3gn/6vR_EQqrTj6gg1BajDlVnw/h4/Mbcy98nCuXYXQHMzMcED0W6gMkdjI0a7YGI2fUAqXdE)** Also, thank you again for your early support — it really does make a huge impact. Keep an eye on your inbox to learn about even more ways you can help us primary Kyrsten Sinema. Thanks, The Primary Sinema team

The Virginia Governor’s race is a must win for Democrats in 2021.

Just this week, a new Emerson College poll showed me TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. That’s right, TIED with the guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the Pledge of Allegiance to a flag they took from the January 6th insurrection.

Peter, we only have hours left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and I’m asking for your help to prove them wrong.

**[If you’re with me, and you want to keep Virginia blue, pitch in right now by making a split donation between my campaign and Phil Arballo.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38206541/314400480/2089198157?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_2021101_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGU1MTlhMS02YjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9HzKI0zQ7Su84UweR0FHR4L9ai3Gg7oNgsOmBZMPBj0=)**

This is the FINAL weekend before Election Day, and if you’ve been waiting for the best time to donate, it’s right now.

We’re literally counting down the hours until Election Day on Tuesday.

With polls _STILL_ tied, anything can happen -- but here’s the thing, every dollar that we raise this weekend makes it that much more likely that we’ll turn out the voters we need to win. _And the country is counting on Virginia to stop Trumpism._

name: Jim Renacci for Governor
subject: Renacci Will Make Ohio Great Again
body:
| | Friend, So goes Ohio, so goes the nation. There’s a reason for that. Ohio is the best this nation has to offer. I know this because when I set out to pursue my American Dream, I came to the Buckeye state.
More than 30 years ago, I launched my first business. Ohio would go on to provide me with success beyond anything I could’ve envisioned. Since then, I’ve owned and operated more than 60 businesses and employed more than 3,000 people.
Ohio also provided a great place to raise my family. The traditional values, hard work ethic, grit, and patriotism of Ohioans is unmatched. These are the people you want as your neighbors, friends, and coworkers.
I want to make sure that our economy and families not just survive, but thrive. That’s why I’m running for Governor. Let’s keep Ohio great, by putting Ohio first.

name: Max Steiner
subject: Next steps
body:
We not only met, but exceeded our October online fundraising goal. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38206569/314400566/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzRhMmIwOS02YzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bNhY8OHE91vMssXZT7tSMBZgJw_okjdfhASKEGXipao=)
Friend,

I'm proud to announce that we not only met, but exceeded our October online fundraising goal. We outraised our opponent Doug LaMalfa last quarter, and we're on our way to doing it again.

The month of October was a bit challenging on the home front. Army Reservists are required to spend one weekend every month and several weeks per year at training. That's where I was for the past few weeks, and it meant we couldn't host as many events as I would have liked. I trusted you to help us online and you really stepped up. Thank you.

We're on to the next stage of this campaign, and we're following the recipe for success: 1) Talk to as many people as possible, 2) Take no one or their community for granted -- we're reaching working families, small business owners, farmers, young people & students, and political independents to 3) turn them out to vote next November in great numbers than Doug LaMalfa.

The California Redistricting Commission's "starting place" map gives Democrats a nine point registration advantage over the previous district. If approved, this map is a significant boost for our campaign and presents the best opportunity to defeat LaMalfa since he was elected.

Thank you, friend, from the bottom of my heart. I know that we can win this race, and I'm grateful to be doing it with you on our team.

Thanks,

Max Steiner
Veteran for Congress

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: a huge win for child care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
I know that while the coronavirus pandemic exacerbated the child care crisis that has long impacted millions of families and care workers, it did not create it.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38206732/314401478/1546772515?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211101-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGFhYjg5NS02ZTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TpCte360CfhjG5spU3UWFmKr7RK1WuagtSV-Mig4V1g=)
---
| I have been advocating for children and families in my district and across the country since my first day in Congress. Because I know that while the coronavirus pandemic exacerbated the child care crisis that has long impacted millions of families and care workers, it did not create it.

**That’s why I worked so hard to ensure significant measures for children and families were included in the Build Back Better Act.** The legislation as it stands includes free and universal pre-K for three- and four-year-olds, significant measures to reduce child care costs, and **a one-year extension of the expanded and improved Child Tax Credit.**

**I personally called on House Speaker Pelosi and Senate Majority Leader Schumer** to expand eligibility for child care subsidies to a higher income threshold of at least 250% of the State Median Income, which will reflect the needs of middle-class families in high-cost areas like San Diego. I am proud to see these priorities reflected in the final text of the bill.

**We must demonstrate that there is real grassroots support for these crucial issues.[_To show that you have my back and to keep me in Congress as an advocate for children and families, will you chip in $5 or more to my campaign right away?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38206733/314401479/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211101-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGFhYjg5NS02ZTNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TpCte360CfhjG5spU3UWFmKr7RK1WuagtSV-Mig4V1g=)**

clean_body: I know that while the coronavirus pandemic exacerbated the child care crisis that has long impacted millions of families and care workers, it did not create it. | = | I have been advocating for children and families in my district and across the country since my first day in Congress. Because I know that while the coronavirus pandemic exacerbated the child care crisis that has long impacted millions of families and care workers, it did not create it. That’s why I worked so hard to ensure significant measures for children and families were included in the Build Back Better Act. The legislation as it stands includes free and universal pre-K for three- and four-year-olds, significant measures to reduce child care costs, and a one-year extension of the expanded and improved Child Tax Credit. I personally called on House Speaker Pelosi and Senate Majority Leader Schumer to expand eligibility for child care subsidies to a higher income threshold of at least 250% of the State Median Income, which will reflect the needs of middle-class families in high-cost areas like San Diego. I am proud to see these priorities reflected in the final text of the bill. We must demonstrate that there is real grassroots support for these crucial issues.= | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please
