name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Biden wants to pay illegals $450k each!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Close the border! No bribes to illegals! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c2b43fbad9&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

When I visited the border, I saw first hand the tragedy that the Biden regime's disastrous immigration policies have wrought.

It's no joke. This is a catastrophe caused because Biden invited these illegals to come here with the promise of free stuff.

_Now he's wayyyyy upped the ante._

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=324aa07d59&e=afa21b7626), in the shadow of Disney World. It's currently held by Darren Soto- an open-borders Dem who wants to pay illegals!**

I never thought I'd see many of the things Biden has done already. The damage he has done to America has been devastating. But this is truly beyond the pale!
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=161ed8e3c1&e=afa21b7626)
---
| FOX News reports on this travesty:

_President Biden's administration is considering whether to make payments to immigrants who were separated from their families at the border under former President Trump's administration, according to a report from the Wall Street Journal.

The report, based on remarks from "people familiar with the matter," states that payments of "around $450,000 a person in compensation" could be issued to immigrants affected by Trump's zero-tolerance immigration policy in an effort "to resolve lawsuits filed on behalf of parents and children who say the government subjected them to lasting psychological trauma."

The Journal stated the Departments of Justice, Homeland Security and Health and Human Services are "considering payments that could amount to close to $1 million a family," though final payment amounts could change as some "families would likely get smaller payouts, depending on their circumstances."

"For perspective, if a service member is killed in action, their next of kin gets an insurance payment of $400,000," Crenshaw wrote. "Let that sink in."_

So that's it, huh? Illegals get $450,000 each- but veterans only get $400,000 for a life given in service to the country?

_**Joe Biden is a treasonous snake. He has no right doing this. **_

This is how we get thousands of illegals showing up on our doorstep. They were invited, bribed even, by Biden- who then lets them in, ignoring all U.S. immigration law.

_Almost a million illegals, unvaccinated and untested, have been let in by Biden this year. He is literally trying to remake the American electorate by allowing this invasion._
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6e5c4f348a&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Biden has no idea what he's doing- and my Congressman wants to help him make these huge bribes to illegals.

I have a better idea. Why don't we impeach Biden, and stop this invasion?**

[I will force Biden to close our border. We will take away his power to do damage. Will you join me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=73255b3d4d&e=afa21b7626)

_Darren Soto hasn't stood up against a single bad idea Biden has had. He hasn't cast one single vote to hold Biden accountable for this disaster. He wants to pay illegals $450k apiece to break our laws!_

What is going on here!

Help me bring America First policies to Congress! [Help me get elected and put a stop on every bad idea Biden has!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8262601cc4&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ba696efe26&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8df6590c2b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=573185a634&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=fec2672711&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

Texas’ S.B. 8 is one of the most restrictive abortion law in recent memory, preventing abortions as early as six weeks. And now that it’s reached the Supreme Court, it could have catastrophic effects on reproductive health care.

We’re talking about a law that prevents abortion before most people even know they’re pregnant. Supreme Court Justice Sonia Sotomayor agrees that S.B. 8 will “have profound and immediate consequences.”

The bottom line is: **the Supreme Court could overturn _Roe v. Wade_ any day now.**

The moment _Roe v. Wade_ is overturned, 17 states have “trigger” laws that will automatically ban nearly all abortions.

We’re not telling you this to scare you Peter. We’re telling you because it’s a serious possibility and we need to take action.

clean_body: We need to end these abortion bans. | | Peter, Texas’ S.B. 8 is being heard by the Supreme Court starting today. Texas’ S.B. 8 is one of the most restrictive abortion law in recent memory, preventing abortions as early as six weeks. And now that it’s reached the Supreme Court, it could have catastrophic effects on reproductive health care. We’re talking about a law that prevents abortion before most people even know they’re pregnant. Supreme Court Justice Sonia Sotomayor agrees that S.B. 8 will “have profound and immediate consequences.” The bottom line is: the Supreme Court could overturn Roe v. Wade any day now. The moment Roe v. Wade is overturned, 17 states have “trigger” laws that will automatically ban nearly all abortions. We’re not telling you this to scare you Peter. We’re telling you because it’s a serious possibility and we need to take action. Thank you, Team Caraveo | | **= = ****Learn more at:** Follow along:** | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

I’m flabbergasted, Peter...

Democrats and analysts across the country have been talking about just how important the Virginia governor’s race is, but Election Day is tomorrow, and it’s looking like a tossup right now.
Think about that! Virginia went big for Joe Biden and now I’m tied with a Trump-backed culture warrior who’s pushing Trump’s ‘big lie.’
**I thought folks would be fired up to get out the vote, but at this point,_it seems like enthusiasm is at an all time low._**
Peter, we’re going to need all hands on deck if we want to pull this off, and I’m counting on you to step up today.

Donald J. Trump November 1st, 2021
Hopefully everyone will get out and VOTE tomorrow for Glenn Youngkin, who will be a fantastic Governor for the Great State of Virginia. Glenn is a very successful businessman who knows how to make Virginia’s economy (which is doing poorly!), great—and he has had my Complete and Total Endorsement for many months! Glenn believes in FREEDOM, including freedom for parents who want a good education for their children. He is also a strong believer in our now under siege Second Amendment, and loves our Military and our Vets. Everything is on the line in this election, and every MAGA voter should strongly support Glenn Youngkin. We must win bigger than the margin of fraud by flooding the polls with those that believe in America First. Please vote on Tuesday for Glenn Youngkin—he will not let you down!

Trump November 1st, 2021 Hopefully everyone will get out and VOTE tomorrow for Glenn Youngkin, who will be a fantastic Governor for the Great State of Virginia. Glenn is a very successful businessman who knows how to make Virginia’s economy (which is doing poorly!), great—and he has had my Complete and Total Endorsement for many months! Glenn believes in FREEDOM, including freedom for parents who want a good education for their children. He is also a strong believer in our now under siege Second Amendment, and loves our Military and our Vets. Everything is on the line in this election, and every MAGA voter should strongly support Glenn Youngkin. Trump November 1st, 2021 The Fake News media, together with some of the perverts doing ads ad nauseam on primarily Fox (Fox shouldn’t take those ads!), are trying to create an impression that Glenn Youngkin and I are at odds and don’t like each other. Importantly, this is not true, we get along very well together and strongly believe in many of the same policies. Especially when it comes to the important subject of education. The reason the Fake News and perverts are working over time is to try and convince people that we do not like each other, and therefore, my great and unprecedented Make America Great Again base will not show up to vote. Also, I am not a believer in the integrity of Virginia’s elections, lots of bad things went on, and are going on. The way you beat it is to flood the system and get out and vote. Remember this, Glenn Youngkin is a good man, a hardworking man, a successful man. He loves Virginia and wants to cut your taxes, save your children’s education, and many other very good things. Terry McAuliffe is a low-life politician who lies, cheats, and steals. He was a terrible high-tax governor and would be, if elected, an even worse governor again. I say to all of our millions of followers, don’t listen to the Fake News and misleading advertisements written largely by already-acknowledged perverts. name: Team Fetterman
subject: VOTE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Tomorrow is Election Day, and here’s what you need to know:
#
Hey, Peter.
Tomorrow is one of the most important days of the year: Election Day 2021!
**If you’re voting tomorrow, Tuesday, November 2, we wanted to share which four Democratic statewide judicial candidates John + Gisele are voting for tomorrow.**
(And if you’ve already turned in your mail-in ballot, forwarding this email to another friend in Monroe County would be pretty cool 🙏)
[**Click here to confirm your polling place to vote in-person tomorrow (or to turn in your ballot if you haven’t already)!**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36347?t=1&akid=3302%2E434096%2EgD1PLU)
Now, without further ado — here are some fantastic Pennsylvania Democrats who are committed to protecting our fundamental rights. 👇
First up in ballot order,**Judge Maria McLaughlin** has focused her life’s service to fighting for our children on Philly’s Court of Common Pleas, Family Division, and now on our Superior Court. There’s no one better than Judge McLaughlin for our state Supreme Court.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36347?t=2&akid=3302%2E434096%2EgD1PLU)
**Judge Timika Lane** has a proven record fighting for fundamental rights, such as her time fighting voter suppression laws. We hope you’ll join John in voting for her for Superior Court.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36347?t=3&akid=3302%2E434096%2EgD1PLU)
As part of Philadelphia’s Family Court, **Judge Lori Dumas** is dedicating her career to fighting for Pennsylvania’s most underserved communities. Electing her to the Commonwealth Court is a no brainer.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36347?t=4&akid=3302%2E434096%2EgD1PLU)
Last but not least, **Judge David Spurgeon** served in the Allegheny County District Attorney’s Office, and now serves on the County Court of Common Pleas. His expertise in the fight against family violence will be vital in our Commonwealth Court.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36347?t=5&akid=3302%2E434096%2EgD1PLU)
Make no mistake: The fight for many fundamental rights in PA take place in our court system, and it’s never been more important that we elect judges who we can trust to fight for us.
We hope you’ll join John + Gisele in casting your ballot for these four terrific judges tomorrow, Peter. **[You can find your in-person polling place and ballot drop-off locations here.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36347?t=6&akid=3302%2E434096%2EgD1PLU)**
Now let’s go elect more Democratic statewide judges in PA!
Thanks,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211101-3302-footer&t=7&refcode2=3302_434096_gD1PLU&akid=3302%2E434096%2EgD1PLU)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Keystone Progress
subject: Correction: Keystone Progress is proud to endorse Tyler Titus for Erie County Executive.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress, www
body:
https://www.keystoneprogress.org [https://www.keystoneprogress.org]

Dear Friend,

Correction: Keystone Progress, not Keystone Progress Education Fund, is making this endorsement. (Please excuse prior email that was sent accidentally)

Keystone Progress Erie Chapter is proud to endorse Dr. Tyler Titus for Erie County Executive.

Keystone Progress is committed to furthering progressive causes and candidates here in Pennsylvania. That’s why we’re supporting candidate Tyler Titus for Erie County Executive ahead of Election Day — Tuesday, November 2 — because Dr. Titus shares our values.

Dr. Titus is an esteemed mental health professional and serves as president of the Erie School Board. Dr. Titus' experience and vision make them more than qualified to become Erie's next County Executive. They are unwavering in their commitment to social equity, justice, and dedicated to ensuring education for all. Unlike their opponent, Dr. Titus has led a life of service as a social worker, foster parent, and in their work on the school board.

Dr. Titus is committed to working from the ground up: to build up local businesses and our county's infrastructure, to prioritize the needs of health care workers, and create more high-quality, well-paying jobs.

We CANNOT let our Elections Department fall into the wrong hands. We need to elect Tyler Titus to ensure that the person who oversees this key department for the next four years isn't someone who believes in the Big Lie and wants to waste time and our money on false audits and conspiracy theories.

We know that Dr. Titus will work tirelessly to transform Erie County and to make it a more progressive, equitable place to live. Please vote for Dr. Tyler Titus for Erie County Executive on Tuesday, November 2.

If you have questions about where and how to vote, click here. [https://eriecountypa.gov/departments/elections-voting/registration-and-voting/]

See you at the polls!

Keystone Progress

Paid for by Keystone Progress, www.keystoneprogress.org. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress
PO Box 1206
Harrisburg, PA 17108
United States

name: Dr. Mary L Trump
subject: Stop my uncle’s 2024 campaign in its tracks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
This is critical

| | Last year, we worked tirelessly to reject Donald Trump’s politics of hate and division. We stood up for our future and voted for progress. Now, we’re at a crossroads. Donald Trump’s candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is appealing to Donald Trump’s base. He’s been endorsed by my uncle eight times. And he’s trafficking in right-wing extremism. If Glenn Youngkin wins in Virginia, Donald Trump will have all the momentum he needs to launch his 2024 comeback plan. **But we can choose a better way.** We can choose to fight for Terry McAuliffe, a proven leader who can make tough decisions and get things done for the people he’s elected to serve. We can choose progress, inclusivity, and honesty. [**But only if we all do our part. So right now, please split a donation between Terry’s campaign and Susie Lee. Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Fellow Conservative, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2f0141e35c0640a19cc2ddcd435bcfb1&_e=znr-B_XPkn0tDX2pt4VBCWet0qEVx3MhEygNMayH7BrT5pVWitKCHMVpCSP3Cg53TnBce4_d3sv9zqJ5EobdLn21xYG5LWaaxrmcwwkZURVlkjgjakZfUwY0uXHepGoFFRZANOM1RFPlDeHevsSxhBEKnIEkQ73Q7PPHJeacgbmYJ6VHk7vN5S3awfpRkOs0JtnIYw-lrnKGiVbzEF1N6-mwx1qzMNrTqQIswg-3giaLXCzls_rHIpmOYZxvX9KMgWOBs-l9TUGYguHh1xJrLe1gcN1eJt4Q1-7A6eYqDSkWj0qcYowK3W4ZXxqzYpkUxqf3IY9hvA6CQM-J-G9SQeUH2Y0u6INyd7iw5i-Ss3gW_ooj5nNjXAAucaF2sPSDdZ3zLTvcKyMXy-VQ76Kb4PO-LSirSPlnjUyBaAe_7JFsl8KzlGkCFQCY9a_F7uDpT9ZdL4-MVZFg_rimV-mTrdbxaMPbRDtgHWrwvCkclTk%3D) **

I am running against Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud Democrat who has voted for every idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Fellow Conservative. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

Thanks,

body:
What more do you need to know?
| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38207385/314413406/-2023814932?refcode=20211101.12_TM_10KT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTNjZjMwNi03NDNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LcgwyO3XRU0-e6lrhFQDMBH_x-QyBSJIc-qE6Q7j518=)

| | Derek, the experts agree: we cannot afford to elect Glenn Youngkin.

_The Washington Post_ said, **"Glenn Youngkin has failed the test of character"** and he has **"proved himself unfit for office."**

_The New York Times_ called him **"a Culture Warrior."**

I couldn’t have said it better myself, Derek.

Youngkin’s far-right social agenda is WRONG for Virginia and the country. From wanting to restrict abortion rights, to opposing same-sex marriage, to banning books by Black authors, he’s made it clear he wants to take us backward.

_**[To stop him tomorrow, we need the largest Get Out The Vote program ever built in Virginia. If you’re able, please make a contribution of any amount to my campaign right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38207386/314413407/-2023814932?refcode=20211101.12_TM_10KT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTNjZjMwNi03NDNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LcgwyO3XRU0-e6lrhFQDMBH_x-QyBSJIc-qE6Q7j518=)**_

He indulged Donald Trump’s lies about the 2020 election.

He pandered to insurrectionists.

He peddled antisemitic rhetoric and homophobic ideas.

And now, he’s dragging our kids into the middle of his ugly, right-wing culture war with his closing message about banning award-winning books by Black authors from our schools.

**Tomorrow, we have the opportunity to reject these politics of hate and division, and choose a better way forward.**

_**[Are you with me? Please, make a contribution right now to fund our final GOTV efforts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38207387/314413516/-2023814932?refcode=20211101.12_TM_10KT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTNjZjMwNi03NDNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LcgwyO3XRU0-e6lrhFQDMBH_x-QyBSJIc-qE6Q7j518=)**_ | | | **[DONATE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38207388/314413517/-2023814932?refcode=20211101.12_TM_10KT&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTNjZjMwNi03NDNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LcgwyO3XRU0-e6lrhFQDMBH_x-QyBSJIc-qE6Q7j518=)**

clean_body: What more do you need to know? | | | = | | Derek, the experts agree: we cannot afford to elect Glenn Youngkin. The Washington Post said, "Glenn Youngkin has failed the test of character" and he has "proved himself unfit for office." The New York Times called him "a Culture Warrior." I couldn’t have said it better myself, Derek. Youngkin’s far-right social agenda is WRONG for Virginia and the country. From wanting to restrict abortion rights, to opposing same-sex marriage, to banning books by Black authors, he’s made it clear he wants to take us backward. = He indulged Donald Trump’s lies about the 2020 election. He pandered to insurrectionists. He peddled antisemitic rhetoric and homophobic ideas. And now, he’s dragging our kids into the middle of his ugly, right-wing culture war with his closing message about banning award-winning books by Black authors from our schools. Tomorrow, we have the opportunity to reject these politics of hate and division, and choose a better way forward. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = We only have until tomorrow. Let’s make sure we do everything we can to fight for the future we want. In solidarity, Terry McAuliffe =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

| | Dear Friend,

We've been hard at work campaigning in every corner of Georgia. There is no doubt that this race is critical and we are dedicated to electing a qualified candidate to represent Georgia, defeat Raphael Warnock, and take back the Senate. Kelvin King can and will #WinforAmerica, but he can't do it without our help!

This Thursday evening we are excited to be officially kicking off our live dial program and you're invited! We will hear from Kelvin and Janelle before jumping into our important mission of voter outreach. Pizza and refreshments will be provided! To RSVP just reply to this email (Sarah@kelvinking.com), or call/text me at (404) 401-5500.

**WHO:** Kelvin King for U.S. Senate Campaign
**WHAT:** Phone Banking Kickoff
**WHEN:** Thursday, November 4th from 5-8PM
**WHERE: **Campaign HQ: 1640 Powers Ferry Rd. Bldg 26, Marietta, GA 30067

If you can't make it to the phone banking kickoff, don't worry! We would still love to have you on the team and we can work around your schedule to get you plugged in. Just let me know how you would like to be involved!

Let's #WinforAmerica!

Sarah Pritchard
Scheduler/Volunteer Coordinator
Kelvin King for U.S. Senate

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38207510/314421674/691946420?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjUwYWMzOC03ODNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3jPMc6veTj0IFuWzPZolWGOmfecnhbovC-o9wMPdBvs=)

Peter, everything we’ve been fighting for comes down to this moment.

[**The polls open in 9 hours, so I need your help to keep our momentum strong until the very end. Can I count on you to chip in $1 _(not a typo, I’m just asking for $1!)_ before midnight tonight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38207511/314421675/-1547699132?amount=1&amounts=1,5,10,15,50,100&refcode=HAFV_20211101_EMDF_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjUwYWMzOC03ODNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3jPMc6veTj0IFuWzPZolWGOmfecnhbovC-o9wMPdBvs=) | [ONE DAY UNTIL ELECTION DAY: CONTRIBUTE $1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38207512/314421703/-1547699132?amount=1&amounts=1,5,10,25,50,100&refcode=HAFV_20211101_EMDF_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjUwYWMzOC03ODNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3jPMc6veTj0IFuWzPZolWGOmfecnhbovC-o9wMPdBvs=)
---
This election isn’t over yet — my extreme Republican opponent is ramping up her attacks to upset our grassroots campaign.

_So I’m coming to you, Peter, let me explain why._

I know $1 doesn’t sound like it could make an impact. But for my team on the ground, it’s more than enough to keep pushing forward.

Your $1 will distribute one more yard sign. 🏡
Your $1 will knock on one more door. 🚪
Your $1 will get one more Virginia voter on our team. 🤝
Your $1 will keep our ads running until the end. 📺
**Your $1 will help me win tomorrow!**

With all that’s on the line — _voting rights, abortion access, and so much more_ — I’m counting on your $1 tonight to push us over the finish line.

[**So what do you say, Peter? If you want to protect democracy and help me make history as Virginia’s first woman, Afro‐Latina, and mother as Lt. Governor, I need you to contribute $1 _(or more!)_ tonight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38207513/314421731/-1547699132?amount=1&amounts=1,5,10,25,50,100&refcode=HAFV_20211101_EMDF_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjUwYWMzOC03ODNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3jPMc6veTj0IFuWzPZolWGOmfecnhbovC-o9wMPdBvs=)

clean_body: Can I count on you, Peter? | = Peter, everything we’ve been fighting for comes down to this moment. = | = This election isn’t over yet — my extreme Republican opponent is ramping up her attacks to upset our grassroots campaign. So I’m coming to you, Peter, let me explain why. I know $1 doesn’t sound like it could make an impact. But for my team on the ground, it’s more than enough to keep pushing forward. Your $1 will distribute one more yard sign. 🏡 Your $1 will knock on one more door. 🚪 Your $1 will get one more Virginia voter on our team. 🤝 Your $1 will keep our ads running until the end. 📺 Your $1 will help me win tomorrow! With all that’s on the line — voting rights, abortion access, and so much more — I’m counting on your $1 tonight to push us over the finish line. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you. Let’s finish strong! = Hala Ayala Democratic Nominee for Virginia Lt. Governor | | Paid for by Hala For Virginia P.O. Box 7434, Woodbridge, VA 22195 www.halaforvirginia.com Hala Ayala is the Democratic nominee running for Virginia Lt. Governor. As a lifelong Virginian, Hala understands where we've come from and embodies the diversity of our future. She's running for Lt. Governor because she knows we have the power to move forward together, and she knows what it'll take to get it done. Please, consider making a =. Peter,

I just had a major October fundraising deadline and unfortunately, _I came up short_.

Look, Peter, I don’t like having to ask for money, but I have one more chance to hit my goal and [**I need your help.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1839d6028b7e44eca0218f025a23f8be&_e=jRZoIBW2DOgaURdqdN2c-zN6FBUiTBG3myTZSB3qbM6u1rhc2L8jCx1w0uQxZK6QjltTPJ9CpD3Dq47LR3y3BSIK2cOLU3RvRMz89SNP-6bRz1eerv_y5t2H9sIcgwYNPzm8-mbLmqV9BM7K7cr6-CtX6OLa90lNZMUViYb5qquSkTc-MXvlKC34Vq8pg1zVQZfZ1iLijtDqHIWuIuX0yLg7hdTp4VZx0V1VQR9LXMUTVRUSal1-XzaBAdJ1XkIV0UzshlAXMsu0A3CerBKcZUVttNOJGBTUh2-l9lQuCBfmh09YhbSC77b7yBfs7kH_8nH3KwUPOCKFnkNsAEH9tyNLY-ehq08kci0qG_XmtFjsdUmLvBxd-Y4L3wlBsQ-l)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda?=
subject: Largo Mayor Woody Brown Endorses Amanda Makki!
body:
Mayor Brown is the 6th Pinellas Mayor to Endorse Amanda Makki | | | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=5fa0d8bff0&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | |
## **Largo Mayor Woody Brown
Endorses Amanda Makki for Congress!**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=480b5283f6&e=c2296cffff)
---
| [Show Your Support for Amanda Now!](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=5754de9323&e=c2296cffff "Show Your Support for Amanda Now!")
---
|
---
|
Largo Mayor Woody Brown announced his support for Amanda Makki today. Mayor Brown joins five other Pinellas County mayors who have already endorsed Amanda in the FL 13 Congressional race. That's more than any other Republican or Democrat in the race!

Our campaign is thriving! Mayor Brown's endorsement adds even more momentum. Just a few days ago Amanda signed the Taxpayer Protection Pledge with Grover Norquist. She just topped the GOP field in CD 13 raising nearly $300,000 dollars in Q3. Support from people like you earned Amanda a spot in the NRCC's "Young Guns" program. Amanda Is the only CD 13 candidate to attain the NRCC's "On The Radar" status in a single quarter.

Amanda thanked Mayor Brown for his endorsement earlier today.

**“The residents of Largo are lucky to have Mayor Woody Brown. His dedication to helping Largo thrive through his work as Mayor, his countless hours volunteering for causes in the community, and his first-hand understanding of the health care system serve him well in understanding and addressing the needs of the people in Largo,” said Amanda Makki. “We are aligned on so many issues and I am deeply grateful for his endorsement in the race for Florida’s 13th Congressional District.”**

We need your help to keep this momentum going! Share this email with anyone you think might like the chance to get to know Amanda. Consider attending one of the events Amanda will be appearing at (keep scrolling for details) or [chip in](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=85ba39c20a&e=c2296cffff) to show Amanda your support.
---
|
---
| | **Amanda In the Community**
Join Amanda at these upcoming events in
Pinellas County!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=fcfc58e75a&e=c2296cffff)
---
### Meet Amanda at Caddy's in Madeira Beach!
Amanda would love to have the chance to speak with you about the issues in person. Join her at Caddy's in Madeira Beach on Wednesday, November 3rd from 5:00 - 7:00 p.m. [RSVP H](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=c3cd483a81&e=c2296cffff)[ERE](mailto:info@amandamakki.com?subject=Amanda%2C%20I'll%20see%20you%20at%20Caddy's%20in%20Madeira%20Beach!) or by clicking the photo.
|
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=0c9bcef4ab&e=c2296cffff)
---
### Meet Amanda at the Tiki Docks at Maximo Marina!
Amanda will be at 3769 50th Ave. S in Saint Petersburg on Thursday, November 4th from 5:00-7:00 p.m. [RSVP HERE](mailto:info@amandamakki.com?subject=Amanda%2C%20I'll%20see%20you%20in%20Clearwater%20on%20November%208th!) or by clicking on the photo.

| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=de8452ece2&e=c2296cffff)
---
### Meet Amanda and Check Out Jay VerHulst's Private Classic Car Collection!
Amanda will be at 1141 Pierce Street in Clearwater on Monday, November 8th from 5:30-7:30 p.m. [RSVP HERE](mailto:info@amandamakki.com?subject=Amanda%2C%20I'll%20see%20you%20in%20Clearwater%20on%20November%208th!) or by clicking on the photo.

| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38207617/314427870/-2023814932?refcode=20211101.13_TM_10KS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDI4OWY2NC03YzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Y3ZGNaMAuhPl1Modcdu7EOyY_DJ4g2S3tUILOyw53o=)

| | Derek,

When I launched this campaign, I had a vision. We need to build on the progress we’ve made, move this Commonwealth forward and create a better future for all Virginians.

I knew it wouldn’t be easy. But with your support, we have built a historic grassroots campaign.

Together, we’ve fought for a stronger, fairer economy, and we’ve advocated for civil rights and voting rights.

We’ve talked about good jobs and health care, and we’ve talked about education and clean energy.

We’ve stood up to hate and division, and we’ve said NO to right-wing extremism.

We’ve pushed for continued progress in our Commonwealth, and we’ve championed democracy.

Now, it’s time to put words into action and **win this race.**

[_**Derek, today, on the eve of Election Day, I am humbly asking for your support once more. We have until polls close tomorrow evening to affect the outcome of this race, and with your contribution, we can make a huge difference. Please, chip in any amount to my campaign tonight to power this team through the finish line tomorrow.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38207618/314427871/1097049879?refcode=20211101.13_TM_10KS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDI4OWY2NC03YzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Y3ZGNaMAuhPl1Modcdu7EOyY_DJ4g2S3tUILOyw53o=)

Donald Trump and my opponent have spent this campaign trying to tear us down. They’ve sowed division and peddled dangerous conspiracies.

They’ve made it clear that they’re willing to do whatever it takes to keep Trumpism alive and well in Virginia.

Tomorrow, we can choose a better way. We can reject hate and **choose progress.**

But it’s going to take all of us.

[_**Please, join me tonight — before polls open in the morning — and make a contribution to my campaign so we can get out the vote tomorrow.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38207619/314427872/1097049879?refcode=20211101.13_TM_10KS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDI4OWY2NC03YzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Y3ZGNaMAuhPl1Modcdu7EOyY_DJ4g2S3tUILOyw53o=)

From the bottom of my heart, thank you for being with me on this campaign.

– Terry | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38207620/314427873/-2023814932?refcode=20211101.13_TM_10KS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDI4OWY2NC03YzNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Y3ZGNaMAuhPl1Modcdu7EOyY_DJ4g2S3tUILOyw53o=)

name: Mark Herring
subject: My closing message to Virginians
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ONE COMMONWEALTH PAC
body:
The entire world is looking to Virginia to see what direction we are headed. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38207638/314428218/-1309710229?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2EyNDdhYi03ZDNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pvfYxlde5rVXFQigcL3fsl1c8yywOJetRnoDwGML_fQ=&emci=11e8ebe2-313b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=37a247ab-7d3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9499186) | Friends, this is a little long so forgive me. But I hope you will read it all: Tomorrow is Election Day in Virginia, and everything is on the line for our Commonwealth. I’m feeling cautiously optimistic, but we’re not taking anything or any vote for granted! The entire world is looking to Virginia to see what direction we are headed. I want you to think about what kind of message we can send with our votes. Are we going to keep moving forward, or are we going to let dangerous Trump extremists take us backwards? The choice in this election could not be more clear. I’m the Attorney General who stood up for marriage equality, before it was politically popular, because it was the right thing to do. I fought back against Donald Trump on behalf of immigrants and DREAMers. I went all the way to the Supreme Court to protect healthcare coverage for Virginians with a pre-existing condition. We launched the first-ever investigation into racial bias in a public school system, took on white supremacy and made Virginia a more welcoming place to live, work and raise a family. **They call me the People’s Lawyer because that’s what I do — I fight for the people.** We need to realize how much is at stake in this election. Voting rights. The right to choose. LGBTQ+ equality. Criminal justice reform and gun safety. Our healthcare. Vaccines. These are the biggest issues of our times, and it falls to our Commonwealth’s Attorney General to go to court and state where Virginia stands on all of these critical issues. My Republican opponent Jason Miyares is a dangerous Trump extremist who threatens to take us backwards. He wants to ban abortion and put guns back in the hands of dangerous criminals and abusers. And think about this — whoever we elect tomorrow will be our Attorney General in 2024 when we need a leader who will protect the right to vote and defend our democracy. Jason Miyares took millions of dollars from the planners on January 6th and he can’t be trusted with the powers of our Attorney General! The stakes are high, so please vote tomorrow! Get your friends to vote, get your neighbors to vote. Don’t get tired and don’t sit this one out, because it is more important than ever that our voices are heard in this election and that we send the right message about not just who we are as a Commonwealth, but where we are going as a country too. [**This is the last time I will ask, and it’s important: can you please send in a final donation right now so that we can get out the vote tomorrow and WIN this election for the future of our Commonwealth and the future of our nation?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38207639/314428219/-369034222?refcode=E12204-20211101-ClosingMessage-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2EyNDdhYi03ZDNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pvfYxlde5rVXFQigcL3fsl1c8yywOJetRnoDwGML_fQ=) | ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_****

clean_body: The entire world is looking to Virginia to see what direction we are headed. | | Friends, this is a little long so forgive me. But I hope you will read it all: Tomorrow is Election Day in Virginia, and everything is on the line for our Commonwealth. I’m feeling cautiously optimistic, but we’re not taking anything or any vote for granted! The entire world is looking to Virginia to see what direction we are headed. I want you to think about what kind of message we can send with our votes. Are we going to keep moving forward, or are we going to let dangerous Trump extremists take us backwards? The choice in this election could not be more clear. I’m the Attorney General who stood up for marriage equality, before it was politically popular, because it was the right thing to do. I fought back against Donald Trump on behalf of immigrants and DREAMers. I went all the way to the Supreme Court to protect healthcare coverage for Virginians with a pre-existing condition. We launched the first-ever investigation into racial bias in a public school system, took on white supremacy and made Virginia a more welcoming place to live, work and raise a family. They call me the People’s Lawyer because that’s what I do — I fight for the people. We need to realize how much is at stake in this election. Voting rights. The right to choose. LGBTQ+ equality. Criminal justice reform and gun safety. Our healthcare. Vaccines. These are the biggest issues of our times, and it falls to our Commonwealth’s Attorney General to go to court and state where Virginia stands on all of these critical issues. My Republican opponent Jason Miyares is a dangerous Trump extremist who threatens to take us backwards. He wants to ban abortion and put guns back in the hands of dangerous criminals and abusers. And think about this — whoever we elect tomorrow will be our Attorney General in 2024 when we need a leader who will protect the right to vote and defend our democracy. Jason Miyares took millions of dollars from the planners on January 6th and he can’t be trusted with the powers of our Attorney General! The stakes are high, so please vote tomorrow! Get your friends to vote, get your neighbors to vote. Don’t get tired and don’t sit this one out, because it is more important than ever that our voices are heard in this election and that we send the right message about not just who we are as a Commonwealth, but where we are going as a country too. = | **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you so much for all of your support. I've proudly worked on your behalf to expand and secure the rights of our fellow Virginians, and to show Virginians a new vision for what their Attorney General can do for them. The progress we’ve made has been historic, but the work isn’t done." = | | = Mark has been the most progressive Attorney General in the history of Virginia and we need your help to keep him in office working for us. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues on Behalf of OpenTheBooks.com for Fauci Financial Disclosure Records and Royalties Paid to NIH Employees
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit on behalf of OpenTheBooks.com against the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for the employment contracts; financial, conflict of interest, and confidentiality disclosure documents; and job description of National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID) Director Anthony S. Fauci, M.D., as well as royalties paid to NIH employees by outside entities

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 1, 2021
---|---|---

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57039&L=26192&F=H&) | **[Judicial Watch: January 6 Documents Show Park Police Expected Large Group to March on US Capitol](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57039&L=26192&F=H&)** Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 329 pages of records from United States Park Police related to the January 6, 2021, demonstrations and disturbance at the U.S. Capitol. The records show that on the day before the January 6 rally featuring President Trump, US Park Police expected a “large portion” of the attendees to march to the US Capitol and that the FBI was monitoring the January 6 demonstrations, including travel to the events by “subjects of interest.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57039&L=26192&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57039&L=26186&F=H&) | **[U.S. Treasury’s New Racial Equity Chief Spent 10 Years as Director at La Raza Group](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57039&L=26186&F=H&)** A veteran La Raza official who spent a decade at the nation’s most influential—and deep pocketed—open borders group has been appointed by the Biden administration to be the U.S. Treasury Department’s first ever Counselor for Racial Equity. Her name is Janis Bowdler and she served as Director of Economic Policy at the National Council of La Raza (NCLR), the leftist organization that saw a dramatic increase in government funding during the Obama administration. Deputy Treasury Secretary Wally Adeyemo describes Bowdler as a “proud Latina” who will help the agency “focus on racial equity” and ensure “programs create opportunity in communities of color.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57039&L=26186&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57039&L=26163&F=H&) | **[Record-Breaking Mexican Border Arrests, Caravan En Route, Panama Warns 65K More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57039&L=26163&F=H&)** Not only was the record for illegal immigrant apprehensions along the southern border shattered in 2021, the fiscal year, which ended in September, concluded with a bang—a final month spike of migrants from Haiti (132%), Turkey (89%), India (82%), Ukraine (81%) and even China (75%). The number of illegal aliens from Russia nearly doubled from 758 to 1,432 during the same period, according to year-end figures provided this month by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS). The chilling stats illustrate the magnitude of the national security and humanitarian crisis created by the Biden administration’s disastrous open border policies. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57039&L=26163&F=H&)

### [DC Police Were Warned About Jan. 6 As Early As 2020, Documents Reveal ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57039&L=26194&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZGMtcG9saWNlLWRvY3VtZW50cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMTAxMjE1MjU2) The Daily Caller United States Park Police were warned as early as Dec. 2020 that there was potential for an uprising at the Capitol on Jan. 6, and the Federal Bureau of Investigations (FBI) was monitoring demonstrations leading up to the riots, newly released court documents have revealed.

The documents were released in response to a lawsuit filed by Judicial Watch in May, after U.S. Park Police previously denied a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request in March for all records related to the Jan. 6 insurrection. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit on behalf of OpenTheBooks.com against the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for the employment contracts; financial, conflict of interest, and confidentiality disclosure documents; and job description of National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID) Director Anthony S. Fauci, M.D., as well as royalties paid to NIH employees by outside entities | | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 1, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | = | = Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit on behalf of OpenTheBooks.com against the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for the employment contracts; financial, conflict of interest, and confidentiality disclosure documents; and job description of National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID) Director Anthony S. Fauci, M.D., as well as royalties paid to NIH employees by outside entities. = ---|--- | | | | == | == Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 329 pages of records from United States Park Police related to the January 6, 2021, demonstrations and disturbance at the U.S. Capitol. The records show that on the day before the January 6 rally featuring President Trump, US Park Police expected a “large portion” of the attendees to march to the US Capitol and that the FBI was monitoring the January 6 demonstrations, including travel to the events by “subjects of interest.” == ---|--- | | | | | A veteran La Raza official who spent a decade at the nation’s most influential—and deep pocketed—open borders group has been appointed by the Biden administration to be the U.S. Treasury Department’s first ever Counselor for Racial Equity. Her name is Janis Bowdler and she served as Director of Economic Policy at the National Council of La Raza (NCLR), the leftist organization that saw a dramatic increase in government funding during the Obama administration. Deputy Treasury Secretary Wally Adeyemo describes Bowdler as a “proud Latina” who will help the agency “focus on racial equity” and ensure “programs create opportunity in communities of color.” ---|--- | | | | = | = Not only was the record for illegal immigrant apprehensions along the southern border shattered in 2021, the fiscal year, which ended in September, concluded with a bang—a final month spike of migrants from Haiti (132%), Turkey (89%), India (82%), Ukraine (81%) and even China (75%). The number of illegal aliens from Russia nearly doubled from 758 to 1,432 during the same period, according to year-end figures provided this month by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS). The chilling stats illustrate the magnitude of the national security and humanitarian crisis created by the Biden administration’s disastrous open border policies. = ---|--- | | | RealClearInvestigations A Hillary Clinton campaign operation to plant a false rumor about Donald Trump setting up a “secret hotline” to Moscow through a Russian bank was much broader than known and involved multiple U.S. agencies, according to declassified documents and sources briefed on an ongoing criminal investigation of the scheme. The Daily Caller United States Park Police were warned as early as Dec. 2020 that there was potential for an uprising at the Capitol on Jan. 6, and the Federal Bureau of Investigations (FBI) was monitoring demonstrations leading up to the riots, newly released court documents have revealed. The documents were released in response to a lawsuit filed by Judicial Watch in May, after U.S. Park Police previously denied a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request in March for all records related to the Jan. 6 insurrection. == Fox News The city of Asheville, North Carolina, is facing a new lawsuit alleging that it violated the state and U.S. constitutions by designating a scholarship program for Black students. Announced on Wednesday, the civil rights lawsuit was filed by the conservative Judicial Watch (JW) and WNC Citizens for Equality Inc. The latter claims that at least three of its members who said they would apply for the city's scholarship if not for their race. == = = = = | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

clean_body: | | | | | Hi team -- Kathy and I enjoyed hitting the campaign trail across the state this past weekend to celebrate Nevada Day: Yesterday marked 157 years since Nevada’s admission to the Union. A state known for its rich history, resilient people, and beautiful public lands -- celebrating Nevada is easy to do. And being Nevada’s governor is the honor of a lifetime. My commitment to making Nevada a place of opportunity for everyone is as strong as ever. I’m proud to join you all in this work to push our state forward, from making it easier to vote to strengthening our public schools. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Battle Born, Nevada Proud. \-- Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. Fellow Conservative,

The **Socialist Democrats** and their **Big Tech** allies are out to get Conservatives.

* They call us **DOMESTIC TERRORISTS****** for trying to stop **RACISM** in our schools
* They **BAN US** on Twitter, Facebook, and Instagram for disagreeing with Democrats
* They **SHUT DOWN** our schools, our churches, and our businesses for 18 months in the name of “science”
* They are leaving us dependent on **CHINA** ,******RUSSIA** , **MEXICO** and the **MIDDLE EAST**
* They are destroying our **GREAT** American economy

Take it from me. I fought Joe Biden and Democrats day in and day out on Twitter, and was **BANNED** because of it. I’m a Congressman, and the leader of the largest Conservative groups in Congress. If they can ban me **(or President Trump)** , think about all the other people who they can ban.

**WE MUST STOP THEIR TOTALITARIANISM**

That's why we've _**extended our end-of-month deadline**_ , so we can continue our fight against socialism. clean_body: Our take? All the marketing money in the world cannot buy Pritzker the election after a failed term. | | My friend, Wondering what Team Sully has been up to this week? Check out some of the highlights from the campaign trail below! 🗞️ SULLY IN THE NEWS What needs to be done to address the horrendous crime wave in our state? Sully joined Leland Vittert of News Nation Now to talk solutions. 📺 SULLY TV Illinois faces some extreme challenges in the state right now: high taxes, high crime, and shocking political corruption. So what do J.B. Pritzker and the Democrats choose to focus on now? Repealing parental notification for abortions. That’s wrong - for so many reasons. Watch Sully break down why in his latest video statement: 📲 SULLY ON SOCIAL This week, Sully has been talking with Illinois families. He wants to hear from them: What policies would help make Illinois strong and more friendly towards families? Parents had a lot to say - and you might be surprised by some of their ideas!Read the responses on, and . 📊 ILLINOIS FACT OF THE WEEK Only a quarter of 11th graders in Chicago’s public schools are proficient in reading or math. Thanks for reading. We’ll be in touch! -Team Sully | | | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois | | 111 E Douglas St, Petersburg, IL 62675 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: Abortion rights were at the Supreme Court today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We must stay vigilant to protect our reproductive rights.
#
Peter,
In what the _Washington Post_ described as the “most dramatic reckoning for abortion rights in decades,” the Texas anti-abortion law was before the U.S. Supreme Court today -- putting access to abortion at risk like never before.
**We must stay vigilant to protect our reproductive rights from these dangerous attacks.**
**[Add your name to the petition now if you’re standing with the pro-choice majority today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38207788/314428980/1072944352?ms=pm_em_211101_1&refcode=pm_em_211101_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjYwM2FlOS04NjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-7aJm2diRlfiKN4DvLR8M-eFf2nlWakdlXXSQ14QGDw=&emci=d85450f0-833b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=32603ae9-863b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13116610)**
_The Texas law is outrageous._ It not only bans nearly all abortions in the state, it gives citizens the right to sue -- and receive $10,000 from -- any individual who helps a patient get an abortion.
Attacks on reproductive rights are nothing new -- but this is one of the most blatant attempts I’ve ever seen conservatives make in their crusade to roll back the clock on the right to abortion.
**[We don’t know what will happen at the Supreme Court, but here’s one thing you can count on for sure: I’ll keep fighting to protect our reproductive rights as long as I’m in the Senate. And we all can use our voices in this fight. Add your name now if you’re with me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38207789/314428981/1072944352?ms=pm_em_211101_1&refcode=pm_em_211101_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjYwM2FlOS04NjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-7aJm2diRlfiKN4DvLR8M-eFf2nlWakdlXXSQ14QGDw=&emci=d85450f0-833b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=32603ae9-863b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13116610)**
Thank you,
Patty

**[Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38207790/314428982/1072944352?ms=pm_em_211101_1&refcode=pm_em_211101_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjYwM2FlOS04NjNiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-7aJm2diRlfiKN4DvLR8M-eFf2nlWakdlXXSQ14QGDw=&emci=d85450f0-833b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=32603ae9-863b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13116610)**

clean_body: We must stay vigilant to protect our reproductive rights. Peter, In what the Washington Post described as the “most dramatic reckoning for abortion rights in decades,” the Texas anti-abortion law was before the U.S. Supreme Court today -- putting access to abortion at risk like never before. We must stay vigilant to protect our reproductive rights from these dangerous attacks. The Texas law is outrageous. It not only bans nearly all abortions in the state, it gives citizens the right to sue -- and receive $10,000 from -- any individual who helps a patient get an abortion. Attacks on reproductive rights are nothing new -- but this is one of the most blatant attempts I’ve ever seen conservatives make in their crusade to roll back the clock on the right to abortion. Thank you, Patty As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. * PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jacobs=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Biden Rewards Crime
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jacobs4congress/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-4981546?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| What is it with Democrats and their need to reward people for breaking the laws of our country?

First liberals in New York passed laws to let criminals roam the streets free to commit more crimes, now Biden reportedly wants to pay illegal immigrants $450,000.

He wants to use your tax dollars to award illegal immigrants for breaking our laws and breaking into our country. If someone was robbing your house, would you let them stay and also open your safe for them?

This is beyond liberal lunacy – it’s a desecration of country, our laws, and his oath. Biden cares more about those here illegally than he does Americans struggling under his inflation tax.

This is disgraceful, and guess what...it will only make the raging crisis at our southern border 10x worse. Now when you break into our nation not only, will we not arrest you, will give you a big lump sum of money and send you on your way.

You’re footing the bill for this madness, and Biden doesn’t care.

**_[Biden's policies are a danger to our nation and must be stopped. He opened our border, caused a surging crisis, and is ignoring the safety of every American. We need to end this now, can you rush $10, $20, or $50 to our Border Defense Fund?](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=19aa9a209a&e=13f35c4add)_**
---
| [$10.00](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=b41d32601c&e=13f35c4add "$10.00")
---
| [$20.00](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=30b74e01a8&e=13f35c4add "$20.00")
---
| [$50.00](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=002d3b1bf6&e=13f35c4add "$50.00")
---
| I’ve been to our Southern Border, unlike Biden. I’ve seen the crisis firsthand. President Trump had it right, and his policies kept us safe. Biden is hurting our nation.

Best,
Chris Jacobs
---
